en: I reached my daily water goal today! Help your body, download "My Water"! #mywater
context:
Surface: Social share post body (Facebook / generic share sheet) — main screen "share today's result" flow for male users.
  Type: social share post body.
  Context: First-person message the user posts after completing the daily water goal. The user speaks as "I"; this is the male-form variant paired with `socialShareTextFbF` (female). In languages with grammatical gender, past-tense verbs / participles / adjectives agreeing with the speaker must use masculine forms. In English both variants may read the same; in target language adjust for the speaker's gender. Wording uses legacy "rate" (= daily goal); keep aligned with how the daily goal is named in target language.
  Constraints: Preserve the `#mywater` hashtag and the quoted brand name "My Water" (use locale-standard quotation marks).

en: Alcohol pulls water from your body, so your daily water goal is higher
context:
Surface: Add drink / drink-volume screen — info alert shown when the user adds an alcoholic beverage (also triggered from the debug shake menu).
  Type: paragraph (educational alert body).
  Context: Educational message explaining that alcohol has a dehydrating effect — it removes water from the body, so the daily water goal will be increased accordingly. Tone is informative, plain-language, body-positive (frames the goal increase as a helpful adjustment, not a warning).
  Constraints: Alert body — fits a 1-2 sentence info dialog; trailing period intentionally omitted in source (preserve target-language sentence punctuation conventions).

t.ar: الكحول يسحب الماء من جسمك، لذلك يصبح هدفك اليومي من الماء أكبر
t.da: Alkohol trækker vand ud af kroppen, så dit daglige vandmål bliver højere

t.en: Alcohol pulls water from your body, so your daily water goal is higher

t.hi: शराब शरीर से पानी खींच लेती है, इसलिए पानी का दैनिक लक्ष्य बढ़ जाता है

t.pl: Wysłaliśmy Ci wiadomość e-mail z odnośnikiem do zresetowania hasła
t.pt_BR: Foi enviado um e-mail com um link para mudar a sua senha
t.ru: Ссылка для восстановления пароля отправлена на почту.
t.sv: Ett e-postmeddelande med en länk för att återställa ditt lösenord har skickats till dig
t.tr: E-posta adresinize bir şifre sıfırlama bağlantısı gönderildi

t.zh_CN: 一封包含重置密码链接的邮件已经发送给您了。

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Celebratory praise for completing today's water goal. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_11M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.de: Gut gemacht! Du hast es geschafft!
t.nb: Godt jobba, du har gjort det!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, het is je gelukt!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, du har klarat det!
t.vi: Tốt lắm, bạn đã làm được rồi!

en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Praise plus encouragement to begin tomorrow the same way — with a glass of water. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_14M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.ar: أحسنت، ابدئي غدًا بكوب ماء مرة أخرى!
t.da: Godt klaret, start med et glas vand igen i morgen!
t.de: Gut gemacht! Fange morgen deinen Tag mit einem Glas Wasser an!
t.en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
t.es: Buen trabajo, ¡mañana empieza el día con otro vaso de agua!
t.fr: Bravo, demain commence à nouveau avec un verre d'eau!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे! कल फिर एक गिलास पानी से शुरू करना!
t.id: Hebat, mulai besok juga dengan segelas air!
t.it: Ottimo lavoro, domani comincia di nuovo la tua giornata con un bicchiere d’acqua!
t.ja: よく出来ました、明日も一日をグラス一杯の水で始めましょう！
t.ko: 잘했어요, 내일도 물 한 잔으로 시작해요!
t.ms: Hebat, esok mulakan juga dengan segelas air!
t.nb: Godt jobba, start i morgen med et glass vann igjen!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, start morgen opnieuw met een glas water!
t.pl: Dobra robota, jutro znów rozpocznij dzień od szklanki wody!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, amanhã comece de novo com um copo de água!
t.ru: Молодец, начни и завтра свой день со стакана воды!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, börja morgondagen med ett glas vatten igen!
t.tr: Aferin, yarın da güne bir bardak su ile başla!
t.vi: Làm tốt lắm, ngày mai lại bắt đầu với một cốc nước!
t.zh_CN: 做得好，明天也用一杯水开启新的一天吧！

context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.

t.de: Mach das Beste aus dem Tag!
t.vi: Hãy làm cho hôm nay đáng giá!

en: Awaken your body, drink a glass of water
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text label rotated through MotivationalText.swift, shown when the user has not yet added any water for the day (text1 group, percent == 0).
  Type: motivational text
  Context: Body-awakening nudge framing the first glass as a way to wake the body up. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text1_3F (female form) for agreement in languages with grammatical gender.

t.ar: أيقظ جسمك، اشرب كوبًا من الماء
t.da: Væk din krop og drik et glas vand
t.de: Wecke deinen Körper auf – trinke ein Glas Wasser
t.en: Awaken your body, drink a glass of water
t.es: Despierta tu cuerpo, bebe un vaso de agua
t.fr: Réveille ton corps, bois un verre d'eau
t.hi: अपने शरीर को जगाओ, एक गिलास पानी पियो
t.it: Risveglia il tuo organismo: bevi un bicchiere d’acqua
t.ja: 体を目覚めさせよう 水を一杯飲みましょう
t.ko: 몸을 깨워요, 물 한 잔 마셔요
t.ms: Bangunkan badan awak, minum segelas air
t.nb: Vekk kroppen din og drikk et glass vann
t.nl: Maak je lichaam wakker, drink een glas water
t.pl: Obudź swoje ciało, wypij szklankę wody
t.pt_BR: Acorde seu corpo, beba um copo de água
t.ru: Разбуди свой организм, выпей стакан воды
t.sv: Väck din kropp och drick ett glas vatten
t.tr: Vücudunu uyandır, bir bardak su iç
t.vi: Hãy đánh thức cơ thể của bạn, hãy uống một cốc nước

context:
Surface: Settings → Default volumes screen — confirmation alert title shown after the user swipes / taps to delete a preset drink volume row.
  Type: confirmation alert title.
  Context: Asks the user to confirm deletion of a preset drink volume entry (e.g. a 250 ml glass row). "Volume" here means a preset drink amount, not audio volume.
  Constraints: Keep short; trailing "?" is part of the prompt — preserve question mark per locale conventions.

en: During intense exercise, don’t forget to rest and drink plenty of water.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
  Type: tip.
  Context: Educational hydration tip — remember to rest and replenish water during intense physical activity.

t.ar: أثناء ممارسة النشاط البدني المكثف لا تنس أخذ راحة وتعويض مستوى المياه لديك.
t.da: Husk at hvile og drikke rigeligt med vand under hård træning.
t.de: Vergiss nicht, bei hohen körperlichen Belastungen Pausen zu machen und den Wasserhaushalt wiederherzustellen.
t.en: During intense exercise, don’t forget to rest and drink plenty of water.
t.es: Durante una actividad física intensa no olvides descansar y aumentar tus niveles de agua.
t.fr: Pendant un effort physique intense, pense à te reposer et à boire beaucoup d'eau.
t.hi: ज़ोरदार कसरत के दौरान आराम करना और पानी पीते रहना न भूलो।
t.id: Selama banyak latihan fisik, jangan lupa beristirahat dan memenuhi kebutuhan air.
t.it: Quando ti alleni, non dimenticare di riposarti e di idratarti.
t.ja: 激しい運動中は忘れず休憩を挟み、こまめに水分を補給しましょう。
t.ko: 격렬한 육체활동 중에는 휴식을 취하고 수분을 보충하는 것을 잊지 마세요.
t.ms: Semasa latihan fizikal yang intensif, jangan lupa berehat dan tambah semula air dalam badan.
t.nb: Under intens trening, ikke glem å hvile og drikke rikelig med vann.
t.nl: Vergeet tijdens intensieve inspanning niet om te rusten en voldoende water te drinken.
t.pl: Pamiętaj, by podczas wzmożonej aktywności fizycznej odpoczywać i uzupełniać poziom wody.
t.pt_BR: Durante atividades físicas intensas, não se esqueça de descansar e repor o seu nível de água.
t.ru: Во время интенсивных физических нагрузок не забывай отдыхать и восполнять водный баланс.
t.sv: Under intensiv fysisk aktivitet, glöm inte att vila och dricka ordentligt med vatten.
t.tr: Yoğun fiziksel etkinlik sırasında dinlenmeyi ve su içmeyi unutma.
t.vi: Trong thời gian hoạt động thể chất cường độ cao, đừng quên nghỉ ngơi và nạp đủ nước cho cơ thể.
t.zh_CN: 进行高强度体育运动时别忘了休息，补充水分。

t.de: Du hast dein Ziel fast erreicht!
t.fr: Tu as presque atteint ton objectif!
t.it: Hai quasi raggiunto il tuo obiettivo!
t.ja: あと少しで目標達成です！
t.nl: Je hebt het doel bijna bereikt!
t.vi: Bạn sắp đạt được mục tiêu!

en: Drink more water and use the app effectively
context:
Surface: Legacy paywall — value-prop carousel slide 2 title.
  Type: screen title (marketing claim).
  Context: Second slide headline pitching the core benefit (drink more water + use the app effectively); part of the legacy paywall hero carousel.

t.ar: اشرب المزيد من المياه واستخدم التطبيق بكفاءة
t.da: Drik mere vand, og brug appen effektivt
t.de: Trinken Sie mehr Wasser und nutzen Sie die App effizient.
t.en: Drink more water and use the app effectively
t.es: Beba más agua y use la aplicación de forma más eficaz
t.fr: Buvez plus d'eau et utilisez l'application de manière plus efficace
t.hi: अधिक पानी पिएँ और ऐप का उपयोग प्रभावी रूप से करें
t.id: Minum lebih banyak air dan pakai aplikasi secara efektif
t.it: Beva più acqua e usi l'app in maniera efficiente
t.ja: もっと水を飲んで、 アプリを効率的に使用しましょう
t.ko: 물을 더 많이 마시고 앱을 더욱 효율적으로 이용하세요
t.ms: Minum lebih banyak air dan pakai aplikasi dengan berkesan
t.nb: Drikk mer vann og bruk appen effektivt
t.nl: Drink meer water en gebruik de app effectief
t.pl: Pij więcej wody i efektywnie korzystaj z aplikacji
t.pt_BR: Beba mais água e use o aplicativo de maneira eficaz
t.ru: Пейте больше воды и пользуйтесь приложением эффективно
t.sv: Drick mer vatten och använd appen effektivt
t.tr: Daha fazla su için ve uygulamayı etkili kullanın
t.vi: Uống nhiều nước hơn và sử dụng ứng dụng một cách hiệu quả
t.zh_CN: 多喝水，有效地使用 应用

en: Are you already tracking your water with our app, or just getting started? We know stability and usability matter to you, so we’ve improved reliability and made the app easier to use in this update. Good luck reaching your goal!
context:
Surface: App Store Connect listing — "What's New in This Version" release notes.
  Type: release notes.
  Context: Generic release-notes copy shown on the App Store version page describing stability and UX improvements. Despite the legacy "LoremIpsum" suffix in the key name, this is real shipped marketing prose. Not used in app code — uploaded as ASC metadata.
  Constraints: ≤4000 chars in ASC; one paragraph, no bullet markers.
  Tone: warm, encouraging.

t.ar: هل تتابع شرب الماء مع تطبيقنا بانتظام، أم أنك بدأت للتو؟ نعلم أن الاستقرار وسهولة الاستخدام يهمّانك، لذلك حسّنّا موثوقية التطبيق وجعلناه أسهل في الاستخدام في هذا التحديث. نتمنى لك التوفيق في تحقيق هدفك!
t.da: Holder du allerede styr på dit vand med vores app, eller er du lige begyndt? Vi ved, at stabilitet og brugervenlighed er vigtige for dig. Derfor har vi forbedret pålideligheden og gjort appen nemmere at bruge i denne opdatering. Held og lykke med at nå dit mål!
t.de: Erfassen Sie Ihren Wasserkonsum bereits regelmäßig mit unserer App oder fangen Sie gerade erst an? Die Stabilität und Nutzbarkeit der App sind für Sie wichtig. Wir haben die Zuverlässigkeit verbessert und mit diesem Update die Benutzeroberfläche komfortabler gemacht. Viel Glück beim Erreichen Ihres Ziels!
t.en: Are you already tracking your water with our app, or just getting started? We know stability and usability matter to you, so we’ve improved reliability and made the app easier to use in this update. Good luck reaching your goal!
t.es: ¿Añades el agua que bebes con nuestra aplicación constantemente o acabas de comenzar? La estabilidad y facilidad de uso de la aplicación son importantes. Hemos mejorado la fiabilidad y en esta actualización la interfaz es más cómoda. ¡Buena suerte en el logro de tu objetivo!
t.fr: Suivez-vous déjà votre consommation d'eau avec notre application, ou débutez-vous tout juste? La stabilité et l'ergonomie de l'application sont importantes pour vous. Dans cette mise à jour, nous avons amélioré la fiabilité et rendu l'interface plus pratique. Bonne chance pour atteindre votre objectif!
t.hi: क्या आप पहले से हमारे ऐप से अपना पानी ट्रैक कर रहे हैं या अभी शुरुआत कर रहे हैं? हम जानते हैं कि ऐप की स्थिरता और उपयोगिता आपके लिए मायने रखती है, इसलिए इस अपडेट में हमने विश्वसनीयता बेहतर की है और ऐप को इस्तेमाल में आसान बनाया है। आपके लक्ष्य तक पहुँचने के लिए शुभकामनाएँ!
t.id: Apakah Anda selalu mencatat jumlah air yang diminum dengan aplikasi kami atau baru mulai? Stabilitas dan kenyamanan aplikasi penting bagi Anda. Dalam pembaruan ini, kami meningkatkan keandalan dan membuat antarmuka lebih nyaman. Semoga bisa mencapai tujuan Anda!
t.it: Registri l'acqua bevuta con la nostra app sempre o hai appena iniziato? La stabilità e l'usabilità dell'app sono importanti per te. Abbiamo migliorato l'affidabilità e reso l'interfaccia più comoda in questo aggiornamento. In bocca al lupo per raggiungere il tuo obiettivo!
t.ja: このアプリでいつも水分摂取を記録していますか？それとも始めたばかりですか？ アプリの安定性と使いやすさは、あなたにとって大切なことですよね。このアップデートでは信頼性を高め、より使いやすくしました。目標達成を応援しています！
t.ko: 항상 우리 앱으로 마시는 물을 기록하고 있습니까? 아니면 막 시작했습니까? 앱의 안정성과 유용성은 중요합니다. 이번 업데이트에서는 안정성을 개선하고 인터페이스를 더 사용자 친화적으로 만들었습니다. 목표 달성에 행운을 빕니다!
t.ms: Adakah anda sudah menjejaki air dengan aplikasi kami atau baru bermula? Kestabilan dan kemudahan penggunaan penting untuk anda. Dalam kemas kini ini, kami telah meningkatkan kebolehpercayaan dan menjadikan antara muka lebih mudah digunakan. Semoga berjaya mencapai matlamat anda!
t.nb: Sporer du vanninntaket med appen vår allerede, eller har du så vidt begynt? Stabilitet og brukervennlighet er viktig for deg. Vi har forbedret påliteligheten og gjort grensesnittet mer praktisk i denne oppdateringen. Lykke til med å nå målet ditt!
t.nl: Houd je je water al bij met onze app, of begin je net? Stabiliteit en gebruiksgemak zijn belangrijk voor je. In deze update hebben we de betrouwbaarheid verbeterd en de app makkelijker in gebruik gemaakt. Veel succes met het bereiken van je doel!
t.pl: Dbasz o picie wody cały czas dzięki naszej aplikacji, czy dopiero zaczynasz? Stabilność i użyteczność aplikacji są dla Ciebie ważne. Poprawiliśmy niezawodność i uczyniliśmy interfejs wygodniejszym w tej aktualizacji. Powodzenia w osiąganiu swojego celu!
t.pt_BR: Você marca a água tomada no nosso aplicativo constantemente ou está apenas começando? A estabilidade e a usabilidade do aplicativo são importantes para você. Aprimoramos a confiabilidade e tornamos a interface mais prática nesta atualização. Boa sorte em atingir o seu objetivo!
t.ru: Записываете ли вы выпитую воду с нашим приложением постоянно или только начинаете? Стабильность и удобство приложения важны для вас. В этом обновлении мы улучшили надёжность и сделали интерфейс более удобным. Успехов в достижении вашей цели!
t.sv: Spårar du redan ditt vattenintag med vår app, eller har du precis börjat? Vi vet att stabilitet och användbarhet är viktiga för dig, så vi har förbättrat tillförlitligheten och gjort appen enklare att använda i den här uppdateringen. Lycka till med att nå ditt mål!
t.tr: İçtiğiniz suyu her zaman uygulamamızla kaydediyorsunuz mu yoksa yeni mi başlıyorsunuz? Uygulamanın kararlılığı ve kullanılabilirliği sizin için önemlidir. Bu güncellemede güvenilirliği artırdık ve arayüzü daha rahat hale getirdik. Hedefinize ulaşmada iyi şanslar!
t.vi: Bạn có uống thêm nước với ứng dụng của chúng tôi một cách liên tục hay chỉ mới bắt đầu? Tính ổn định và khả năng sử dụng của ứng dụng rất quan trọng đối với bạn. Chúng tôi đã cải thiện độ tin cậy và hoàn thiện giao diện hơn trong bản cập nhật này. Chúc bạn sớm đạt được mục tiêu!
t.zh_CN: 你是否一直用我们的 App 记录饮水，还是刚开始使用呢？App 的稳定性和易用性对你很重要。在此更新中，我们提高了可靠性，并让界面更方便好用。祝你顺利达成目标！

context:
Surface: Onboarding notifications interval step — time picker sheet title (start of the daily reminder window).
  Type: section header / sheet title.
  Context: Preposition "From" introducing the start time of the daily hydration reminder window (paired with the end "To" time elsewhere). Not a beverage. Translate as the preposition meaning "starting at" / "from".
  Constraints: Keep short (single word, fits sheet header).

en: Customize your default volumes to add drinks faster
context:
Surface: Paywall — feature comparison card / benefit row description (multiple subscription screens).
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Marketing description paired with ourVolumesTitle — explains that customizing default volumes speeds up adding drinks.

t.ar: خصّص أحجامك الافتراضية لإضافة المشروبات بشكل أسرع
t.da: Skift standardmængder for at tilføje drikkevarer hurtigere
t.de: Bearbeiten Sie die Standard-Volumenangaben, um Getränke schneller hinzuzufügen.

t.es: Cambia los valores estándar de volumen para añadir bebidas más rápido
t.fr: Modifie tes volumes par défaut pour ajouter tes boissons plus vite
t.hi: पेय जल्दी जोड़ने के लिए अपनी डिफ़ॉल्ट मात्रा बदलो
t.id: Ubah volume standar untuk menambah minuman lebih cepat

t.ja: 標準の容量をカスタマイズすると、飲み物をすばやく追加できます
t.ko: 기본 용량을 원하는 대로 바꿔 음료를 더 빠르게 추가하세요
t.ms: Ubah isi padu standar untuk tambah minuman lebih cepat
t.nb: Endre standard volumverdier for å legge til drikker raskere
t.nl: Pas je standaardvolumes aan om sneller drankjes toe te voegen
t.pl: Zmień standardowe miary, by szybciej dodawać napoje
t.pt_BR: Altere os valores padrão de volume para adicionar bebidas mais rápido
t.ru: Измени стандартные объёмы, чтобы быстрее добавлять напитки
t.sv: Ändra standardvolymerna för att lägga till drycker snabbare
t.tr: İçecekleri daha hızlı eklemek için varsayılan hacimleri değiştirin
t.vi: Thay đổi các giá trị tiêu chuẩn để bổ sung đồ uống nhanh hơn
t.zh_CN: 更改标准饮用量，以快速添加饮料

en: Keep a water bottle with you so you can drink as soon as you feel thirsty.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
  Type: tip.
  Context: Educational hydration tip — keeping a water bottle on hand makes it easy to drink as soon as thirst appears.

t.ar: احمل زجاجة مياه نظيفة معك دائمًا لتروي ظمأك على الفور.
t.da: Hav altid en flaske vand med, så du kan slukke tørsten med det samme.
t.de: Hab eine Flasche mit reinem Wasser immer bei der Hand, um den Durst sofort stillen zu können.
t.en: Keep a water bottle with you so you can drink as soon as you feel thirsty.
t.es: Lleva una botella de agua para calmar la sed inmediatamente.
t.fr: Garde toujours une bouteille d'eau sur toi pour étancher ta soif dès que nécessaire.
t.hi: प्यास तुरंत बुझाने के लिए हमेशा साफ़ पानी की बोतल पास रखो
t.id: Selalu bawa sebotol air putih denganmu biar segera menghilangkan dahaga.
t.it: Porta sempre con te una bottiglia d’acqua per soddisfare subito la tua sete.
t.ja: 常にキレイな水を入れた水筒を持ち歩くことで、いつでもすぐに喉の渇きを癒すことができます。
t.ko: 항상 깨끗한 물이 담긴 물병을 휴대하여 갈증을 즉시 해소하세요.
t.ms: Selalu bawa sebotol air bersih biar segera melegakan dahaga.
t.nb: Ha alltid med deg en flaske rent vann for raskt å slukke tørsten.
t.nl: Houd altijd een waterfles bij je, zodat je kunt drinken zodra je dorst hebt.
t.pl: Zawsze miej przy sobie butelkę wody, by móc natychmiast zaspokoić pragnienie.
t.pt_BR: Leve uma garrafa com água pura o tempo todo para matar a sede rapidamente.
t.ru: Всегда держи под рукой бутылку с чистой водой, чтобы сразу утолить жажду.
t.sv: Bär alltid en flaska med rent vatten för att snabbt släcka din törst.
t.tr: Susadığında hemen içebilmek için yanında her zaman bir şişe su bulundur.
t.vi: Luôn mang theo một chai nước sạch để làm dịu cơn khát của bạn ngay lập tức.
t.zh_CN: 随身带瓶水，一渴就能马上喝。

en: Do you have a workout today? Drink water!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card, shown above today's logged drink amount after the user has logged drinks.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Workout-themed nudge framed as a question, encouraging extra hydration on training days. Standalone statement, not paired with a numeric value. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages (ru, ar, he, etc.).
  Constraints: Keep question + exclamation rhythm.

t.ar: هل لديك تمرين اليوم؟ اشربي الماء!
t.da: Har du træning i dag? Drik vand!
t.de: Hast du heute Training? Trink Wasser!
t.en: Do you have a workout today? Drink water!
t.fr: Tu fais du sport aujourd'hui? Bois de l'eau!
t.hi: क्या आज तुम्हारी कसरत है? पानी पियो!
t.id: Ada latihan hari ini? Minum air!
t.it: Farai un po' di sport oggi? Bevi acqua!
t.ja: 今日は運動しますか？ 水を飲みましょう！
t.ms: Ada latihan hari ini? Minum air!
t.nb: Har du trening i dag? Drikk vann!
t.nl: Heb je vandaag een workout? Drink water!
t.pt_BR: Você vai malhar hoje? Beba água!
t.sv: Har du ett träningspass idag? Drick vatten!
t.tr: Bugün antrenmanın mı var? O zaman su iç!
t.vi: Hôm nay bạn có tập luyện không? Hãy uống nước!
t.zh_CN: 今天你要锻炼吗？别忘记多喝水！

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Reassuring "told you so" remark — reaching the daily water goal turned out to be easy. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text4_12F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.da: Se, det var ikke så svært!
t.de: Schau mal, es war nicht so schwer!
t.fr: Tu vois, ce n'est pas si difficile!
t.hi: देखो, यह इतना मुश्किल नहीं था!
t.it: Hai visto, non era poi così difficile!
t.ja: ほら、 難しくないでしょう！
t.nb: Se, det er ikke så vanskelig!
t.nl: Kijk, zo moeilijk is het niet!
t.ru: Видишь, это было не так сложно!
t.sv: Se, det är inte så svårt!
t.tr: Bak, gördün mü o kadar da zor değildi!
t.vi: Bạn thấy không, không khó lắm đâu!

context:
Surface: app-wide — Settings tab bar title, Settings screen navigation title, Spotlight result label, and action title in notification-permission alerts that direct the user to iOS Settings.
  Type: screen title.
  Context: Refers to the in-app Settings screen as well as the iOS system Settings app in notification-permission alerts. Short noun phrase, title-case.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) for tab bar / navigation title.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Encouraging reassurance framing hydration as a self-care benefit — your body will appreciate it. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.). Note: same English wording is reused for text4_2 and text4_9 keys (legacy duplication) — translate each variant pair independently.

t.de: Dein Körper wird es dir danken!
t.nl: Je lichaam zal je dankbaar zijn!
t.sv: Din kropp kommer att tacka dig!
t.vi: Cơ thể của bạn sẽ cảm ơn bạn!

en: Have a glass of water, and your body will thank you 😉
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Self-care framing — drinking a glass of water is presented as something the body will appreciate. Includes a playful ";)" wink emoticon — preserve the wink (or a locale-equivalent informal wink) in translation.
  Constraints: Keep within ~80 characters to fit a single-line iOS notification banner.
  Tone: Playful — keep the lighthearted wink register.

t.ar: تناول كوب من الماء، وسيشكرك جسمك 😉
t.da: Drik et glas vand, så vil din krop takke dig 😉
t.de: Trinke ein Glas Wasser, dein Körper wird es dir danken 😉
t.en: Have a glass of water, and your body will thank you 😉
t.es: Toma un vaso de agua, y tu cuerpo te lo agradecerá 😉
t.fr: Bois un verre d'eau et ton corps te remerciera 😉
t.hi: एक गिलास पानी पियो और तुम्हारा शरीर तुम्हें धन्यवाद देगा 😉
t.id: Minum segelas air, tubuhmu akan berterima kasih 😉
t.it: Bevi un bicchiere d'acqua e il tuo corpo ti ringrazierà 😉
t.ja: グラス一杯の水を飲みましょう。きっと体が喜びますよ 😉
t.ko: 물 한 잔을 드세요. 몸이 고마워할 거예요 😉
t.ms: Minum segelas air, tubuh awak akan berterima kasih 😉
t.nb: Ta et glass vann, og kroppen din vil takke deg 😉
t.nl: Neem een glas water, je lichaam zal je bedanken 😉
t.pl: Napij się wody, a Twoje ciało Ci podziękuje 😉
t.pt_BR: Tome um copo de água e o seu corpo vai te agradecer 😉
t.ru: Выпей стакан воды, твой организм будет благодарен 😉
t.sv: Ta ett glas vatten, och din kropp kommer att tacka dig 😉
t.tr: Bir bardak su iç, vücudun sana minnettar olacak 😉
t.vi: Hãy uống một cốc nước, và cơ thể bạn sẽ cảm ơn vì điều đó 😉
t.zh_CN: 喝一杯白开水，你的身体会很感谢你的 😉

en: Lead an active lifestyle and drink water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Pairs an active lifestyle with regular water intake.

t.ar: اتبع أسلوب حياة نشط واشرب الماء!
t.da: Før en aktiv livsstil og drik vand!
t.en: Lead an active lifestyle and drink water!
t.es: ¡Lleva un estilo de vida activo y bebe agua!
t.fr: Adopte un mode de vie actif et bois de l'eau!
t.hi: सक्रिय जीवनशैली अपनाओ और पानी पियो!
t.id: Jalani gaya hidup aktif dan minum air!
t.it: Conduci una vita attiva e bevi tanta acqua!
t.ja: 活発な生活を送って水を飲みましょう！
t.ms: Amalkan cara hidup aktif dan minum air!
t.nb: Ha en aktiv livsstil og drikk vann!
t.nl: Leef een actieve levensstijl en drink water!
t.pl: Prowadź aktywny tryb życia i pij wodę!
t.pt_BR: Leve um estilo de vida ativo e beba água!
t.ru: Веди активный образ жизни и пей воду!
t.sv: Ha en aktiv livsstil och drick vatten!
t.vi: Hướng đến một lối sống tích cực và hãy tích cực uống nước!
t.zh_CN: 坚持积极生活方式，多喝水！

en: To send email, please set up an account in the iOS Mail app
context:
Surface: Settings → Contact / feedback flow — error alert when the user taps a "Contact us" / "Suggest a feature" entry but the iOS Mail app has no email account configured.
  Type: error message.
  Context: iOS's MFMailComposeViewController cannot present without a configured email account; this alert instructs the user to add an account in the standard iOS Mail app. Tone is polite and action-oriented. "iOS Mail app" refers to Apple's built-in Mail.app.

t.ar: لإرسال البريد الإلكتروني، يُرجى إعداد حساب في تطبيق Mail على iOS
t.da: Hvis du vil sende en e-mail, skal du tilføje din e-mail-konto til standard iOS Mail-appen
t.de: Um eine E-Mail zu senden, fügen Sie bitte Ihr E-Mail-Konto zur Standard-iOS-Mailapp hinzu
t.en: To send email, please set up an account in the iOS Mail app
t.es: Para enviar correos, añada una cuenta en la aplicación Mail de iOS.
t.fr: Pour envoyer un e-mail, veuillez configurer un compte dans l'application Mail
t.hi: ईमेल भेजने के लिए, कृपया iOS के Mail ऐप में एक खाता सेट करें
t.id: Silakan tambahkan akun email ke aplikasi "Mail" bawaan iOS untuk mengirim email
t.it: Per inviare email, configuri un account nell'app Mail di iOS
t.ja: メールを送信するには、標準のiOSのメールアプリにメールアカウントを追加してください
t.ko: 이메일을 보내려면 표준 iOS 메일 앱에 이메일 계정을 추가해주세요
t.ms: Sila tambah akaun e-mel ke aplikasi standar iOS "E-mel" untuk menghantar surat
t.nb: For å sende e-post må du legge til en e-postkonto i iOS Mail-appen.
t.nl: Voeg uw e-mailaccount toe aan de standaard iOS Mail-app om e-mails te kunnen versturen
t.pl: Aby wysłać wiadomość e-mail, proszę dodać swoje konto mailowe do standardowej aplikacji pocztowej iOS
t.pt_BR: Para enviar e-mails, adicione sua conta de e-mail ao aplicativo Mail padrão do iOS
t.ru: Пожалуйста, добавьте учётную запись почты в приложение «Почта» на iPhone, чтобы отправлять письма
t.sv: För att skicka e-post, lägg till ditt e-postkonto i den vanliga iOS Mail-appen
t.tr: Lütfen e-posta göndermek için standart iOS "E-posta"uygulamasına bir e-posta hesabı ekleyin
t.vi: Để gửi email, vui lòng thêm tài khoản email vào trong ứng dụng Mail tiêu chuẩn của iOS
t.zh_CN: 为了发送电子邮件，请将您的邮件账户添加到标准的 iOS 邮件应用。

en: Time for another glass of water 😊
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Friendly nudge that it's time to drink another glass of water. Includes a smiley ":)" — preserve a culturally appropriate playful smiley in translation.
  Tone: playful.

t.ar: حان الوقت لكوب آخر من الماء 😊
t.da: Tid til endnu et glas vand 😊
t.de: Zeit dafür, ein weiteres Glas Wasser zu trinken 😊
t.en: Time for another glass of water 😊
t.es: Hora para otro vaso de agua 😊
t.fr: C'est le moment de boire un autre verre d'eau 😊
t.hi: एक और गिलास पानी का समय हो गया 😊
t.it: È il momento di bere un altro bicchiere d'acqua 😊
t.ja: もう一杯の水を飲む時間です😊
t.ko: 물을 한 잔 더 마실 시간입니다 😊
t.nb: På tide med nok et glass vann 😊
t.nl: Tijd voor nog een glas water 😊
t.pt_BR: Hora de tomar outro copo de água 😊
t.ru: Пора выпить ещё один стакан воды 😊
t.sv: Dags för ännu ett glas vatten 😊
t.tr: Bir bardak daha su içme zamanı😊
t.vi: Đã đến lúc uống một cốc nước khác 😊
t.zh_CN: 是时候该再喝一杯水了 😊

en: You don’t have any active subscriptions yet. Subscribe to unlock all the app’s features and drink more water 😉
context:
Surface: Subscription / paywall flow — alert body shown after the user taps "Restore purchases" and no eligible past purchases are found.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Informs the user that no active subscription was restored and gently invites them to subscribe to unlock all premium features. Includes a winking emoji 😉 — preserve it as is (universal emoji, do not replace with a localised alternative).
  Tone: playful (apologetic but warm).

t.ar: ليس لديك أي اشتراكات نشطة. اشترك للاستفادة من جميع ميزات التطبيق وشرب المزيد من الماء 😉
t.da: Du har ingen aktive abonnementer endnu. Tegn et abonnement for at bruge alle appens funktioner og drikke mere vand 😉
t.de: Sie haben kein laufendes Abonnement. Mit Abonnement können Sie alle Funktionen einer App nutzen und mehr Wasser trinken 😉
t.en: You don’t have any active subscriptions yet. Subscribe to unlock all the app’s features and drink more water 😉
t.es: Actualmente no cuentas con ninguna suscripción. Puedes suscribirte para usar todas las funciones de una aplicación y beber más agua 😉
t.fr: Vous n'avez aucun abonnement en cours ; vous pouvez vous abonner pour utiliser toutes les fonctions de l'application et boire plus d'eau 😉
t.hi: तुम्हारे पास अभी कोई चालू सदस्यता नहीं है। ऐप की सारी सुविधाएँ पाने और ज़्यादा पानी पीने के लिए सदस्यता लो 😉
t.id: Kamu belum punya langganan aktif. Daftar yuk biar bisa pakai semua fitur aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air 😉
t.it: Non hai ancora un abbonamento attivo. Abbonati per sbloccare tutte le funzioni dell'app e bere più acqua 😉
t.ja: 現在何も購読されていません。購読すればアプリの全機能が使えるので、もっと水を飲むことができます😉
t.ko: 현재 구독 중인 서비스가 없는 상태입니다. 앱의 모든 기능을 사용할 수 있도록 구독하시고 물을 더 많이 마셔보세요 😉
t.ms: Anda tidak mempunyai langganan, anda boleh mendaftar untuk menggunakan semua fungsi aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air 😉
t.nb: Du har ingen aktive abonnementer ennå. Abonner for å låse opp alle funksjonene i appen og drikke mer vann 😉
t.nl: Je hebt nog geen actief abonnement. Abonneer je om alle functies van de app te ontgrendelen en meer water te drinken 😉
t.pl: Nie masz aktualnej subskrypcji. Możesz skorzystać z subskrypcji, aby móc używać wszystkich funkcji aplikacji i pić więcej wody 😉
t.pt_BR: Você não tem nenhuma assinatura ativa, mas pode fazer uma para usar todas as funções do aplicativo e beber mais água 😉
t.ru: У тебя нет ни одной действующей подписки. Ты можешь оформить её, чтобы использовать все функции приложения и пить больше воды 😉
t.sv: Du har inga aktiva prenumerationer än. Prenumerera för att låsa upp alla appens funktioner och dricka mer vatten 😉
t.tr: Geçerli bir aboneliğiniz yok, uygulamanın tüm özelliklerini kullanmak ve daha fazla su içmek için abone olabilirsiniz 😉
t.vi: Bạn chưa có gói đăng ký nào đang hoạt động. Hãy đăng ký để mở khóa mọi tính năng và uống nhiều nước hơn 😉
t.zh_CN: 您当前还没有任何订阅。订阅后即可解锁应用的全部功能，畅饮更多水 😉

context:
Surface: app-wide — Default volumes screen row label; reusable container name across app, widget and watch.
  Type: container name.
  Context: Display name for a regular drinking glass used as a preset drink volume option. Lowercase noun. A smaller shot-sized glass uses a separate key `shotGlass`.
  Constraints: Keep short (single common word); use the everyday name for a drinking glass in the target language.

Surface: Tips stories format screen — share button label below a tip story card.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Tapping shares the currently displayed tip with friends via system share sheet.

Surface: Settings → Notifications sound picker / add-drink sound picker — sound option row title.
  Type: settings row title.
  Context: Display name for the "Water" notification sound preset (water-drop audio cue). Resolved via AppSounds.localizedTitle and paired with a `.caf` audio asset. Not the beverage water — purely the sound's name. Distinct from soundWater2 ("Plop"), a different water-themed tone.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for sound picker row.

en: Will you drink 8 glasses of water today?
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Rhetorical question challenging the user to drink the commonly cited "8 glasses of water" amount today. The "8 glasses" figure is a colloquial benchmark; keep the numeric reference intact.

t.ar: هل ستشرب 8 أكواب من الماء اليوم؟
t.da: Kan du drikke 8 glas vand i dag?
t.de: Kannst du 8 Gläser Wasser auch heute trinken?
t.en: Will you drink 8 glasses of water today?
t.es: ¿Vas a beber 8 vasos de agua hoy?
t.fr: Arriveras-tu à boire 8 verres d'eau aujourd'hui?
t.hi: क्या आज 8 गिलास पानी हो पाएगा?
t.id: Hari ini kamu akan minum 8 gelas air?
t.it: Oggi riuscirai a bere 8 bicchieri d'acqua?
t.ja: 今日は水を8杯飲めますか？
t.ms: Hari ini awak akan minum 8 gelas air?
t.nb: Kommer du til å drikke 8 glass vann i dag?
t.nl: Zal je vandaag 8 glazen water drinken?
t.pt_BR: Você vai beber 8 copos de água hoje?
t.ru: А сегодня ты выпьешь 8 стаканов воды?
t.sv: Kommer du att dricka 8 glas vatten idag?
t.vi: Bạn sẽ uống 8 cốc nước hôm nay chứ?

en: With our app, being healthy and fit is easy!
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro carousel — slide 1 (app intro) description, paired with tutTitle1.
  Type: tutorial step.
  Context: Subtitle on the very first carousel slide. Pitches the app as making a healthy and slim lifestyle effortless. "Slender" is body-positive framing tied to a healthy habit — translate with the equivalent positive lifestyle term in the target language; avoid clinical / weight-loss wording.

t.ar: مع تطبيقنا، سيصبح من السهل البقاء رشيقاً وبصحة جيدة!
t.da: Med vores app er det nemt at være sund og i form!
t.de: Mit unserer App ist es einfach, gesund und schlank zu sein!
t.en: With our app, being healthy and fit is easy!
t.es: Con nuestra app, estar sano y en forma es fácil.
t.fr: Avec notre application, être en forme et en bonne santé devient facile!
t.hi: हमारे ऐप से स्वस्थ और फिट रहना आसान है!
t.id: Dengan aplikasi kami, mudah untuk tetap sehat dan bugar!
t.it: Con la nostra app, essere sani e in forma è facile!
t.ja: 私たちのアプリを使えば、健康的でスリムでいるのは簡単です！
t.ko: 우리 앱을 이용하면 쉽게 건강하고 날씬해질 수 있어요!
t.ms: Dengan aplikasi kami, mudah untuk tetap sihat dan lampai!
t.nb: Med appen vår er det enkelt å være sunn og slank!
t.nl: Met onze app is gezond en fit zijn eenvoudig!
t.pl: Dzięki naszej aplikacji bycie zdrowym i w formie jest łatwe!
t.pt_BR: Com o nosso aplicativo, ser saudável e esbelto é fácil!
t.ru: С нашим приложением быть здоровым и стройным легко!
t.sv: Med vår app är det enkelt att vara frisk och i form!
t.tr: Uygulamamızla formda ve sağlıklı kalmak çok kolay!
t.vi: Với ứng dụng của chúng tôi, bạn sẽ trở nên khỏe mạnh và dễ dàng có vóc dáng thon gọn!
t.zh_CN: 使用我们的应用，轻松获得健康苗条的身材！

en: Drink water! Be healthy and happy!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Links drinking water with health and happiness.

t.da: Drik vand! Vær sund og glad!
t.de: Trinke Wasser! Ergänze die Reihe der gesunden Menschen!
t.en: Drink water! Be healthy and happy!
t.fr: Bois de l'eau! Sois en bonne santé et heureux!
t.hi: पानी पियो! स्वस्थ और खुश रहो!
t.id: Minum air! Gabunglah dengan orang yang sehat!
t.it: Bevi tanta acqua! Diventa sano e felice!
t.ja: 水を飲みましょう！健康でハッピーな人になりましょう！
t.ms: Minum air! Jadilah seperti orang yang sihat!
t.nb: Drikk vann! Vær sunn og glad!
t.nl: Drink water! Wees gezond en gelukkig!

en: Please sign in to your account again
context:
Surface: Authentication / session-expired flow — error alert shown when the stored credentials are no longer valid and the user must sign in again.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Tells the user their saved session / password is no longer accepted and they must re-enter account credentials. "Enter your account again" = sign in again, not "type your account name once more". Key name implies a wrong-password scenario but the user-facing text frames it as a session re-login prompt; translator should follow the value (sign-in-again wording), not the key name. Currently no live Swift call-sites; preserved for legacy / re-introduced auth flows.

t.ar: مع نقص المياه يعمل الدماغ والأوعية الدموية بشكل ضعيف. ولتفادي حدوث ذلك، حافظ على التوازن الطبيعي للماء.
t.da: Din hjerne og dine blodkar har brug for vand for at fungere godt - så husk at drikke vand i løbet af dagen.
t.de: Das Gehirn und die Gefäße funktionieren bei Wassermangel schlechter. Halt den Wasserhaushalt stabil, um dies zu vermeiden.
t.en: Your brain and blood vessels need water to work well, so stay hydrated through the day.
t.es: El cerebro y los vasos sanguíneos funcionan mal si les falta agua. Para impedir que esto ocurra, mantén el equilibrio hídrico normal.
t.fr: Ton cerveau et tes vaisseaux sanguins ont besoin d'eau pour bien fonctionner, alors pense à bien t'hydrater tout au long de la journée.
t.hi: पानी की कमी से दिमाग़ और नसें ठीक से काम नहीं करतीं। इसलिए दिनभर पानी पीते रहो।
t.id: Otak dan pembuluh darah tidak berfungsi dengan baik saat kekurangan air. Agar ini tidak terjadi, jaga keseimbangan air tetap normal.
t.it: Il cervello e i vasi funzionano male senza acqua. Per evitarlo tieniti idratato.
t.ja: 水が不足すると脳や血管の働きが鈍ります。一日を通してこまめに水分をとりましょう。
t.ko: 물이 부족하면 뇌와 혈관이 제대로 기능하지 못합니다. 이것을 막기 위해 정상적인 수분 균형을 유지하세요.
t.ms: Otak dan saluran darah tidak berfungsi dengan baik jika kekurangan air. Untuk mengelakkan ini, kekalkan keseimbangan air yang normal.
t.nb: Hjernen og blodårene dine trenger vann for å fungere godt, så drikk jevnlig gjennom dagen.
t.nl: Je hersenen en bloedvaten hebben water nodig om goed te werken. Drink daarom de hele dag door genoeg.
t.pl: Bez wody mózg i naczynia krwionośne słabo się spisują. By do tego nie dopuścić, utrzymuj właściwy bilans wodny.
t.pt_BR: Os vasos sanguíneos e cerebrais funcionam mal com a falta de água. Para evitar isso, mantenha-se bem hidratado ao longo do dia.
t.ru: Мозг и сосуды плохо функционируют при недостатке воды. Чтобы этого не происходило, поддерживай водный баланс в норме.
t.sv: Hjärnan och blodkärlen fungerar dåligt vid brist på vatten. För att förhindra att detta händer, behåll en normal vattenbalans.
t.tr: Su eksikliği olduğunda beyin ve kan damarları iyi çalışmaz, bunun olmaması için su dengeni normal tut.
t.vi: Não bộ và các mạch máu hoạt động kém khi thiếu nước. Để ngăn điều này xảy ra, hãy duy trì sự cân bằng bình thường của nước.
t.zh_CN: 大脑和血管都需要水分才能正常运转，记得一整天都补补水。

en: My Water Balance ­- Daily hydration tracker & water reminder
context:
Surface: App Store Connect listing — App name + subtitle on the product page.
  Type: App Store title.
  Context: Combined App Store app name "My Water Balance" plus a marketing subtitle describing the app as a hydration tracker and drink reminder. Note: separator between name and subtitle is a soft-hyphen (U+00AD, "­"), not a regular hyphen — preserve byte-for-byte in target locale or replace with locale-standard separator. Not used in app code — uploaded as ASC metadata.
  Constraints: ASC App Name field ≤30 chars; subtitle field ≤30 chars; full combined string used as legacy single-field title. Keep brand name "My Water Balance" untranslated as a proper noun.

t.ar: My Water Balance - تتبع مقدار المياه اليومي وتذكير بشرب المياه
t.da: Min vandbalance – Tracker af daglig hydrering og påmindelser om at drikke vand

t.en: My Water Balance ­- Daily hydration tracker & water reminder
t.es: Mi equilibrio hídrico - Seguimiento de tu hidratación diaria y recordatorio de que hay que beber agua
t.fr: Mon équilibre en eau - traqueur quotidien d'hydratation & rappel pour boire de l'eau
t.hi: My Water Balance - हाइड्रेशन ट्रैकर और रिमाइंडर
t.id: My Water Balance adalah pelacak air. Catatan dan kontrol keseimbangan air. Pengingat nyaman untuk minum air. Pelajari tentang keseimbangan air dalam tubuh.
t.it: La mia acqua - il tracker dell'acqua. Il conteggio e il controllo del bilancio d'acqua. Un avviso comodo di bere l'acqua.

t.ko: «My Water» 물 균형 트래커. 간편한 물 마시기 알림. 몸의 수분 균형을 한눈에 확인하세요.
t.ms: Air saya, penjejak air. Rakaman dan kawalan keseimbangan air. Peringatan selesa untuk minum air. Ketahui semua tentang keseimbangan air dalam badan.
t.nb: Min vannbalanse - daglig sporing av hydrering og påminnelse om å drikke vann
t.pl: Mój bilans wodny - wskaźnik dziennego nawodnienia i system przypomnień o piciu wody

en: Drink a little more water and you’ll reach your goal!

context:

  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~12 chars) for narrow tab / segmented control.

Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for the strong alcohol category in the standard beverage catalog (covers spirits like vodka, whisky). Title-case per beverage display name convention.

Surface: Statistics screens — date header for entries logged the previous day (MainStat day list, StatisticByDays, BeverageDetailStatistic, OneDayStatistic edit row, DateEditView). Paired with "Today" as the two relative-date labels.
  Type: date header / relative day label.
  Context: Capitalized "Yesterday" used as a relative date label in place of an absolute date. Title-case to match other date headers in the statistics list.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) to fit alongside formatted dates in list headers.

Surface: Share / invite flow — secondary CTA / encouragement label.
  Type: prompt / CTA label.
  Context: Encourages the user to share content (achievement / app invite) with friends. Currently unreferenced in Swift code but retained for legacy / future use.
  Constraints: There is a literal zero-width space (U+200B) after the leading "S" in the source value — preserve it byte-for-byte; do not normalize away. Trailing exclamation is part of the celebratory tone.
  Tone: encouraging.

context:

Surface: Onboarding intro / login + registration screen / Settings → Account header / Friends list sign-in prompt — button label / link title.

en: 8 glasses of water a day and you’re in good shape!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Suggests 8 glasses of water per day (heuristic intake) keeps the user in good shape.

t.ar: 8 أكواب مياه يوميًا وستكون في حالة طيبة!
t.da: 8 glas vand om dagen, og du er i god form!
t.de: Nur 8 Gläser pro Tag und du bist fit!
t.en: 8 glasses of water a day and you’re in good shape!
t.es: ¡8 vasos de agua al día y estarás en forma!
t.fr: 8 verres d'eau par jour pour être en forme!
t.hi: दिन में 8 गिलास पानी और तुम बढ़िया फॉर्म में!
t.id: Hanya 8 gelas air sehari dan kamu tetap kuat!
t.it: 8 bicchieri d'acqua al giorno e ti sentirai in forma!
t.ja: 一日グラス8杯分の水を飲めば順調です！
t.ms: Hanya 8 gelas air sehari dan awak kekal kuat!
t.nb: 8 glass vann om dagen, og du føler deg bra!
t.nl: 8 glazen water per dag en je bent in goede vorm!
t.pl: 8 szklanek wody dziennie i jesteś w dobrej formie!
t.pt_BR: 8 copos de água por dia e você fica em forma!
t.ru: Всего 8 стаканов воды в день и ты в форме!
t.sv: 8 glas vatten om dagen och du mår bra!
t.tr: Günde sadece 8 bardak su ve formdasın!
t.vi: 8 cốc nước mỗi ngày và bạn sẽ có vóc dáng đẹp!

t.vi: Thống kê tất cả thời gian

en: Don't forget to drink a glass of water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.

  Context: Reminder phrased as a "don't forget" nudge to drink another glass of water.
  Constraints: Keep within ~80 characters to fit a single-line iOS notification banner.

t.ar: لا تنس شرب كوب من الماء!
t.da: Glem ikke at drikke et glas vand!
t.de: Vergiss nicht, ein Glas Wasser zu trinken!
t.en: Don't forget to drink a glass of water!
t.es: ¡No te olvides de beber un vaso de agua!

t.ja: 水を一杯飲むのを忘れないように！
t.ko: 물 한 잔을 마시는 것을 잊지 마세요!
t.nb: Ikke glem å drikke et glass vann!
t.nl: Vergeet niet om een glas water te drinken!

t.sv: Glöm inte att dricka ett glas vatten!
t.vi: Đừng quên uống một cốc nước nhé!

en: Well done, you've earned all the awards!
context:
Surface: Main screen awards section / Awards screen header — celebratory line shown when the user has unlocked every available award.
  Type: paragraph (celebratory).
  Context: Praise message confirming the user has collected the full set of awards. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with allAwardsM for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.ar: أحسنت! لقد حصلت على كل الجوائز!

t.sv: Bra jobbat, du har fått alla utmärkelser!
t.vi: Thật tuyệt, bạn đã nhận được tất cả phần thưởng!

en: Pick a special tone for notifications so you don’t miss anything
context:
Surface: Paywall — "Notifications sound" feature card description (subscription, onboarding subscription, horizontal/vertical benefits, system-style paywall).
  Type: paywall feature card description.
  Context: Promotional one-liner under the "Notifications sound" feature title — pitches custom notification tones as a premium benefit so users do not miss reminders.
  Tone: Promotional but warm.

t.ar: اختر نغمة خاصة للإشعارات حتى لا تفوتك أي تذكير
t.da: Vælg en særlig tone til notifikationer, så du ikke går glip af noget

t.fr: Choisis un son spécial pour les notifications afin de ne rien manquer

t.ja: 何も見逃すことが無いように、通知に向けてスペシャルなトーンを選択しましょう

t.pt_BR: Escolha um som especial para suas notificações para ter certeza de que não perderá nada
t.ru: Выбери особый звук уведомлений, чтобы не пропустить его

t.vi: Chọn một giai điệu đặc biệt cho thông báo để chắc chắn bạn sẽ không bỏ lỡ bất kỳ điều gì

en: Drink water if you want to be healthy!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.

t.da: Drik vand, hvis du vil være sund!

en: Live an active and healthy life, drink more water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Pairs active and healthy life with drinking more water.

t.ar: عش حياة نشطة وصحية، اشرب المزيد من الماء!
t.da: Lev et aktivt og sundt liv, drik mere vand!
t.de: Lebe gesund und aktiv, trinke Wasser!
t.en: Live an active and healthy life, drink more water!
t.es: Vive una vida activa y saludable, ¡bebe más agua!
t.fr: Mène une vie active et saine, bois plus d'eau!
t.hi: सक्रिय और स्वस्थ जीवन जियो, ज़्यादा पानी पियो!
t.id: Jalani gaya hidup sehat dan aktif, minum air!
t.it: Conduci una vita sana e attiva e bevi tanta acqua!
t.ja: 活発で健康的な生活を送って、もっと水を飲みましょう！
t.ko: 건강하고 활동적으로 생활하고 물을 더 마셔요!
t.ms: Amalkan cara hidup sihat dan aktif, minum air!
t.nb: Lev et aktivt og sunt liv og drikk mer vann!
t.nl: Leef een actief en gezond leven, drink meer water!
t.pl: Prowadź aktywne i zdrowe życie, pij więcej wody!
t.pt_BR: Tenha uma vida ativa e saudável. Beba mais água!
t.ru: Веди здоровый и активный образ жизни, пей воду!
t.sv: Lev ett aktivt och hälsosamt liv och drick mer vatten!
t.tr: Sağlıklı ve aktif bir yaşam tarzı sürdür, su iç!
t.vi: Sống một cuộc sống khỏe mạnh và tích cực - Uống nhiều nước hơn!
t.zh_CN: 积极健康生活还要多喝水！

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for the "Mors" beverage (traditional fruit / berry drink, typically cranberry) in the standard beverage catalog. Title-case per beverage display name convention; English value describes it as a cranberry drink for clarity.

t.ja: クランベリー 飲料

en: This email is already in use
context:
Surface: Login / registration screen — server validation error message shown when the entered email is already registered to another account.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Server-side error mapped from the `email_taken` API error code. Tells the user the email address they entered is already in use; they should sign in or use a different address.

t.da: Denne e-mailadresse er allerede i brug
t.de: Diese Adresse ist bereits im Gebrauch
t.en: This email is already in use
t.es: Esa dirección ya está en uso
t.fr: Cette adresse e-mail est déjà utilisée
t.hi: यह ईमेल पहले से इस्तेमाल में है
t.ja: このメールアドレスは既に使用されています。
t.nb: Denne adressen er allerede i bruk
t.nl: Dit e-mailadres is al in gebruik
t.pt_BR: Este e-mail já está em uso
t.vi: Địa chỉ này đã được sử dụng

context:
Surface: Onboarding → Notifications interval screen / Settings → Notifications — interval row unit suffix label for exactly 1 hour.
  Type: row value suffix (unit).
  Context: Singular hour suffix used only for exactly 60 minutes / 1 hour. Other hour-based intervals use TwoHours or FiveHours.
  Constraints: Lowercase, no trailing period; keep short to fit a compact row value.

Surface: app-wide — app brand name. Used as local notification title (NotificationsService), New Year digest screen logo label, and tab title (lowercased + capitalized).
  Type: brand name.
  Context: The app's brand name "My Water". DO NOT translate — preserve the English brand string exactly. In target language wrap in locale-appropriate quotation marks ("My Water" / «My Water» / „My Water" / etc.) only when the surrounding copy emphasizes the brand; otherwise keep the bare brand string. Brand spans the iOS, Android, watchOS and widget apps.
  Constraints: Brand string is frozen — do not localize the words "My" or "Water".

Surface: app-wide — VoiceOver accessibility label for the navigation bar back button (UIViewController+NavigationButtons, SubscriptionWoman, accessibility identifier helper).
  Type: accessibility label.
  Context: Noun. Spoken by VoiceOver when focus reaches the standard back / dismiss button at the top-left of a screen. Not visible on screen.
  Constraints: Single short word; no trailing period.

Surface: Settings → Units of measure picker / onboarding measurement-system selector — option row label.
  Type: settings row title.
  Context: Display name for the US customary system option (fl oz / lb) in the volume / weight units selector. Resolved via VolumeUnitsOfMeasure. Not a beverage.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for selector row.
1 month

Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
  Type: achievement title.
  Context: Award id=12 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after logging drinks for 21 days (paired with ach_descr12); celebrates consistency.
  Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words for compact card display).

t.vi: Bậc thầy về độ ổn định

en: Share that you reached your goal three times
context:
Surface: Awards screen / award detail card — achievement description below achievement name.
  Type: achievement description.
  Context: Achievement unlocked after the user shares, three times, that they completed their daily water goal. Here "your goal" means the accomplishment of reaching the daily goal ("I hit my goal today"), NOT the goal target / amount (e.g. 2000 ml). Do not render it as sharing the target number; keep the "reached / completed" predicate, since a bare "share your goal" wrongly reads as sharing the target. One-time version: ach_descr5.

t.ar: شارك أنك حققت هدفك ثلاث مرات
t.da: Del tre gange, at du nåede dit mål
t.de: Erzähle dreimal, dass du dein Tagesziel erreicht hast
t.en: Share that you reached your goal three times
t.es: Alardea tres veces de haber alcanzado tu meta
t.fr: Partage trois fois que tu as atteint ton objectif
t.hi: तुमने लक्ष्य पूरा किया, यह तीन बार शेयर करो
t.id: Pamer kalau kamu capai targetmu tiga kali
t.it: Racconta tre volte che hai raggiunto l'obiettivo
t.ja: 目標を3回達成したことを 友達に知らせる
t.ko: 목표를 세 번 달성했다고 자랑해 보세요
t.ms: Kongsi yang awak capai matlamat tiga kali
t.nb: Fortell at du nådde målet ditt tre ganger
t.nl: Deel drie keer dat je je doel hebt gehaald
t.pl: Trzy razy udostępnij, że osiągnąłeś swój cel
t.pt_BR: Conte que você atingiu sua meta três vezes
t.sv: Dela att du nått ditt mål tre gånger
t.vi: Khoe rằng bạn đã đạt mục tiêu ba lần
t.zh_CN: 三次分享 你已达成目标

context:
Surface: Goal calculation / profile-dependent feature — alert shown when the feature requires the user's profile data (weight, sex, age, etc.) but the user has not yet entered it.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Asks the user to fill in their profile information in the app before the feature can be used. "In the app" refers to in-app profile settings. Tone is polite. Currently no live Swift call-sites; preserved for legacy / re-introduced profile-required flows.

t.de: Bitte gib deine Daten in der App ein
t.es: Por favor introduce tu información en la aplicación
t.hi: कृपया ऐप में अपने बारे में जानकारी दर्ज करें
t.id: Silakan masukkan informasi pribadi kamu di aplikasi
t.it: La preghiamo di inserire le informazioni su di Lei nell'app
t.ja: アプリにご自身の情報を入力してください
t.ms: Sila masukkan maklumat peribadi anda dalam aplikasi
t.nl: Voer informatie over jezelf in de app in.
t.pl: Proszę wprowadzić informacje o sobie do aplikacji
t.pt_BR: Por favor, insira as informações sobre você no aplicativo
t.ru: Пожалуйста, введите данные о себе в приложении
t.sv: Ange information om dig själv i appen
t.vi: Vui lòng nhập thông tin về bản thân bạn trong ứng dụng
t.zh_CN: 请在应用中输入有关您自己的信息

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for chicory / decaf coffee in the standard beverage catalog (key spelling "Cicoriy" is a legacy identifier — do not rename; user-facing value is the descriptive English "Decaf coffee"). Title-case per beverage display name convention.

t.ja: カフェイン抜きコーヒー

context:
Surface: app-wide.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Generic completion / dismiss action used in pickers, editors, and modal screens to confirm changes and close the screen. Sentence-case.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
  Type: section row label / sound preset name.
  Context: Display name of the "Bubble" notification sound preset (a bubbling water sfx). Onomatopoeic — pick the locale's natural noun for a bubble / bubbling sound.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

en: Take another step towards your goal!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Brief encouragement inviting the user to take one more step (one more drink) toward the daily water goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.da: Tag endnu et skridt mod dit mål!
t.de: Mach noch einen Schritt Richtung Ziel!
t.en: Take another step towards your goal!
t.es: ¡Da un paso más hacia tu meta!
t.fr: Fais un pas de plus vers ton objectif!
t.hi: अपने लक्ष्य की ओर एक और कदम बढ़ाओ!
t.it: Fai ancora un passo verso la meta!
t.ja: 目標に向けてあと一歩 進みましょう！
t.ms: Ambil langkah lagi ke arah matlamat!
t.nb: Ta enda et skritt mot målet ditt!
t.nl: Zet nog een stap naar je doel!
t.pl: Zrób kolejny krok na drodze do swojego celu!
t.pt_BR: Dê outro passo em direção ao seu objetivo!
t.ru: Сделай ещё один шаг к своей цели!
t.sv: Ta ytterligare ett steg mot ditt mål!
t.tr: Hedefine doğru bir adım daha at!
t.vi: Tiến thêm một bước nữa đến mục tiêu của bạn!

en: Water is the source of life!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Short aphorism-style reminder emphasising the importance of water for life.

t.de: Wasser ist die Quelle des Lebens!
t.en: Water is the source of life!
t.es: ¡El agua es la fuente de la vida!
t.fr: L'eau, c'est la source de la vie!
t.nl: Water is de bron van leven!
t.pt_BR: A água é a fonte da vida!
t.vi: Nước là cội nguồn của sự sống!

context:
Surface: Widget accessory rectangular view / Controls picker preview — placeholder drink name for the water entry; also used as inline lowercase beverage form in drink coefficient sentences.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Lowercase form of the "Water" beverage name for inline mid-sentence use and widget / watch quick-add preview labels. Lowercase per i18n style for non-proper-noun beverage names; pairs with title-case "Water".

Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker / paywall beverage showcase — beverage row title.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for the soda beverage (carbonated soft drink) in the standard catalog. Title-case per beverage display name convention.

en: Cool, I achieved  \"[%s]\" in \"My water app\"! [%s] #mywater

t.ar: رائع، لقد حققت \"[%s]\" في تطبيق \"My water\"! [%s]#mywater

t.fr: Cool, j'ai obtenu le succès « [%s] » dans l'application « Mon eau » ! [%s] #mywater

t.pt_BR: Legal, eu consegui \"[%s]\" no \"aplicativo My water\"! [%s] #mywater
t.ru: Ура, я получил достижение \"[%s]\" в приложении \"Моя вода\"! [%s] #mywater

en: No Internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
context:
Surface: Generic offline / no-network error alert or inline message shown when an action requiring the network fails because the device has no Internet connection.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Standard offline copy — informs the user that the device is offline and asks them to check their connection and retry the request. Tone is polite and action-oriented. Sibling keys "connectionErrorTitle" / "connectionErrorSubtitle" carry the split title+subtitle variant used in the empty-state on the Friends screen; this key is the single-line variant. Currently no live Swift call-sites for this exact key; preserved for legacy / re-introduced offline alerts.

t.ar: لا يوجد اتصال بالإنترنت. يرجى التحقق من اتصالك ثم المحاولة مرة أخرى.
t.da: Ingen internetforbindelse. Kontroller venligst din forbindelse, og prøv igen.
t.de: Keine Internetverbindung. Bitte überprüfen Sie Ihre Verbindung und wiederholen Sie Ihre Anfrage.
t.en: No Internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
t.es: No hay conexión a internet. Por favor comprueba tu conexión y repite la solicitud.
t.fr: Pas de connexion Internet. Veuillez vérifier votre connexion et réessayer.
t.hi: इंटरनेट कनेक्शन नहीं है। कृपया अपना कनेक्शन जाँचें और फिर कोशिश करें।
t.id: Tidak ada akses internet. Periksa koneksi dan ulangi permintaan.
t.it: Nessuna connessione internet. La preghiamo di controllare la connessione e riprovare.
t.ja: インターネットに接続されていません。接続を確認して、再リクエストしてください。
t.ko: 인터넷에 연결되어 있지 않습니다. 연결을 확인한 후 다시 시도해 주세요.
t.ms: Tiada sambungan internet. Sila semak sambungan dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Ingen internettforbindelse. Kontroller tilkoblingen og prøv igjen.
t.nl: Geen internetverbinding. Controleer je verbinding en probeer het opnieuw.
t.pl: Brak połączenia z internetem. Proszę sprawdzić połączenie i spróbować ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Sem conexão à internet. Por favor, verifique a sua conexão e tente de novo.
t.ru: Нет доступа к интернету. Пожалуйста, проверьте соединение и повторите запрос.
t.sv: Ingen internetanslutning. Kontrollera din anslutning och försök igen.
t.tr: İnternet erişimi yok. Lütfen bağlantınızı kontrol edip tekrar deneyin.
t.vi: Không có kết nối Internet. Vui lòng kiểm tra kết nối của bạn và lặp lại yêu cầu của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 无网络连接。请检查网络连接后重试。

context:
Surface: Paywall — premium benefit row title used in the paywall benefit list.
  Type: paywall benefit title.
  Context: Promotes the past-day drink logging feature ("backfill drinks you forgot to log"). NOT a forgot-password prompt — this is a premium feature entry point that lets the user add drinks to previous days.
  Constraints: Keep concise to fit a benefit row title.

t.da: Har du glemt at registrere en drik?
t.fr: Tu as oublié d'enregistrer quelque chose?
t.ja: 飲み物を記録し忘れましたか？
t.nb: Har du glemt å legge til noe?
t.vi: Bạn quên ghi lại điều gì đó?

en: Water can boost your metabolism. For a healthier lifestyle, drink more water.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
  Type: tip.
  Context: Educational hydration tip — drinking water can support metabolism and a healthier lifestyle.

t.ar: يمكن للماء أن يعزز عملية الأيض لديك. لأسلوب حياة أكثر صحة، اشرب المزيد من الماء.
t.da: Vand kan sætte gang i dit stofskifte. Drik mere vand for en sundere livsstil.
t.de: Wasser kann deinen Stoffwechsel ankurbeln. Für einen gesünderen Lebensstil trink mehr Wasser.
t.en: Water can boost your metabolism. For a healthier lifestyle, drink more water.
t.es: El agua puede aumentar tu metabolismo. Para un estilo de vida más saludable, aumenta tu consumo de agua.
t.fr: L'eau peut stimuler ton métabolisme. Pour un mode de vie plus sain, bois plus d'eau.
t.hi: पानी मेटाबॉलिज़्म बढ़ा सकता है। सेहतमंद जीवनशैली के लिए ज़्यादा पानी पियो।
t.id: Air dapat meningkatkan metabolismemu. Untuk gaya hidup yang lebih sehat, perbanyak minum air.
t.it: L'acqua può stimolare il tuo metabolismo. Per uno stile di vita più sano, aumenta il tuo consumo di acqua.
t.ja: 水は新陳代謝を高めてくれます。より健康的なライフスタイルのために、もっと水を飲みましょう。
t.ko: 물은 신진대사를 촉진할 수 있어요. 더 건강한 생활을 위해 물을 더 마셔요.
t.ms: Air boleh meningkatkan metabolisme awak. Untuk gaya hidup yang lebih sihat, minum lebih banyak air.
t.nb: Vann kan øke stoffskiftet ditt. For en sunnere livsstil, drikk mer vann.
t.nl: Water kan je stofwisseling stimuleren. Drink meer water voor een gezondere levensstijl.
t.pl: Woda może przyspieszyć twój metabolizm. Dla zdrowszego stylu życia zwiększ spożycie wody.
t.pt_BR: A água pode impulsionar o seu metabolismo. Para um estilo de vida mais saudável, aumente a sua ingestão de água.
t.ru: Вода может улучшить твой обмен веществ. Для более здорового образа жизни пей больше воды.
t.sv: Vatten kan öka din ämnesomsättning. Drick mer vatten för en hälsosammare livsstil.
t.tr: Su, metabolizmanı hızlandırabilir. Daha sağlıklı bir yaşam için daha fazla su iç.
t.vi: Nước có thể tăng cường chuyển hóa của bạn. Để có lối sống khỏe mạnh hơn, hãy tăng lượng nước tiêu thụ.
t.zh_CN: 水能促进新陈代谢。想要更健康的生活，就多喝点水吧。

context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen and Settings → Help — "Restore purchases" button used to recover previously bought subscriptions on a new device or after reinstall.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative phrase. Tapping triggers the App Store / Apphud restore-purchases flow. Standard iOS app store terminology — translate as the equivalent platform-conventional phrase ("Restore purchases", not "Renew" or "Reactivate").
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~20 chars) — fits a single-line CTA button.

Surface: Account view / Account editing screen / login + registration form — field section header, placeholder and accessibility label for the username (login) text field.
  Type: form field label.
  Context: Noun. Label for the account username / login field — the user's unique handle used to sign in (distinct from `userName`, which is the display name). Displayed uppercased in some surfaces.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) — fits a form section header and text-field placeholder.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Combined achievement acknowledgment and praise for reaching today's water goal. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text4_10F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.de: Du hast es geschafft! Gut gemacht!
t.ja: やりましたね、よく出来ました！
t.nb: Du har gjort det. Godt jobba!
t.nl: Het is je gelukt, goed gedaan!
t.sv: Du har klarat det. Bra jobbat!
t.vi: Bạn đã làm được - tốt lắm!

en: Your password must be at least 6 characters
context:
Surface: Login / registration screen — server validation error message shown when the entered password is too short.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Server-side error mapped from the `short_password` API error code. Tells the user their password is too short and must be at least 6 characters.

t.en: Your password must be at least 6 characters
t.ru: Пароль должен содержать не менее 6 символов

en: One more glass of water won’t hurt!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Playful nudge that an additional glass of water won't hurt — encourages logging another drink.
  Tone: playful.

t.ar: كوب آخر من الماء لن يضرك!
t.da: Et glas vand mere skader ikke!
t.de: Noch ein Glas Wasser schadet nicht!
t.en: One more glass of water won’t hurt!
t.es: ¡Un vaso más de agua no te hará daño!
t.fr: Un verre d'eau supplémentaire ne peut pas faire de mal!
t.hi: एक और गिलास पानी नुकसान नहीं पहुँचाएगा!
t.it: Un bicchiere d’acqua in più non fa mai male!
t.ja: もう一杯水を飲んでも損はありませんよ！
t.ko: 물 한 잔 더 마셔도 괜찮습니다!
t.nb: Et glass vann til skader ikke!
t.nl: Één glas water meer kan geen kwaad!
t.pl: Jeszcze jedna szklanka wody nie zaszkodzi!
t.pt_BR: Mais um copo de água não vai fazer mal!
t.ru: Ещё один стакан воды не повредит!
t.sv: Ännu ett glas vatten skadar inte!
t.tr: Fazladan bir bardak su zarar vermez!
t.vi: Thêm một cốc nước sẽ không gây hại!

context:
Surface: Settings / Paywall — toast / alert message shown after the user taps "Restore purchases" and at least one previous purchase is successfully restored to the current Apple ID.
  Type: confirmation message.
  Context: Confirms to the user that their previously bought subscription(s) have been re-applied to this install. Key name contains a typo ("Successed" instead of "Succeeded") — legacy identifier, do not rename.
  Constraints: Keep short — fits in a toast / alert body.

t.es: Las compras se han recuperado con éxito
t.hi: खरीद को सफ़लतापूर्वक रिस्टोर कर दिया गया
t.ja: 購入が無事リストアされました
t.vi: Đã khôi phục thành công giao dịch mua

en: Don't let us down, reach your goal today!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Light teasing partner-voice nudge ("don't let us down") asking the user to reach today's water goal.
  Constraints: Keep within ~80 characters to fit a single-line iOS notification banner.
  Tone: Light teasing — keep the friendly partner-voice register, do not turn it into a guilt trip.

t.da: Skuf os ikke, nå dit mål i dag!
t.de: Lass uns nicht im Stich, erreiche das Tagesziel heute!
t.en: Don't let us down, reach your goal today!
t.es: No nos decepciones, ¡alcanza hoy tu meta!
t.fr: Ne nous laisse pas tomber, atteins ton objectif aujourd'hui!
t.hi: हमें निराश मत करो, आज अपना लक्ष्य पूरा करो!
t.id: Jangan kecewakan kami, capai targetmu hari ini!
t.it: Non ci deludere, raggiungi il tuo obiettivo oggi!
t.ja: ガッカリさせないで、目標を達成しましょう！
t.ko: 실망시키지 마요, 오늘 목표를 달성해 봐요!
t.ms: Jangan kecewakan kami, capai matlamat hari ini!
t.nb: Ikke skuff oss, nå målet ditt i dag!
t.nl: Stel ons niet teleur, haal vandaag je doel!
t.pl: Nie zawiedź nas, osiągnij dziś swój cel!
t.pt_BR: Não nos decepcione, alcance sua meta hoje!
t.ru: Не подведи нас, достигни цели сегодня!
t.sv: Gör oss inte besvikna, nå ditt mål idag!
t.tr: Bizi hayal kırıklığına uğratma, bugün hedefine ulaş!
t.vi: Đừng làm chúng tôi thất vọng, hãy đạt mục tiêu hôm nay nhé!
t.zh_CN: 别让我们失望，今天达成目标哦！

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal.
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Praise affirming that today's water intake is a good result. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_15M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.da: Godt klaret! Flot indsats i dag!
t.fr: Bien joué! Voilà un excellent résultat!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे! आज बढ़िया काम किया!
t.it: Ottimo lavoro! È proprio un buon risultato!
t.ja: よくできました！ 今日はいい結果ですね！

context:
Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
  Type: achievement title.
  Context: Award id=9 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after reaching the daily goal seven times (paired with ach_descr9). Celebratory exclamation is intentional.
  Constraints: Keep short — this one is a full short phrase, OK to keep as is.

t.vi: Cơ thể của bạn nói cảm ơn!

context:
Surface: Account header (HeaderAccountCell) — prefix label shown above a user stat such as "In the application: 14 days" / "In the application: 3 months".
  Type: section header / stat label prefix.
  Context: Standalone label describing the "time since install" metric on the user's account header. Concatenated at runtime with a localized plural day / month value (dayPlural / monthPlural) — reads in target language as "In the application 14 days" / "In the application 3 months". Translate as the leading phrase that introduces an elapsed-since-install duration.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤25 chars) — fits as a label preceding a number; no trailing punctuation (runtime appends value).

Surface: Awards screen / Awards header / Main screen — trailing word of the gendered awards count sentence (AwardsViewModel, HeaderAwardsCellViewModel, MainViewModel).
  Type: sentence fragment / word.
  Context: Last word of a runtime-composed sentence with two numeric values, rendered as e.g. "I got 5 of 13 awards!". Concatenated in Swift as "<haveAward1M|F> <gotCount> <of> <totalCount> <haveAward2>". Translator must shape this fragment so the full sentence reads naturally in target language when placed after a number (singular / plural handled by sibling keys haveAward1M / haveAward1F if needed); exclamation is intentional (celebratory tone).
  Constraints: No leading space; keep short — runtime appends after a number.
  Tone: celebratory.

Surface: Beverage catalog row title and drink-name formatter source key.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for an energy drink in the standard beverage catalog (`BeveragesManager`) and `BeverageNameDisplayFormat`. Sentence case per i18n style for non-proper-noun beverage names.

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
  Type: section row label / sound preset name.
  Context: Display name of the "Magic" notification sound preset (a sparkly / chime-like sfx). Translate as the locale's natural noun evoking a magical / sparkle sound.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
  Type: section row label / sound preset name.
  Context: Display name of the "Message" notification sound preset (a phone / messenger-style alert tone). Key is "soundCall" but the user-facing label is "Message" — use the locale's natural noun for an incoming message / chat notification sound.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

context:
Surface: Add drink / drink-volume input flow — form-validation message shown when the user tries to confirm a drink with an empty volume value.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Asks the user to enter a non-empty drink volume before confirming. "Volume" = drink amount (e.g. ml / fl oz). Tone is polite. en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!

en: Not only water counts - other drinks do too, each with its own coefficient
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro carousel — slide 3 (Drinks) description, paired with tutTitle3.
  Type: tutorial step.
  Context: Subtitle on the carousel slide that introduces logging non-water drinks. Explains that other beverages (tea, coffee, juice, etc.) count toward the daily goal but with a hydration coefficient. "Simple water" = plain / pure water; "coefficient" refers to the per-beverage hydration factor used in the drink catalog.

t.ar: لا تحتسب الماء العادي وحده، بل المشروبات الأخرى أيضًا، ولكل منها معامله الخاص.
t.da: Det er ikke kun vand, der tæller - andre drikke gør det også, hver med sin egen koefficient
t.de: Zähl nicht nur reines Wasser, sondern auch andere Getränke mit einem Koeffizienten
t.en: Not only water counts - other drinks do too, each with its own coefficient
t.es: Además del agua normal, ten en cuenta otras bebidas con un coeficiente
t.fr: Il n'y a pas que l'eau qui compte : les autres boissons aussi, chacune avec son coefficient.
t.hi: सिर्फ़ पानी ही नहीं, बाकी पेय भी गिने जाते हैं - हर एक अपने गुणांक के साथ।
t.id: Perhatikan tidak hanya air putih, tetapi juga minuman lain dengan koefisien
t.it: Tieni conto non solo della semplice acqua ma anche di altre bevande con un coefficiente
t.ja: 水だけでなく、その他の係数付きの飲み物も考慮しましょう
t.ko: 단순히 물뿐만 아니라 다른 음료도 같이 효율적으로 마셔 보세요

t.ru: Учитывай не только простую воду, но и другие напитки с коэффициентом
t.sv: Ta inte bara hänsyn till vanligt vatten utan även till andra drycker med en koefficient
