t.tr: Üzgünüz, yapılandırılmış bir Instagram hesabınız yok
t.vi: Rất tiếc, bạn chưa thiết lập tài khoản Instagram
t.zh_CN: 不好意思，你还未设置Instagram账号

en: The password is incorrect. Please check it and try again
context:
Surface: Login / change-password screens — error message shown when the entered password does not match the account.
  Type: error message.
  Context: Server-side error indicating the password is incorrect. Asks the user to verify and re-enter it.

t.ar: كلمة المرور غير صحيحة، يرجى التحقق منها والمحاولة ثانية
t.da: Adgangskoden er forkert. Tjek den venligst, og prøv igen
t.de: Das Passwort ist nicht korrekt. Bitte gib es noch einmal richtig ein
t.en: The password is incorrect. Please check it and try again
t.es: La contraseña no es correcta, compruébala e inténtalo de nuevo
t.fr: Le mot de passe est incorrect, veuillez vérifier et essayer à nouveau
t.hi: पासवर्ड सही नहीं है, कृपया इसे जाँच कर फिर से कोशिश करें
t.id: Kata sandi salah, silakan periksa kembali
t.it: La password è errata, per favore la controlli e provi di nuovo
t.ja: パスワードが不正確です。確認してもう一度入力してください。
t.ko: 비밀번호가 올바르지 않습니다. 다시 확인해 주세요
t.nb: Passordet er feil. Sjekk det og prøv igjen
t.nl: Het wachtwoord is niet correct, controleer het alstublieft en probeer opnieuw
t.pl: Hasło jest nieprawidłowe, sprawdź je i spróbuj ponownie
t.pt_BR: Senha incorreta. Verifique e tente novamente
t.sv: Lösenordet är felaktigt. Kontrollera det och försök igen
t.vi: Mật khẩu không đúng, vui lòng kiểm tra và thử lại
t.zh_CN: 密码错误，请检查后重试

en: You should be proud of yourself!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
  Type: motivational text.
  Context: Encouraging praise directed at the user for reaching the goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.da: Du skal være stolt af dig selv!
t.de: Du kannst stolz auf dich sein!
t.en: You should be proud of yourself!
t.fr: Tu devrais être fier de toi!
t.hi: तुम्हें अपने आप पर गर्व होना चाहिए!
t.ja: 自分を 褒めてあげてください！
t.ms: Awak harus bangga dengan diri sendiri!
t.nb: Du burde være stolt av deg selv!
t.pl: To coś z czego można być dumnym!
t.sv: Du borde vara stolt över dig själv!
t.vi: Bạn nên tự hào về chính mình!

context:
Surface: Reminder notifications time-window picker — sheet title for the end-of-window time picker (Settings → Notifications interval, Onboarding notifications step).
  Type: section header / sheet title.
  Context: Preposition "To" introducing the end time of the daily hydration reminder window (paired with the start "From" time — see key "From"). Not a beverage. Translate as the preposition meaning "until" / "to" in the time-range sense.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word, fits sheet header).

Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
  Type: achievement title.
  Context: Award id=7 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after the user reaches the daily goal for the first time (paired with ach_descr7).
  Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words for compact card display).

en: Reach your daily goal! Keep up the good work!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Encourages the user to reach the daily water goal and praises ongoing progress.

t.ar: حقق هدفك اليومي من الماء! أحسنت، واصل!
t.da: Nå dit daglige mål! Bliv ved sådan!
t.de: Erreiche das Tagesziel heute! Sei brav!
t.en: Reach your daily goal! Keep up the good work!
t.es: ¡Llega hoy a tu meta de agua! ¡Sigue así!
t.fr: Bois assez d'eau aujourd'hui! Continue comme ça!
t.hi: पानी पीने का रोज़ का लक्ष्य हासिल करो! ऐसे ही आगे बढ़ते रहो!
t.it: Raggiungi il tuo obiettivo d'acqua di oggi! Continua così!
t.ja: 目標を達成しましょう！その調子！
t.ko: 목표를 달성해 봐요! 계속 잘하고 있어요!
t.ms: Capai matlamat air harian! Teruskan usaha baik awak!
t.nl: Haal vandaag je waterdoel! Ga zo door!
t.pl: Osiągnij swój cel! I tak trzymaj!
t.pt_BR: Alcance sua meta diária! Continue com o bom trabalho!
t.sv: Nå ditt dagliga mål! Fortsätt så!
t.vi: Hãy uống đủ nước hôm nay! Cứ tiếp tục phát huy nhé!
t.zh_CN: 再接再厉，达成每日目标！

context:
Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
  Type: achievement title.
  Context: Award id=10 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after logging drinks for 5 days (paired with ach_descr10); playful challenge to keep going.
  Constraints: Keep short — full short question, OK to keep as is.

t.hi: क्या तुम और बेहतर कर सकते हो?
t.ja: もっと頑張れませんか？
t.vi: Bạn có thể làm tốt hơn không?

context:
Surface: app-wide.
  Type: status label (activity indicator).
  Context: Present-progressive verb form. Generic in-progress label shown next to or under a spinner while data is being fetched from the server. Sentence-case, no trailing punctuation; an animated ellipsis is added by the UI when needed. The source key spelling "load" is legacy — do not rename; the user-facing value is "Loading".
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars).

Surface: Friends list screen — navigation bar title.
  Type: screen title.
  Context: Screen showing the user's list of in-app friends (with pending requests section above).

Surface: Find friends screen — text field placeholder for the friend search input.
  Type: placeholder.
  Context: Hint text in the find-friends search field telling the user to enter a friend's username (login) or email address to look them up.
  Constraints: Keep concise to fit a single-line search-field placeholder.

t.ar: اسم مستخدم الصديق أو بريده الإلكتروني
t.es: Nombre de usuario o correo electrónico de amigo
t.fr: Le nom d’utilisateur ou l’adresse e-mail d’un ami
t.ja: 友だちのユーザー名またはメールアドレス
t.ms: Log masuk atau alamat e-mel rakan
t.nl: Login of e-mail van een vriend
t.pt_BR: Nome de usuário ou e-mail do amigo
t.tr: Bir arkadaşın kullanıcı adı veya e-posta adresi
t.vi: Đăng nhập hoặc email của bạn bè
t.zh_CN: 好友的登录名或电子邮箱

context:
Surface: Friend profile screen ("not in friends" label) and friend request cell ("add to friends" button).
  Type: button label / status label.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase. Action to send a friend request to another user; on a non-friend profile it doubles as the "not in your friends list yet" label and the CTA to add them.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit a row button.

Surface: app-wide.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb. Generic search / find action used as a CTA across the app (e.g. find a friend, find a user). The source key spelling "search" is legacy — do not rename; the user-facing value is "Find" (chosen as the action verb rather than the noun "Search"). Translate as the imperative "find" in target language, not "search field" placeholder.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: app-wide.
  Type: button label (alert confirmation).
  Context: Affirmative confirmation in yes/no alert dialogs (e.g. "Are you sure? — Yes / No"). Paired with the "No" key. Sentence-case, single word.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤5 chars).

Surface: Statistics → Edit added drink screen — confirmation alert title shown after the user taps the destructive "delete" action on a previously logged drink.
  Type: error message (confirmation alert title).
  Context: Asks the user to confirm removing one already-logged drink entry from the day's statistics. "Beverage" here refers to a single logged drink entry (not the beverage catalog row). Paired with the "Delete" / "Cancel" alert buttons.

t.ja: この飲み物を削除しますか?
t.tr: Bu içeceği silmek istediğinizden emin misiniz?

context: Default settings

t.ja: デフォルトに戻しますか?

context:
Surface: app-wide — drink volume label. Used as navigation title on watchOS volume / custom-volume screens, settings row, edit-added-drink screen title, and accessibility label for the volume text field.
  Type: screen title / row title / accessibility label.
  Context: Noun. Generic label for the volume amount of a drink (e.g. 250 ml).

Surface: Settings → Default volumes screen — title of the bottom "Add volume" button that opens the add-volume sheet, and also the accessibility label for that button.
  Type: button label / accessibility label.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase. Opens a dialog where the user adds a new default drink volume (in ml / oz) to their quick-add list. Despite the key id mentioning "edit", the current use is for adding a new volume (not editing existing ones).
  Constraints: Keep short to fit a bottom CTA button. No trailing period.

Surface: app-wide — Settings screen row title, Account header button, Spotlight nav item.
  Type: section / row title.
  Context: Noun. Generic "Friends" label used as the entry point to the friends list section.
  Constraints: Keep short — 1 word.
More information

en: Detailed statistics are only available in the full version
context:
Surface: Statistics screen — premium gate footnote shown when a non-premium user opens a detailed statistics view that is gated behind My Water Premium.
  Type: paragraph (paywall gate notice).
  Context: Explains that detailed (drill-down) statistics are reserved for the premium tier. Uses the legacy phrasing "the full application version" (matches the surrounding watch / older paywall copy) rather than the newer "My Water Premium" label. Note: the English source says "Details statistics" (legacy phrasing for "detailed statistics"); render naturally in target language ("detailed statistics", "статистика по деталям" etc.) without copying the slightly awkward English noun stack.
  Constraints: 1 sentence; no trailing period in the English source — keep target locale punctuation conventions natural.
  Tone: informative, neutral.

t.ar: تتوفر إحصاءات تفصيلية فقط في الإصدار الكامل من التطبيق
t.da: Detaljeret statistik er kun tilgængelig i den fulde version
t.de: Detaillierte Statistiken stehen nur in der Vollversion der Anwendung zur Verfügung
t.en: Detailed statistics are only available in the full version
t.es: Las estadísticas detalladas solo están disponibles en la versión completa de la aplicación
t.fr: Les statistiques détaillées ne sont disponibles que dans la version complète.
t.hi: विस्तृत आँकड़े सिर्फ़ फुल वर्ज़न में मिलते हैं
t.id: Statistik detail hanya tersedia dalam versi lengkap aplikasi
t.it: Le statistiche dettagliate sono disponibili solo nella versione completa dell'applicazione
t.ja: 詳細な統計はフルバージョンでのみ利用できます
t.ms: Statistik terperinci hanya tersedia dalam versi lengkap aplikasi
t.nb: Detaljert statistikk er bare tilgjengelig i fullversjonen.
t.nl: Gedetailleerde statistieken zijn alleen beschikbaar in de volledige versie van de app
t.pl: Szczegółowe statystyki są dostępne tylko w pełnej wersji aplikacji
t.pt_BR: As estatísticas detalhadas estão disponíveis apenas na versão completa do aplicativo
t.ru: Подробная статистика доступна только в полной версии приложения
t.sv: Detaljerad statistik är endast tillgänglig i den fullständiga versionen av appen
t.tr: Ayrıntılı istatistikler yalnızca uygulamanın tam sürümünde mevcuttur
t.vi: Thống kê chi tiết chỉ có sẵn trong phiên bản ứng dụng đầy đủ
t.zh_CN: 详细统计数据仅在应用完整版中提供

context:
Surface: Find friends screen title and CTA buttons across friends list / main / statistics empty states.
  Type: screen title / button label.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase. Opens the find-friends search flow. Reused as both the screen title and the secondary CTA on empty friends-list / no-data states.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit a navigation title and a CTA button.
Text for button, wehn user send request to add other user to friends, please, not increase lenght of text.

t.ja: リクエストが送られました

context:
Surface: Friend request cell — status label / button title shown when the other user is already in the friends list.
  Type: status label.
  Context: Noun. Indicates that the user is already a friend (status of the relationship), not an action. Reads as "Friend" (i.e. "added", "in your friends list"). Distinct from `friends` (plural section title) and `addFriendButton` (action to add).
  Constraints: Keep short to fit a small status button — 1 word.

Surface: app-wide. Premium upsell cells / popups (FullVersionCell, StreakPopup primary action, WeightNewViewModel placeholder), info button accessibility label on drink-create parameter rows (DrinkInfoParamView), widget "need premium" accessibility label (NeedPremium widget).
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase "Learn more" used as a generic CTA opening a follow-up screen with more details (premium info / introductory offer fallback when not eligible / parameter explanation popup / widget premium info). Translate as the equivalent short call-to-action; no implied subject.
  Constraints: Keep short (1-2 words, ≤15 chars) — fits compact buttons and accessibility labels.

Surface: Friends search / find friends screen — section header above the list of matched users from the server search.
  Type: section header.
  Context: Labels the list of users returned by the friend-search query. Plural noun phrase referring to the search result rows below it.
  Constraints: Keep short — single-line section header.

Surface: Friend profile screen — confirm-alert message shown when the user taps "remove from friends".
  Type: alert message.
  Context: Asks the user to confirm removing the given person from their friends list. Paired with destructive "Delete" action.
  Placeholders:
    %@ — the other user's display name or login (e.g. "alex", "Alina Sharova").

t.es: ¿Eliminar al usuario [%s] de tu lista de amigos?
t.fr: Retirer l'utilisateur [%s] de votre liste d'amis?
t.it: Rimuovi l'utente [%s] dalla tua lista di amici?
t.ja: 友だちリストからユーザー [%s] を削除しますか?
t.nb: Vil du fjerne [%s] fra vennelisten din?
t.pt_BR: Remover o usuário [%s] da sua lista de amigos?
t.sv: Vill du ta bort användaren [%s] från din vänlista?
t.vi: Xóa người dùng [%s] khỏi danh sách bạn bè?
t.zh_CN: 确定[%s]用户从好友列表移除吗？

context:
Surface: Friends list screen — section header above the incoming friend-requests list.
  Type: section header.
  Context: Plural noun. Header for the section listing pending incoming friend requests from other users.

en: wants to add you to their friends list
context:
Surface: Friend request cell — description label inside the incoming friend-request row.
  Type: description sub-label.
  Context: Sentence fragment displayed under or next to the requester's name; visually reads as "<username> wants to add you into their friends list". The requester's name comes from a separate label, not from this string — start with lowercase (as a continuation of the name) and translate as a continuation phrase appropriate for target language word order.
  Constraints: Sentence fragment without a leading capital letter; do not add the username inline.

t.da: ønsker at tilføje dig til sin venneliste
t.en: wants to add you to their friends list
t.es: quiere añadirte a su lista de amigos
t.hi: अपनी मित्र सूची में तुम्हें जोड़ना चाहते हैं
t.it: vuole aggiungerti alla sua lista di amici
t.ja: があなたを友だちに追加しようとしています
t.ko: 님이 당신을 친구 목록에 추가하려고 합니다
t.nb: vil legge deg til på vennelisten
t.pl: chce Cię dodać do swojej listy znajomych
t.pt_BR: quer adicionar você à sua lista de amigos
t.sv: vill lägga till dig i vänlistan
t.vi: muốn thêm bạn vào danh sách bạn bè của họ
t.zh_CN: 希望将你添加到他的好友列表

en: Create an account, find your friends, challenge them, and drink more water!
context:
Surface: Friends list screen — empty state subtitle shown when the user is not signed in.
  Type: empty state body.
  Context: Encourages the unauthenticated user to create an in-app account so they can use the friends feature (find friends, challenge them, drink more water). Paired with sign-up / sign-in CTAs.
  Tone: encouraging.

t.ar: أنشئ حساباً، وابحث عن أصدقائك، وتحدَّهم، واشرب المزيد من الماء!
t.da: Opret en app-konto, find dine venner, udfordr dem og drik mere vand!
t.de: Erstelle ein Konto in der App, finde deine Freunde, fordere sie heraus und trink mehr Wasser!
t.en: Create an account, find your friends, challenge them, and drink more water!
t.es: ¡Crea una cuenta en la aplicación, encuentra a tus amigos, desafíales y bebe más agua!
t.fr: Crée un compte, trouve tes amis, défie-les et bois plus d'eau!
t.hi: ऐप में ही अकाउंट बनाओ, अपने दोस्तों को खोजो, उन्हें चैलेंज करो और ज़्यादा पानी पियो!
t.id: Buat akun di aplikasi, cari teman, tantang mereka, dan minum lebih banyak air!
t.it: Crea un account in-app, trova i tuoi amici, sfidali e bevi più acqua!
t.ja: アプリ内アカウントを作成し、友だちを見つけ、彼らに挑戦して、もっと水を飲みましょう!
t.ko: 계정을 만들어 친구를 찾고, 함께 경쟁하며 물을 더 많이 마셔 보세요!
t.ms: Buat akaun dalam aplikasi, cari rakan, cabar mereka dan minum lebih banyak air!
t.nb: Opprett en konto i appen, finn vennene dine, utfordre dem og drikk mer vann!
t.nl: Maak een account aan, vind je vrienden, daag ze uit en drink meer water!
t.pl: Utwórz konto w aplikacji, znajdź znajomych, rzuć im wyzwanie, żeby pili więcej wody!
t.pt_BR: Crie uma conta no aplicativo, encontre seus amigos, desafie-os e beba mais água!
t.ru: Создай аккаунт в приложении, найди друзей, соревнуйся с ними и пей больше воды!
t.sv: Skapa ett konto i appen, hitta dina vänner, utmana dem och drick mer vatten!
t.tr: Uygulamada bir hesap oluştur, arkadaşlarını bul, onlarla yarış ve daha fazla su iç!
t.vi: Tạo tài khoản trong ứng dụng, tìm bạn bè của bạn, thách đấu với họ và hãy uống nhiều nước hơn!
t.zh_CN: 创建应用内的账户、寻找你的好友、向他们发起挑战并喝更多的水！

en: You haven't added anyone yet. Find and add your first friend
context:
Surface: Friends list screen — empty state subtitle shown when the signed-in user has no friends yet.
  Type: empty state body.
  Context: Tells the user the friends list is empty and invites them to find their first friend. Paired with "Invite friends" (primary CTA) and "Find friends" (secondary CTA).
  Tone: gentle, action-prompting.

t.ar: لم تُضِف أحداً بعد. ابحث عن أول صديق لك وأضِفه
t.da: Du har ikke tilføjet nogen endnu. Find og tilføj din første ven
t.de: Du hast noch niemanden hinzugefügt. Finde deinen ersten Freund und füg ihn hinzu
t.en: You haven't added anyone yet. Find and add your first friend
t.es: Todavía no has añadido a nadie. Encuentra y añade a tu primer amigo
t.fr: Tu n'as encore ajouté personne. Trouve et ajoute ton premier ami
t.hi: तुमने अभी तक किसी को नहीं जोड़ा है। अपना पहला दोस्त खोजो और जोड़ो
t.id: Kamu belum menambahkan siapa pun. Cari dan tambahkan teman pertamamu
t.it: Non hai ancora aggiunto nessuno. Trova e aggiungi il tuo primo amico
t.ja: まだ誰も追加していません。最初の友だちを見つけて追加しましょう
t.ko: 아직 아무도 추가하지 않으셨습니다. 친구를 찾아 추가해보세요.
t.ms: Awak belum tambah sesiapa lagi. Cari dan tambah rakan pertama awak
t.nb: Du har ikke lagt til noen ennå. Finn og legg til din første venn
t.nl: Je hebt nog niemand toegevoegd. Zoek en voeg je eerste vriend toe
t.pl: Nie masz jeszcze żadnych znajomych. Znajdź i dodaj swojego pierwszego znajomego
t.pt_BR: Você ainda não adicionou ninguém. Encontre e adicione o seu primeiro amigo
t.ru: Список друзей пуст. Найди и добавь первого друга.
t.sv: Du har inte lagt till någon än. Hitta och lägg till din första vän
t.tr: Henüz kimseyi eklemedin. İlk arkadaşını bul ve ekle
t.vi: Bạn chưa thêm bất kỳ ai. Hãy tìm và thêm người bạn đầu tiên của mình.
t.zh_CN: 你还没有添加任何人。查找并添加你的第一个好友

en: Unfortunately, we couldn’t find them, but you can invite them to try the app 😊
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — alert title shown when a search by login/email finds no matching user.
  Type: alert title.
  Context: Tells the user that the searched account was not found, then softens the result with a suggestion to invite that person to the app. Paired with the "Invite" action button (key "invite") and a "Close" cancel button. The ":)" smiley is intentional friendly tone — keep an equivalent friendly closer in target language if natural, otherwise drop it.
  Tone: gentle, apologetic but encouraging.

t.ar: للأسف، لم نعثر على هذا المستخدم، ولكن يمكنك دعوته لتجربة التطبيق 😊
t.da: Desværre kunne vi ikke finde denne bruger, men du kan invitere dem til at prøve appen 😊
t.de: Leider konnten wir diesen Benutzer nicht finden, aber du kannst ihn in diese App einladen 😊
t.en: Unfortunately, we couldn’t find them, but you can invite them to try the app 😊
t.es: Desafortunadamente no hemos podido encontrar a este usuario, pero puedes invitarle a unirse a la aplicación 😊
t.fr: Malheureusement, nous n'avons pas trouvé cet utilisateur, mais tu peux l'inviter à essayer l'application 😊
t.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, हम इस यूज़र को नहीं ढूँढ पाए, पर तुम उन्हें इस ऐप में बुला सकते हो 😊
t.id: Sayangnya, kami tidak menemukan pengguna ini, tetapi kamu dapat mengundang dia ke aplikasi 😊
t.it: Purtroppo non abbiamo potuto trovare questo utente ma puoi invitarlo in questa app 😊
t.ja: 残念ながら、このユーザーは見つかりませんでしたが、このアプリに招待できます 😊
t.ko: 안타깝게도 사용자를 찾을 수 없었어요. 대신 이 앱으로 친구를 초대해 보세요 😊
t.ms: Malangnya, kami tidak menemui pengguna ini, tetapi awak boleh mengundangnya ke aplikasi ini 😊
t.nb: Beklager, vi kunne ikke finne denne brukeren, men du kan invitere dem til denne appen 😊
t.nl: We konden deze gebruiker helaas niet vinden, maar je kunt deze persoon uitnodigen om de app te proberen 😊
t.pl: Niestety nie udało nam się znaleźć tego użytkownika, ale możesz go zaprosić do korzystania z aplikacji 😊
t.pt_BR: Infelizmente não conseguimos encontrar esse usuário, mas você pode convidá-lo para este aplicativo 😊
t.ru: К сожалению, мы не нашли этого пользователя, но ты можешь пригласить его в приложение 😊
t.sv: Tyvärr kunde vi inte hitta den här användaren, men du kan bjuda in hen till den här appen 😊
t.tr: Üzgünüz, bu kullanıcıyı bulamadık ama onu uygulamaya davet edebilirsin 😊
t.vi: Rất tiếc, chúng tôi không thể tìm thấy người dùng này nhưng bạn có thể mời họ tham gia vào ứng dụng này 😊
t.zh_CN: 我们没找到该用户，不过你可以邀请他使用我们的应用 😊

en: Add this person as a friend to see their profile and statistics.
context:
Surface: Friend profile screen — description label shown beneath the "Add to friends" CTA when the viewed user is not yet a friend (notInFriendDescrLabel).
  Type: paragraph (explanatory).
  Context: Explains why the profile and statistics are hidden until the user adds this person as a friend. Paired with "Add friend" button (key addFriendButton). Note: the key name contains a typo ("youShuld" instead of "youShould") — legacy identifier, do not rename.

t.ar: أضف هذا الشخص إلى أصدقائك لعرض ملفه الشخصي وإحصاءاته.
t.da: Tilføj denne bruger som ven for at se profil og statistik.
t.de: Füge diesen Nutzer als Freund hinzu, um sein Profil und seine Statistiken zu sehen
t.en: Add this person as a friend to see their profile and statistics.
t.es: Añade a este usuario como amigo para ver su perfil y estadísticas.
t.fr: Ajoute cet utilisateur en ami pour voir son profil et ses statistiques
t.hi: इस यूज़र की प्रोफ़ाइल और आंकड़े देखने के लिए उसे दोस्त बना लो।
t.id: Tambahkan pengguna ini sebagai teman untuk melihat profil dan statistiknya
t.it: Aggiungere questo utente agli amici per vedere il suo profilo e le sue statistiche.
t.ja: このユーザーを友だちに追加すると、プロフィールと統計を見られます。
t.ko: 이 사용자의 프로필과 통계를 보려면 친구로 추가해 주세요.
t.ms: Tambah pengguna sebagai rakan untuk melihat statistik dan profilnya
t.nb: Legg til denne personen som venn for å se profilen og statistikken.
t.nl: Voeg deze gebruiker toe aan je vrienden om hun profiel en statistieken te bekijken.
t.pl: Dodaj tego użytkownika do znajomych, aby zobaczyć jego profil i statystyki
t.pt_BR: Adicione este usuário aos amigos para ver o perfil e estatísticas dele.
t.ru: Добавь пользователя в друзья, чтобы видеть его статистику и профиль
t.sv: Lägg till den här användaren som vän för att se användarens profil och statistik.
t.tr: İstatistiklerini ve profilini görmek için kullanıcıyı arkadaş olarak ekleyin
t.vi: Thêm người dùng này vào bạn bè để xem hồ sơ và số liệu thống kê của họ.
t.zh_CN: 将此用户添加为好友可查看资料和统计数据。

en: We need access to your photos so you can choose a profile picture.
context:
Surface: System iOS permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests access to the Photo Library (Info.plist `NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription`).
  Type: permission prompt.
  Context: Justifies why the app needs Photo Library access — to let the user pick a photo as their profile avatar. Shown by iOS in the standard authorization sheet on first request; user can grant or deny.
  Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
  Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: يرجى منحنا إذن للوصول إلى صورك لتعيين الصورة الرمزية الخاصة بك
t.da: Giv os tilladelse til at få adgang til dine fotos til at indstille din avatar
t.de: Bitte geben Sie uns die Erlaubnis, auf Ihre Fotos zuzugreifen, um Ihren Avatar einzustellen
t.en: We need access to your photos so you can choose a profile picture.
t.es: Danos permiso para acceder a tus fotos para configurar tu avatar
t.fr: Veuillez nous donner la permission d'accéder à vos photos pour définir votre avatar
t.hi: कृपया हमें अपना अवतार सेट करने के लिए अपनी तस्वीरों तक पहुंचने की अनुमति दें
t.id: Tolong beri kami izin untuk mengakses foto Anda untuk mengatur avatar Anda
t.it: Ti preghiamo di darci il permesso di accedere alle tue foto per impostare il tuo avatar
t.ja: プロフィール写真を選ぶために、写真へのアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 프로필 사진을 선택하려면 사진 접근 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Sila benarkan kami mengakses foto anda untuk menetapkan avatar anda
t.nb: Gi oss tillatelse til å få tilgang til bildene dine for å velge profilbildet ditt
t.nl: We hebben toegang tot je foto's nodig zodat je een profielfoto kunt kiezen.
t.pl: Proszę dać nam zgodę na dostęp do swoich zdjęć, aby ustawić swój awatar
t.pt_BR: Por favor, nos dê permissão para acessar suas fotos para definir seu avatar
t.ru: Пожалуйста, дайте нам разрешение на доступ к вашим фотографиям, чтобы установить свой аватар
t.sv: Vi behöver åtkomst till dina foton så att du kan välja en profilbild.
t.tr: Avatarınızı ayarlamak için lütfen fotoğraflarınıza erişmemize izin verin
t.vi: Vui lòng cho phép chúng tôi truy cập vào ảnh của bạn để đặt ảnh đại diện của bạn
t.zh_CN: 请授予我们访问您的照片的权限以设置您的头像

en: We need access to your camera so you can take a profile picture.
context:
Surface: System iOS permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests access to the Camera (Info.plist `NSCameraUsageDescription`).
  Type: permission prompt.
  Context: Justifies why the app needs Camera access — to let the user take a photo for their profile avatar. Shown by iOS in the standard authorization sheet on first request; user can grant or deny.
  Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
  Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: يرجى إعطاؤنا إذنًا بالوصول إلى الكاميرا لالتقاط الصور على الصورة الرمزية
t.da: Giv os tilladelse til at få adgang til dit kamera for at tage foto til avatar
t.de: Bitte geben Sie uns die Erlaubnis, auf Ihre Kamera zuzugreifen, um ein Foto für Ihren Avatar aufzunehmen
t.en: We need access to your camera so you can take a profile picture.
t.es: Danos permiso para acceder a tu cámara para tomar una foto al avatar
t.fr: Veuillez nous donner la permission d'accéder à votre appareil photo pour prendre une photo sur un avatar
t.hi: प्रोफ़ाइल फ़ोटो लेने के लिए कृपया हमें अपने कैमरे तक पहुँचने की अनुमति दें
t.id: Tolong beri kami izin untuk mengakses kamera Anda untuk mengambil foto avatar
t.it: Per favore dacci il permesso di accedere alla fotocamera per scattare una foto per il tuo avatar
t.ja: プロフィール写真を撮影するために、カメラへのアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 프로필 사진을 촬영하려면 카메라 접근 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Sila benarkan kami mengakses kamera anda untuk mengambil foto avatar
t.nb: Gi oss tillatelse til å få tilgang til kameraet ditt for å ta et bilde av profilen
t.nl: We hebben toegang tot je camera nodig zodat je een profielfoto kunt maken.
t.pl: Proszę dać nam zgodę na dostęp do aparatu, aby zrobić zdjęcie do awatara
t.pt_BR: Por favor, nos dê permissão para acessar sua câmera para tirar foto para avatar
t.ru: Пожалуйста, дайте нам разрешение на доступ к вашей камере, чтобы сделать фотографию на аватар
t.sv: Vi behöver åtkomst till din kamera så att du kan ta en profilbild.
t.tr: Lütfen bir avatar resmi çekmek için kameranıza erişmemize izin verin
t.vi: Vui lòng cho phép chúng tôi truy cập vào máy ảnh của bạn để chụp ảnh đại diện cho bạn
t.zh_CN: 请授予我们访问您的相机以将照片拍照至个人资料的权限

en: We need read access to Apple Health water, weight, and profile data so we can import your hydration history and calculate your daily goal.
context:
Surface: System HealthKit permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests read access to Apple Health data.
  Type: permission prompt.
  Context: Justifies why the app reads Apple Health data (water intake, weight, body/profile parameters) — to import hydration history and compute the user's recommended daily water goal. Shown by iOS in the standard HealthKit authorization sheet; user can grant or deny.
  Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
  Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن قراءة بيانات الماء والوزن والملف الشخصي من Apple Health لاستيراد سجل الترطيب الخاص بك وحساب هدفك اليومي.
t.da: Vi har brug for læseadgang til vand-, vægt- og profildata i Apple Health for at importere din hydreringshistorik og beregne dit daglige mål.
t.de: Wir benötigen Lesezugriff auf Wasser-, Gewichts- und Profildaten in Apple Health, um Ihren Trinkverlauf zu importieren und Ihr Tagesziel zu berechnen.
t.en: We need read access to Apple Health water, weight, and profile data so we can import your hydration history and calculate your daily goal.
t.es: Necesitamos acceso de lectura a los datos de agua, peso y perfil de Apple Health para importar tu historial y calcular tu meta diaria.
t.fr: Nous avons besoin d'un accès en lecture aux données d'eau, de poids et de profil d'Apple Santé pour importer votre historique et calculer votre objectif quotidien.
t.hi: आपका इतिहास आयात करने और दैनिक लक्ष्य की गणना करने के लिए हमें Apple Health के पानी, वज़न और प्रोफ़ाइल डेटा तक पढ़ने की अनुमति चाहिए।
t.id: Kami memerlukan akses baca ke data air, berat, dan profil di Apple Health untuk mengimpor riwayat dan menghitung target harian Anda.
t.it: Ci serve l'accesso in lettura ai dati di acqua, peso e profilo di Apple Health per importare la cronologia e calcolare il tuo obiettivo giornaliero.
t.ja: 履歴のインポートと1日の目標の計算のため、Apple Health の水分・体重・プロフィールデータへの読み取りアクセスが必要です。
t.ko: 기록을 가져오고 일일 목표를 계산하기 위해 Apple Health의 물, 체중, 프로필 데이터에 대한 읽기 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Kami memerlukan akses baca kepada data air, berat dan profil dalam Apple Health untuk mengimport sejarah dan mengira sasaran harian anda.
t.nb: Vi trenger lesetilgang til vann-, vekt- og profildata i Apple Health for å importere historikken din og beregne det daglige målet.
t.nl: We hebben leestoegang tot water-, gewichts- en profielgegevens in Apple Health nodig om je geschiedenis te importeren en je dagdoel te berekenen.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy dostępu do odczytu danych o wodzie, wadze i profilu w Apple Health, aby zaimportować historię i obliczyć Twój dzienny cel.
t.pt_BR: Precisamos de acesso de leitura aos dados de água, peso e perfil do Apple Health para importar seu histórico e calcular sua meta diária.
t.ru: Нам нужен доступ на чтение данных Apple Health о воде, весе и профиле, чтобы импортировать вашу историю и рассчитать дневную цель.
t.sv: Vi behöver läsåtkomst till vatten-, vikt- och profildata i Apple Health för att importera din historik och beräkna ditt dagliga mål.
t.tr: Geçmişinizi içe aktarmak ve günlük hedefinizi hesaplamak için Apple Health'deki su, kilo ve profil verilerine okuma erişimine ihtiyacımız var.
t.vi: Chúng tôi cần quyền đọc dữ liệu nước, cân nặng và hồ sơ trong Apple Health để nhập lịch sử và tính mục tiêu hằng ngày của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 我们需要读取 Apple Health 中的水分、体重和个人资料数据，以导入您的历史记录并计算每日目标。

en: We need permission to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries you log in My Water to Apple Health.
context:
Surface: System HealthKit permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests write access to Apple Health (Info.plist `NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription`).
  Type: permission prompt.
  Context: Justifies why the app writes to Apple Health — to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries logged in My Water into the system Health database. Shown by iOS in the standard HealthKit authorization sheet; user can grant or deny.
  Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
  Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن لحفظ بيانات الماء والكافيين والوزن والكحول التي تسجّلها في My Water إلى Apple Health.
t.da: Vi har brug for tilladelse til at gemme vand-, koffein-, vægt- og alkoholregistreringer, du registrerer i My Water, i Apple Health.
t.de: Wir benötigen die Berechtigung, die Wasser-, Koffein-, Gewichts- und Alkoholeinträge, die Sie in My Water erfassen, in Apple Health zu speichern.
t.en: We need permission to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries you log in My Water to Apple Health.
t.es: Necesitamos permiso para guardar en Apple Health los registros de agua, cafeína, peso y alcohol que anotas en My Water.
t.fr: Nous avons besoin de l'autorisation d'enregistrer dans Apple Santé les entrées d'eau, de caféine, de poids et d'alcool que vous notez dans My Water.
t.hi: My Water में आपके दर्ज किए गए पानी, कैफ़ीन, वज़न और शराब से जुड़े रिकॉर्ड Apple Health में सहेजने की अनुमति हमें चाहिए।
t.id: Kami memerlukan izin untuk menyimpan catatan air, kafein, berat, dan alkohol yang Anda catat di My Water ke Apple Health.
t.it: Ci serve l'autorizzazione per salvare in Apple Health le voci relative ad acqua, caffeina, peso e alcol che registri in My Water.
t.ja: My Water で記録した水分・カフェイン・体重・アルコールのデータを Apple Health に保存する許可が必要です。
t.ko: My Water에 기록한 물, 카페인, 체중, 알코올 항목을 Apple Health에 저장하기 위한 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Kami memerlukan kebenaran untuk menyimpan rekod air, kafein, berat dan alkohol yang anda rekodkan dalam My Water ke Apple Health.
t.nb: Vi trenger tillatelse til å lagre vann-, koffein-, vekt- og alkoholoppføringene du registrerer i My Water, i Apple Health.
t.nl: We hebben toestemming nodig om de water-, cafeïne-, gewichts- en alcoholgegevens die je in My Water vastlegt op te slaan in Apple Health.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy zezwolenia na zapisywanie w Apple Health wpisów dotyczących wody, kofeiny, wagi i alkoholu, które rejestrujesz w My Water.
t.pt_BR: Precisamos de permissão para salvar no Apple Health os registros de água, cafeína, peso e álcool que você registra no My Water.
t.ru: Нам нужно разрешение, чтобы сохранять записи о воде, кофеине, весе и алкоголе из My Water в Apple Health.
t.sv: Vi behöver behörighet att spara vatten-, koffein-, vikt- och alkoholposter som du registrerar i My Water i Apple Health.
t.tr: My Water'da kaydettiğiniz su, kafein, kilo ve alkol verilerini Apple Health'e kaydetmek için izninize ihtiyacımız var.
t.vi: Chúng tôi cần quyền lưu các mục về nước, caffeine, cân nặng và rượu bia mà bạn ghi trong My Water vào Apple Health.
t.zh_CN: 我们需要权限，以将您在 My Water 中记录的水分、咖啡因、体重和酒精相关数据保存到 Apple Health。

en: Please enable notifications for our app in your phone settings.
context:
Surface: In-app message shown when notifications are disabled at the iOS level — asks the user to re-enable notifications via phone Settings (legacy key; no active call sites in current Swift code, but kept for non-en locales and potential reactivation).
  Type: error message.
  Context: Tells the user that local / push notifications need to be enabled in iOS Settings for the app to deliver reminders. Not the system permission prompt itself — this is the app's own copy shown after the system-level toggle has been turned off.
  Tone: polite, action-oriented ("Please enable ... in your phone settings.").

t.ar: يرجى تفعيل الإشعارات لهذا التطبيق من إعدادات هاتفك.
t.da: Aktivér venligst notifikationer for vores app i dine telefonindstillinger.
t.de: Bitte aktivieren Sie in Ihren Telefoneinstellungen die Option, Benachrichtigungen zu senden.
t.en: Please enable notifications for our app in your phone settings.
t.es: Por favor, active las notificaciones de nuestra app en los ajustes de su teléfono.
t.fr: Veuillez autoriser l'accès pour l'envoi de notifications dans les paramètres de votre téléphone.
t.hi: कृपया अपने फ़ोन की सेटिंग में हमारी ऐप के नोटिफिकेशन चालू करें।
t.id: Harap izinkan pengiriman pemberitahuan untuk aplikasi kami di pengaturan sistem telepon.
t.it: Per favore abiliti la possibilità di inviare le notifiche nelle impostazioni del Suo telefono.
t.ja: スマートフォンの設定で、通知を送るアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 폰 설정에서 알림을 보내기 위한 접근을 허용해주세요.
t.ms: Sila benarkan pemberitahuan untuk aplikasi kami dalam tetapan telefon anda.
t.nb: Aktiver varsler for appen vår i telefoninnstillingene.
t.nl: Geef alstublieft toestemming om meldingen te sturen in de instellingen van uw telefoon.
t.pl: Zezwól na dostęp do wysyłania powiadomień poprzez zmianę ustawień telefonu.
t.pt_BR: Por favor, permita o acesso para enviar notificações nas configurações do seu telefone.
t.ru: Пожалуйста, разрешите в системных настройках телефона возможность отправки уведомлений для нашего приложения.
t.sv: Aktivera aviseringar för vår app i dina telefoninställningar.
t.tr: Lütfen telefonun sistem ayarlarında uygulamamız için bildirim gönderme özelliğini etkinleştirin.
t.vi: Vui lòng bật thông báo cho ứng dụng của chúng tôi trong cài đặt điện thoại của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 请在手机设置中允许发送通知。

en: you can find friends through social networks
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — description label beneath the "or" separator, above the social network sign-in buttons (VK, Facebook).
  Type: paragraph (hint).
  Context: Tells the user that, as an alternative to searching by login/email, they can find friends by connecting their social network accounts. Sentence-case (lowercase first letter) is intentional in source — a continuation of the visual flow under the "or" divider.

t.ar: يمكنك البحث عن أصدقائك من خلال شبكات التواصل
t.da: du kan finde venner via sociale netværk
t.de: du kannst Freunde über soziale Netzwerke finden
t.en: you can find friends through social networks
t.es: puedes encontrar amigos a través de las redes sociales
t.fr: tu peux aussi trouver des amis via les réseaux sociaux
t.hi: तुम सोशल नेटवर्क से अपने दोस्तों को खोज सकते हो
t.id: kamu bisa menemukan teman lewat media sosial
t.it: puoi trovare amici tramite i social network
t.ja: またはSNSを通じてお友達を見つけることもできます。
t.ko: 또는 소셜 네트워크를 통해 친구들을 찾을 수 있습니다
t.ms: awak boleh mencari rakan melalui media sosial
t.nb: du kan finne venner via sosiale nettverk
t.nl: je kunt vrienden vinden via je sociale netwerken
t.pl: możesz też znaleźć znajomych przez sieci społecznościowe
t.pt_BR: você pode encontrar amigos nas redes sociais
t.ru: ты можешь найти друзей через социальные сети
t.sv: så kan du hitta vänner via sociala nätverk
t.vi: bạn có thể tìm bạn bè qua mạng xã hội
t.zh_CN: 您可以通过社交网络找到好友

en: Unfortunately, none of your friends use our app yet. Would you like to invite them?
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — alert title shown after the user connected a social network (VK / Facebook) and no friends from that network are registered in the app yet. Variant of "nobodyFound" for the social-network search path.
  Type: alert title.
  Context: Tells the user no social-network friend has the app yet, then asks whether they'd like to invite them. Paired with the "Invite" action button (key "invite") and a "Close" cancel button.
  Tone: gentle, apologetic but encouraging.

t.ar: للأسف، لا يوجد أيٌّ من أصدقائك مسجّلاً في التطبيق بعد. هل ترغب في دعوتهم؟
t.da: Desværre er ingen af dine venner endnu registreret i vores app. Vil du invitere dem?
t.de: Leider ist noch keiner deiner Freunde bei unserer App registriert. Möchtest du deine Freunde einladen?
t.en: Unfortunately, none of your friends use our app yet. Would you like to invite them?
t.es: Lamentablemente, ninguno de tus amigos está registrado en nuestra aplicación. ¿Quieres invitar a tus amigos?
t.fr: Malheureusement, aucun de tes amis n'utilise encore notre application. Veux-tu les inviter?
t.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, तुम्हारा कोई भी दोस्त अभी तक हमारे ऐप पर रजिस्टर्ड नहीं है। क्या तुम अपने दोस्तों को बुलाना चाहोगे?
t.id: Sayangnya, belum ada temanmu yang terdaftar di aplikasi kami. Mau mengundang teman-temanmu?
t.it: Sfortunatamente nessuno dei tuoi amici si è ancora registrato alla nostra app. Desideri invitare i tuoi amici?
t.ja: 残念ながら、お友達の中でこのアプリに登録されている方はまだいません。お友達を招待しませんか？
t.ko: 안타깝게도 저희 앱에 등록된 친구가 없습니다. 친구를 초대하시겠습니까?
t.ms: Malangnya, tiada rakan awak yang menggunakan aplikasi kami lagi. Mahu jemput mereka?
t.nb: Dessverre er ingen av vennene dine registrert i appen vår ennå. Vil du invitere vennene dine?
t.nl: Helaas is nog geen enkele vriend van je geregistreerd bij onze app. Wil je je vrienden uitnodigen?
t.pl: Niestety, nikt z Twoich znajomych jeszcze nie korzysta z naszej aplikacji. Chcesz kogoś zaprosić?
t.pt_BR: Infelizmente, nenhum dos seus amigos usa o nosso aplicativo ainda. Você gostaria de convidá-los?
t.ru: К сожалению, никто из твоих друзей пока не зарегистрирован в нашем приложении. Хочешь пригласить своих друзей?
t.sv: Tyvärr är ingen av dina vänner registrerad i vår app än. Vill du bjuda in dina vänner?
t.tr: Üzgünüz, hiçbir arkadaşın henüz uygulamamıza kaydolmadı. Arkadaşlarını davet etmek ister misin?
t.vi: Rất tiếc, chưa có người bạn nào của bạn đăng ký trong ứng dụng của chúng tôi. Bạn có muốn mời bạn bè của mình không?
t.zh_CN: 很遗憾，您的好友还没有在我们的应用注册。您想邀请他们吗？

context:
Surface: app-wide. Used on onboarding norm screen, weight tracking screen (current/initial goal cards), statistics charts (weight goal line label), accessibility labels for edit-goal buttons.
  Type: section label / chart label / accessibility label.
  Context: Noun. The user's target value (daily water intake or weight goal). Often appears as a prefix with a colon, e.g. "Goal: 2000 ml" or "Goal: 70 kg".
  Constraints: Keep short (≤8 chars on narrow screens / charts).

Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
  Type: beverage name.
  Context: Display name for herbal tea in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label. Lowercase inline variant lives in key "herbalTea2".

Surface: Main screen caffeine summary row, statistics screens (daily / per-beverage), beverage editor "Caffeine" parameter label, Spotlight quick-nav, App Style screen, accessibility labels.
  Type: section label / parameter label / accessibility label.
  Context: Noun. Refers to the caffeine content / consumption tracker — for example, displayed next to today's logged caffeine amount or as the "Caffeine (mg)" parameter on a beverage. Not a beverage name. Capitalized as a label.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens / chart legends).

Surface: Main screen alcohol summary row, statistics screens (daily / per-beverage), beverage editor "Alcohol %" parameter label, Spotlight quick-nav.
  Type: section label / parameter label / accessibility label.
  Context: Noun. Refers to the alcohol content / consumption category — for example, displayed next to today's logged alcohol amount or as the "Alcohol %" parameter on a beverage. Capitalized as a label.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: Settings screen — "Integrations" row label; Integrations settings screen navigation title.
  Type: navigation title / settings row label.
  Context: Noun (plural). Refers to connections with other apps and platforms (Apple Health, Fitbit, Samsung Health) where the user can enable data sync between MyWater and the external app. Translate as the standard "integrations" term used in settings UI.
  Constraints: Keep reasonably short (fits in a navigation bar and a settings row).

Surface: Friends comparison statistics — used as the current user's display name (in place of their login/name) in the friends statistics list and per-day breakdown to mark "this is me" rows.
  Type: row label.
  Context: First-person singular pronoun referring to the signed-in user. Title-cased as a label.
  Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) to fit alongside friend names in compact stat rows.

Surface: Integration setup screen (Fitbit / Samsung Health / Apple Health) — primary CTA button.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb. Tapping connects the MyWater app to the selected external integration so the apps can sync data. Paired with "Disconnect" on the same screen for the opposite action.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars). No trailing period.

Surface: Integration setup screen (Fitbit / Samsung Health / Apple Health) — primary CTA button when an integration is already connected.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb. Tapping disconnects MyWater from the previously connected external integration and stops data sync. Paired with "Connect" on the same screen for the opposite action.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤12 chars). No trailing period.

en: Connect [%s] and our app will automatically retrieve your water data from [%s]
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations setup screen (IntegrationSetupViewController) — explanatory paragraph below the integration logo, shown for "read"-style integrations (currently H2OPal hardware).
  Type: paragraph.
  Context: Tells the user what enabling the integration will do — the app will pull water consumption records from the external provider. Both placeholders receive the same provider name (e.g. "H2OPal", "H2OPal") from Swift.
  Placeholders:
    %@ — integration provider name (e.g. "H2OPal")
    %@ — same integration provider name repeated (e.g. "H2OPal")

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations — success alert message shown after the user enables an external integration (H2OPal, FitBit).
  Type: confirmation message.
  Context: Confirms that the connection between the app and the named external integration provider is now active.
  Placeholders:
    %@ — integration provider name (e.g. "H2OPal", "FitBit")

t.fr: L'intégration avec [%s] a été activée avec succès.
t.ja: [%s] との連携が完了しました
t.vi: Tích hợp với [%s] được kích hoạt thành công

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → H2OPal setup screen (IntegrationSetupViewController) — button label below the H2OPal logo that opens the external H2OPal product website.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Link / button title for the H2OPal manufacturer's website. "H2OPal" is a product name — keep untranslated. The translatable part is the word "website".
  Constraints: Keep short — fits a single-line button below the logo.

Surface: app-wide — caffeine value labels on the main screen, statistics screens, beverage editor, drink parameters.
  Type: unit abbreviation.
  Context: Standard SI abbreviation for "milligram". Used as the unit for caffeine amounts (e.g. "80 mg" of caffeine per cup of coffee).
  Constraints: Keep as the locally-conventional short abbreviation (do not expand to "milligrams").

Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — destructive red button title at the bottom of the screen, title of the delete-account confirmation popup, and title of the destructive popup action. Also used as the button's accessibility label.
  Type: button label / alert title.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase for the destructive "delete user account" action. Sentence-case as a screen button; same string is reused as the alert title and the destructive button inside that alert.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~20 chars) for the button row.

en: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your added drinks and saved data will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
context:
Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — body of the confirmation popup shown after the user taps the "Delete account" button.
  Type: paragraph (alert message).
  Context: Asks the user to confirm permanent deletion of their account and warns that all added drinks and saved data will be lost forever. Paired with the "Delete account" / "Cancel" popup buttons. Wording is intentionally cautious — destructive irreversible action.

t.ar: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد حذف حسابك مع جميع المشروبات المضافة والبيانات المحفوظة؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.
t.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette din konto med alle tilføjede drikkevarer og gemte data? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
t.de: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie Ihren Account mit allen hinzugefügten Getränken und allen gespeicherten Daten löschen möchten? Dieser Schritt kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
t.en: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your added drinks and saved data will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
t.es: ¿Seguro que quieres borrar tu cuenta con todas las bebidas añadidas y datos guardados? Esta acción no se puede revertir.
t.fr: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer votre compte avec toutes les boissons ajoutées et vos données sauvegardées ? Cette action est irréversible.
t.hi: क्या आप अपना अकाउंट डिलीट करना चाहते हैं जिसमें आपका सारा डेटा और जोड़े गए सभी पेय मौजूद हैं? ऐसा करने के बाद आप पुरानी स्थिति में वापस नहीं जा पाएँगे।
t.id: Apakah Anda benar-benar ingin menghapus akun Anda, minuman yang ditambahkan dan semua data yang disimpan? Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.
t.it: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare il tuo account con tutte le bevande aggiunte e i dati salvati? Questa azione non può essere annullata.
t.ja: 本当にアカウントを削除してよろしいですか？追加したドリンクや保存したデータはすべて失われます。この操作は元に戻せません。
t.ko: 정말로 계정을 삭제하시겠어요? 추가한 모든 음료와 저장된 데이터가 사라지며, 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없습니다.
t.ms: Adakah anda benar-benar mahu memadam akaun anda, minuman yang ditambah dan semua data yang disimpan? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibatalkan.
t.nb: Er du sikker på at du vil slette kontoen din med alle drikker og lagrede data? Denne handlingen kan ikke angres.
t.nl: Weet u zeker dat u uw account wilt verwijderen met al uw toegevoegde drankjes en opgeslagen gegevens? Deze actie kan niet ongedaan gemaakt worden.
t.pl: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć swoje konto wraz ze wszystkimi dodanymi napojami i zapisanymi danymi? Tej operacji nie można cofnąć.
t.pt_BR: Tem certeza de que deseja apagar a sua conta com todos os seus dados salvos e bebidas adicionadas? Essa ação não pode ser desfeita.
t.ru: Удалить аккаунт со всеми добавленными напитками и сохранёнными данными? Действие нельзя отменить.
t.sv: Är du säker på att du vill radera ditt konto med alla dina drycker och din sparade data? Denna åtgärd kan inte ångras.
t.tr: Hesabınızı, eklenen içecekleri ve kaydedilen tüm verileri silmek istediğinizden emin misiniz? Bu işlem geri alınamaz.
t.vi: Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa tài khoản với tất cả đồ uống đã thêm và dữ liệu đã lưu của mình không? Hành động này sẽ không thể hoàn tác.
t.zh_CN: 确认删除您的账户及其所有添加的饮料和保存的数据吗？该操作无法撤销。

en: Your account and all your saved data have been deleted.
context:
Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — confirmation alert message shown after the user successfully deletes their account.
  Type: paragraph (alert message / info popup body).
  Context: Final success message confirming that the account and all related stored data (drinks, statistics) have been deleted. Displayed in an info alert presented on top of the onboarding intro screen the app falls back to after deletion.

t.ar: لقد تم حذف حسابك وجميع بياناتك المحفوظة بنجاح.
t.da: Din konto og alle dine gemte data blev slettet.
t.de: Ihr Account und alle Ihre gespeicherten Daten wurden erfolgreich gelöscht.
t.en: Your account and all your saved data have been deleted.
t.es: Tu cuenta y todos los datos guardados se han borrado con éxito.
t.fr: Votre compte et toutes vos données sauvegardées ont bien été supprimés.
t.hi: आपका अकाउंट और आपका सारा डाटा डिलीट हो चुका है।
t.id: Akun dan semua data yang disimpan berhasil dihapus.
t.it: Il tuo account e tutti i dati salvati sono stati eliminati con successo.
t.ja: あなたのアカウントと、保存されたすべてのデータが正常に削除されました。
t.ms: Akaun anda dan semua data yang disimpan berjaya dipadam.
t.nb: Kontoen din og alle lagrede data er slettet.
t.nl: Uw account en al uw opgeslagen gegevens zijn verwijderd.
t.pl: Pomyślnie usunięto twoje konto i wszystkie zapisane dane.
t.pt_BR: Sua conta e todos os seus dados salvos foram apagados com sucesso.
t.ru: Аккаунт и все сохранённые данные были успешно удалены.
t.sv: Ditt konto och all din sparade data har raderats.
t.tr: Hesap ve kaydedilen tüm veriler başarıyla silindi.
t.vi: Tài khoản của bạn và tất cả dữ liệu đã lưu của bạn đã được xóa thành công.
t.zh_CN: 您的账户和所有保存的数据已经成功删除。

context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — destructive button title that opens the "reset stats" confirmation alert (DailyNormViewController). Also reused as the alert's title.
  Type: button label / alert title.
  Context: Button / title for the destructive "Reset statistics" action that deletes all the user's logged drinks and resets statistics. Short imperative verb phrase. "Stats" is the casual short form of "statistics" — keep that register.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for a settings button row.

en: Are you sure you want to delete all your added drinks and start over? This action cannot be undone.
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — body of the confirmation alert before resetting statistics (DailyNormViewController).
  Type: error message / confirmation alert body.
  Context: Confirmation alert body shown before the destructive "Reset stats" action. Warns that all logged drinks will be deleted and the action is irreversible. Mirrors the wording used for the Delete Account confirmation. Note: the key has a historical typo (`Confoformation` instead of `Confirmation`); the typo is preserved across all locales — do not rename the key.
  Constraints: One-two sentences; preserve the explicit "cannot be undone" warning.

t.ar: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد حذف جميع المشروبات المضافة والبدء من جديد؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.
t.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette alle dine tilføjede drikkevarer og starte forfra? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
t.de: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie alle hinzugefügten Getränke löschen und neu beginnen möchten? Dieser Schritt kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
t.en: Are you sure you want to delete all your added drinks and start over? This action cannot be undone.
t.es: ¿Seguro que quieres borrar todas las bebidas añadidas y empezar de nuevo? Esta acción no se puede revertir.
t.fr: Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer toutes vos boissons ajoutées et de tout recommencer ? Cette action est irréversible.
t.hi: क्या आप अपने जोड़े गए सभी पेय हटाकर फिर से शुरुआत करना चाहते हैं? ऐसा करने के बाद आप पुरानी स्थिति में वापस नहीं जा पाएँगे।
t.id: Apakah Anda benar-benar ingin menghapus semua minuman yang ditambahkan dan mulai dari awal lagi? Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.
t.it: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare tutte le bevande aggiunte e ricominciare? Questa azione non può essere annullata.
t.ja: 本当に追加したドリンクをすべて削除し、やり直してもよろしいですか？ この操作は元に戻すことはできません。
t.ko: 추가한 음료를 모두 삭제하고 처음부터 다시 시작하시겠어요? 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없습니다.
t.ms: Adakah anda benar-benar mahu memadam semua minuman yang ditambah dan mula semula? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibatalkan.
t.nb: Er du sikker på at du vil slette alle tilførte drikker og starte på nytt? Denne handlingen kan ikke angres.
t.nl: Weet u zeker dat u al uw toegevoegde drankjes wilt verwijderen en opnieuw wilt beginnen? Deze actie kan niet ongedaan gemaakt worden.
t.pl: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć wszystkie dodane napoje i zacząć od nowa? Tej operacji nie można cofnąć.
t.pt_BR: Tem certeza de que deseja apagar todas as suas bebidas adicionadas e começar novamente? Essa ação não pode ser desfeita.
t.ru: Удалить все добавленные напитки и начать всё заново? Действие нельзя отменить.
t.sv: Är du säker på att du vill ta bort alla tillagda drycker och börja om? Denna åtgärd kan inte ångras.
t.tr: Eklenen tüm içecekleri silip baştan başlamak istediğinizden emin misiniz? Bu işlem geri alınamaz.
t.vi: Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa tất cả đồ uống đã thêm của mình và bắt đầu lại không? Hành động này sẽ không thể hoàn tác.
t.zh_CN: 确认想要删除所有添加的饮料并重新开始吗？该操作无法撤销。

en: Apple Health integration is now active. From now on, every drink you add will also be saved to Apple Health.
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health — success alert body shown after the user enables the Apple Health integration (AppleHealthService).
  Type: confirmation message.
  Context: Confirms the Apple Health integration is now active and explains that every drink the user adds will from now on be exported to Apple Health. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — keep untranslated.
  Constraints: Two sentences; preserve the meaning that future drinks (not historical ones) are exported.

t.ar: لقد تم تمكين تكامل Apple Health بنجاح. من الآن فصاعداً، سيتم تصدير جميع المشروبات الجديدة التي تقوم بإضافتها إلى Apple Health.
t.da: Integration med Apple Health er aktiveret. Fra nu af eksporteres alle nye drikkevarer, som du tilføjer, til Apple Health.
t.de: Die Integration von Apple Health wurde erfolgreich aktiviert. Von nun an werden alle neuen Getränke, die Sie hinzufügen, zu Apple Health exportiert.
t.en: Apple Health integration is now active. From now on, every drink you add will also be saved to Apple Health.
t.es: La integración con Apple Health se ha habilitado correctamente. A partir de ahora, todas las nuevas bebidas que añadas se exportarán a Apple Health.
t.fr: L'intégration d'Apple Santé a été activée avec succès. Désormais, toutes les nouvelles boissons que vous ajoutez seront exportées vers Apple Santé.
t.hi: Apple Health इंटेग्रेशन चालू हो चुका है। अब से आप जो भी नया पेय जोड़ेंगे, वह Apple Health में भी सेव हो जाएगा।
t.id: Integrasi dengan Apple Health berhasil diaktifkan, semua minuman baru akan diekspor ke Apple Health.
t.it: L'integrazione con Apple Health è stata abilitata con successo. D'ora in avanti, tutte le nuove bevande che aggiungerai verranno esportate su Apple Health.
t.ja: Apple Health との連携が有効になりました。今後追加する飲み物はすべて、Apple Health にも保存されます。
t.ko: Apple Health 통합을 활성화했습니다. 이제부터, 추가하신 모든 새 음료가 Apple Health로 내보내집니다.
t.ms: Integrasi dengan Apple Health berjaya diaktifkan. Selepas ini, semua minuman baharu yang awak tambah akan dieksport ke Apple Health.
t.nb: Integrasjon med Apple Health har blitt aktivert. Fra nå av vil alle nye drikker du legger til, eksporteres til Apple Health.
t.nl: De integratie met Apple Health is succesvol ingeschakeld. Vanaf nu worden alle nieuwe dranken die je toevoegt geëxporteerd naar Apple Health.
t.pl: Włączenie integracji Apple Health powiodło się. Od teraz wszystkie nowo dodane napoje będą eksportowane do Apple Health.
t.pt_BR: A integração com o Apple Health foi habilitada com sucesso. De agora em diante, todas as novas bebidas que você adicionar serão exportadas para o Apple Health.
t.ru: Интеграция с Apple Health успешно включена, все новые добавляемые напитки будут экспортироваться в Apple Health.
t.sv: Integration med Apple Health har aktiverats. Från och med nu kommer alla nya drycker som du lägger till att exporteras till Apple Health.
t.tr: Apple Health ile entegrasyon başarıyla etkinleştirildi, yeni eklenen tüm içecekler Apple Health'e aktarılacak.
t.vi: Tích hợp Apple Health đã được kích hoạt thành công. Từ bây giờ, tất cả đồ uống mới mà bạn thêm vào sẽ được xuất sang Apple Health.
t.zh_CN: 已成功启用 Apple Health集成功能。从现在开始，您添加的所有饮品都会被导入至Apple Health应用。

en: All added drinks have been deleted
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — success toast / alert message shown after the "Reset stats" action completes (DailyNormViewController).
  Type: confirmation message.
  Context: Confirms to the user that all their logged drinks have been deleted as part of the "Reset stats" flow. Key name reads "stat reset(t)ed" — past tense of "reset". Single short statement.
  Constraints: One sentence, ≤ ~60 chars; ends without a period as the existing English source does.

t.ar: تم حذف جميع المشروبات المُضافة بنجاح
t.de: Alle hinzugefügten Getränke wurden erfolgreich gelöscht
t.en: All added drinks have been deleted
t.es: Todas las bebidas añadidas se han eliminado con éxito
t.fr: Toutes les boissons ajoutées ont été supprimées avec succès
t.hi: जोड़े गए सभी पेय डिलीट हो चुके हैं
t.id: Semua minuman yang ditambahkan berhasil dihapus
t.it: Tutte le bevande aggiunte sono state rimosse correttamente
t.ja: 追加されたドリンク全ての削除が完了しました
t.ms: Semua minuman yang ditambah telah berjaya dipadam
t.pl: Usunięcie wszystkich dodanych napojów powiodło się
t.pt_BR: Todas as bebidas adicionadas foram deletadas com sucesso.
t.ru: Все добавленные напитки были успешно удалены
t.sv: Alla tillagda drycker har tagits bort
t.vi: Tất cả đồ uống đã thêm đã được xóa thành công
t.zh_CN: 添加的所有饮品都已成功删除

context:
Surface: Paywall subscription tier card — "BEST" badge / discount label on the recommended subscription option (Subscription / PurchaseOffer cells). Also concatenated into the VoiceOver value of the recommended offer button.
  Type: badge label.
  Context: Superlative adjective. Highlights the recommended subscription plan as the best value among the available offers. Usually rendered uppercased ("BEST"); follow target-language convention for highlight badges.
  Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) — must fit a small ribbon / badge on a tier button. No trailing punctuation.

Surface: Paywall — subscription tier button / label on the monthly subscription option.
  Type: subscription tier label.
  Context: Names the monthly subscription plan (recurring every month). Picks the most natural short word for the monthly billing period in the target language.
  Constraints: Keep to one short word; fits a narrow tier button.

Surface: Paywall / subscription plan picker — yearly tier duration label (1-year plan, paired with siblings like "monthly" / "weekly" / "threeMonths").
  Type: subscription tier label.
  Context: Names the 12-month / annual subscription option in the plan picker. Use the locale-natural short phrase for "12 months" or "1 year"; keep the number-based form ("12 months") rather than the abstract "Yearly" to match the en source style.
  Constraints: Keep short; fits a plan-tier label.

Surface: Subscription / paywall headline for non-intro-offer users — savings prefix before the computed yearly discount text.
  Type: headline prefix / badge label.
  Context: Verb meaning "save money" — concatenated with `discountLabel(percent)` to form a yearly-savings headline. NOT the generic form-save action (see separate "Save" key).
  Constraints: Keep short (≤6 chars), no exclamation.

en: Privacy policy and Terms of service
context:
Surface: Paywall — link / button below the subscription options that opens the privacy policy and terms of service. Also used as accessibility label.
  Type: button label / link label.
  Context: Combined link text "Privacy policy and Terms of service". Tapping opens the legal documents required for subscription disclosure. Keep both clauses connected by the natural conjunction in the target language.

t.en: Privacy policy and Terms of service
t.es: Política de privacidad y Términos de uso
t.fr: Politique de confidentialité et conditions d'utilisation
t.it: Informativa sulla privacy e Termini del servizio
t.ja: 個人情報保護方針と利用規約
t.ko: 개인 정보 보호 및 서비스 약관
t.pt_BR: Política de Privacidade e Termos de Serviço
t.vi: Chính sách quyền riêng tư và Điều khoản dịch vụ

en: Your subscription will renew automatically unless auto-renewal is disabled at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal. To disable this feature, simply navigate to your iTunes account and turn off auto-renewal. The subscription fee is charged to the iTunes account used when confirming the purchase.
context:
Surface: Paywall — auto-renewal disclosure paragraph shown alongside the subscription options (required iTunes / App Store subscription terms text).
  Type: paragraph (subscription terms / legal disclosure).
  Context: Mandatory iTunes auto-renewable subscription disclosure: renewal cadence, the 24-hour pre-renewal window for cancellation, where to manage auto-renewal (iTunes account settings), and that the iTunes account is charged. Wording is dictated by App Store guidelines — translate using locale-standard formal legal phrasing for auto-renewable subscriptions; do not soften or shorten the legal points.
  Tone: formal, legal/disclosure.

t.ar: سوف يتم تجديد اشتراكك تلقائيًا ما لم يتم تعطيل التجديد التلقائي قبل 24 ساعة على الأقل من نهاية فترة الاشتراك الحالية. سيتم تحصيل رسوم التجديد من الحساب خلال 24 ساعة قبل نهاية الفترة الحالية، مع تحديد تكلفة التجديد. لتعطيل هذه الميزة، ما عليك سوى الانتقال إلى حساب iTunes وإيقاف التجديد التلقائي. يتم تحصيل رسوم الاشتراك من حساب iTunes المُستخدم عند تأكيد الشراء.
t.da: Dit abonnement fornyes automatisk, medmindre automatisk fornyelse er deaktiveret mindst 24 timer inden afslutningen af den aktuelle abonnementsperiode. Du vil blive opkrævet for fornyelse inden for 24 timer inden udgangen af den nuværende periode. For at deaktivere denne funktion skal du blot navigere til din iTunes-konto og deaktivere automatisk fornyelse. Abonnementsgebyret opkræves på den iTunes-konto, der bruges, når du bekræfter købet.
t.de: Ihr Abonnement wird sich automatisch verlängern, sofern die automatische Verlängerung nicht mindestens 24 Stunden vor Ablauf des aktuellen Abonnementzeitraumes deaktiviert wird. Das Konto wird innerhalb von 24 Stunden vor Ablauf des aktuellen Zeitraums für die Verlängerung belastet, wobei die Kosten der Verlängerung ausgewiesen werden. Um dieses Option zu deaktivieren, navigieren Sie einfach zu Ihrem iTunes-Konto und schalten Sie die automatische Verlängerung aus. Die Abo-Gebühr wird dem iTunes-Konto in Rechnung gestellt, das Sie beim Bestätigen der Bestellung benutzt haben.
t.en: Your subscription will renew automatically unless auto-renewal is disabled at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal. To disable this feature, simply navigate to your iTunes account and turn off auto-renewal. The subscription fee is charged to the iTunes account used when confirming the purchase.
t.es: Tu suscripción se renovará automáticamente salvo si se desactiva la renovación automática al menos 24 horas antes de que acabe el período de suscripción actual. Se cobrará la renovación a la cuenta dentro de las 24 horas previas al final del período actual, indicando el coste de la renovación. Para deshabilitar esta función, solo tienes que acceder a tu cuenta de iTunes y desactivar la renovación automática. La tarifa de suscripción se carga a la cuenta de iTunes al confirmar la compra.
t.fr: Votre abonnement sera renouvelé automatiquement sauf si le renouvellement automatique est désactivé au moins 24 heures avant la fin de la période d'abonnement en cours. Le compte sera débité du renouvellement dans les 24 heures précédant la fin de la période en cours, avec indication du coût du renouvellement. Pour désactiver cette fonctionnalité, accédez simplement à votre compte iTunes et désactivez le renouvellement automatique. Les frais d'abonnement sont imputés au compte iTunes utilisé lors de la confirmation d'achat.
t.hi: वर्तमान सब्स्क्रिप्शन के खत्म होने वाली तारीख के 24 घंटे के पहले अगर आप ऑटो-रेन्युवल को डिसेबल नहीं करते तो आपका सब्स्क्रिप्शन स्वतः ही रेन्यू हो जाएगा। वर्तमान सब्स्क्रिप्शन के खत्म होने वाली तारीख के 24 घंटे के भीतर ही आपसे रेन्युवल चार्ज ले लिया जाएगा। इस फीचर को डिसेबल करने के लिए, आप आईट्यून्स अकाउंट में जाकर ऑटो-रेन्युवल को बंद कर दें। खरीदते समय उपयोग किए गए आईट्यून्स अकाउंट से सब्स्क्रिप्शन चार्ज लिया जाता है।
t.id: Periode berlangganan akan diperbarui secara otomatis kecuali pembaruan otomatis dinonaktifkan setidaknya 24 jam sebelum akhir periode berlangganan. Akun akan ditagih untuk pembaruan dalam 24 jam sebelum akhir periode saat ini, dan biaya pembaruan akan ditampilkan. Untuk menonaktifkan fitur ini, buka akun iTunes Anda dan nonaktifkan pembaruan otomatis. Pembayaran dilakukan melalui akun iTunes yang digunakan saat mengonfirmasi pembelian.
t.it: L'abbonamento verrà rinnovato automaticamente a meno che il rinnovo automatico non venga disabilitato almeno 24 ore prima della fine del periodo di abbonamento corrente. L'account verrà addebitato per il rinnovo entro 24 ore prima della fine del periodo corrente, con indicazione del costo del rinnovo. Per disabilitare questa funzione, accedi semplicemente al tuo account iTunes e disattiva il rinnovo automatico. La quota di iscrizione viene addebitata sull'account iTunes utilizzato al momento della conferma dell'acquisto.
t.ja: 現在の定期購読期間終了の 24 時間以上前に自動更新を無効にしなければ、お客様の定期購読は自動的に更新されます。現在の期間終了の 24 時間前までに、更新分の料金がアカウントに請求され、更新にかかる料金が表示されます。自動更新機能を無効にするには、お客様の iTunes アカウントにて、自動更新をオフにしてください。購読料は、購読購入確認時に使用された iTunes アカウントに請求されます。
t.ko: 현재의 구독 기간 종료 최소 24시간 전에 자동 갱신이 비활성화되지 않으면 귀하의 구독은 자동으로 갱신될 것입니다. 현재 기간 종료 24시간 전에 갱신 요금이 계정에 부과되며, 해당 갱신 요금이 표시됩니다. 이 기능을 비활성화하려면, 귀하의 iTunes 계정을 찾아 자동 갱신 기능을 끄면 됩니다. 구독비는 구매 확인 시에 사용된 iTunes 계정으로 부과됩니다.
t.ms: Tempoh langganan akan diperbaharui secara automatik kecuali pembaharuan automatik dinonaktifkan sekurangnya 24 jam sebelum akhir tempoh langganan. Akaun akan dikenakan caj untuk pembaharuan dalam masa 24 jam sebelum akhir tempoh semasa, dan kos pembaharuan akan ditunjukkan. Untuk mematikan fungsi ini, pergi ke akaun iTunes anda dan mematikan pembaharuan automatik. Pembayaran dilakukan melalui akaun iTunes yang digunakan dalam masa mengesahkan pembelian.
t.nb: Abonnementet ditt fornyes automatisk med mindre automatisk fornyelse er deaktivert minst 24 timer før slutten av den nåværende abonnementsperioden. Kontoen belastes for fornyelse innen 24 timer før slutten av den nåværende perioden og identifiserer kostnaden for fornyelsen. For å deaktivere denne funksjonen, bare naviger til iTunes-kontoen din og slå av automatisk fornyelse. Abonnementsgebyret belastes iTunes-kontoen som ble brukt til å bekrefte kjøpet.
t.nl: Je abonnement wordt automatisch verlengd, tenzij automatische verlenging ten minste 24 uur vóór het einde van de huidige abonnementsperiode is uitgeschakeld. De verlenging wordt binnen 24 uur vóór het einde van de huidige periode op het account in rekening gebracht, met vermelding van de kosten van de verlenging. Om deze functie uit te schakelen, navigeer je eenvoudig naar je iTunes-account en schakel je automatisch verlengen uit. De abonnementskosten worden in rekening gebracht op het iTunes-account dat wordt gebruikt bij het bevestigen van de aankoop.
t.pl: Twoja subskrypcja zostanie automatycznie odnowiona, chyba że funkcja automatycznego odnawiania zostanie wyłączona co najmniej 24 godziny przed zakończeniem aktualnego okresu subskrypcji. Opłata za odnowienie zostanie pobrana z konta w ciągu 24 godzin przed zakończeniem bieżącego okresu, ze wskazaniem kosztu odnowienia. Aby wyłączyć tę funkcję, wystarczy przejść do konta iTunes i wyłączyć funkcję automatycznego odnawiania. Opłata za subskrypcję zostaje naliczona w koncie iTunes, gdy potwierdzany jest zakup.
t.pt_BR: Sua assinatura será renovada automaticamente, a não ser que a renovação automática seja desabilitada pelo menos 24 horas antes do final do período de assinatura atual. A conta será cobrada pela renovação dentro de 24 horas antes do final do período atual, com indicação do custo da renovação. Para cancelar esse recurso, basta acessar sua conta iTunes e desativar a renovação automática. O custo da assinatura é cobrado na conta iTunes utilizada depois da confirmação da compra.
t.ru: Срок подписки будет автоматически продлеваться, если автоматическое продление не будет отключено минимум за 24 часа до окончания текущего периода подписки. Плата за продление будет списана с учётной записи в течение 24 часов до окончания текущего периода, с указанием стоимости продления. Чтобы отключить эту функцию, просто перейдите на свою учётную запись iTunes и отключите автоматическое продление. Оплата снимается с учётной записи iTunes, которая использовалась при подтверждении покупки.
t.sv: Din prenumeration förnyas automatiskt om inte automatisk förnyelse inaktiveras minst 24 timmar före slutet av den nuvarande prenumerationsperioden. Kontot debiteras för förnyelsen inom 24 timmar före slutet av den aktuella perioden. För att inaktivera den här funktionen, navigera helt enkelt till ditt iTunes-konto och stäng av automatisk förnyelse. Prenumerationsavgiften debiteras det iTunes-konto som användes vid bekräftelse av köpet.
t.tr: Mevcut abonelik süresinin bitiminden en az 24 saat önce otomatik yenileme kapatılmadığı sürece, abonelik otomatik olarak yenilenecektir. Mevcut dönemin bitiminden önceki 24 saat içinde yenileme ücreti hesabınızdan tahsil edilecek ve yenileme maliyeti belirtilecektir. Bu özelliği kapatmak için iTunes hesabınıza gitmeniz ve otomatik yenilemeyi kapatmanız yeterlidir. Ödeme, satın alma onayında kullanılan iTunes hesabından tahsil edilecektir.
t.vi: Việc đăng ký của bạn sẽ tự động gia hạn trừ khi tính năng tự động gia hạn bị tắt ít nhất 24 giờ trước khi kết thúc giai đoạn đăng ký hiện tại. Tài khoản sẽ bị tính phí gia hạn trong vòng 24 giờ trước khi kết thúc giai đoạn hiện tại và xác định chi phí gia hạn. Để tắt tính năng này, chỉ cần đi đến tài khoản iTunes của bạn và tắt tính năng tự động gia hạn. Phí đăng ký được tính vào tài khoản iTunes mà bạn sử dụng khi xác nhận mua hàng.
t.zh_CN: 除非在当前订阅到期 24 小时前或更早取消自动续订，否则您的订阅将自动续期。续订费用将在当前周期结束前 24 小时内从您的账户扣除，并显示续订的费用。为了禁用此功能，您需前往您的 iTunes 账户并关闭自动续订。订阅费用由确认购买时使用的 iTunes 账户支付。

en: For extended features such as different beverages, detailed statistics, custom volumes and other useful features get the My Water Premium. Two different plans: 1 month/1$ and 12 months/12$ with discount price. My Water Premium subscription: The purchase will be charged to your iTunes account The subscription will be auto-renewed 24 hours prior to it running out Manage your subscription from User Settings in iTunes after purchasing. Cancel the auto-renewing subscription from there at anytime. Terms and Privacy Policy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
context:
Surface: App Store Connect listing — subscription terms / promotional text section.
  Type: paragraph (subscription terms).
  Context: Promotional + legal subscription disclosure shown on the App Store product page. Lists premium features, the two subscription plans (1-month and 12-month), iTunes billing terms, auto-renewal disclosure, and the Privacy Policy URL. Note: the legacy key has a typo ("Tems" instead of "Terms") — do not rename the key. Prices "1$" and "12$" are placeholders for App Store display, not literal — replace with locale-relevant subscription price strings. Not used in app code — uploaded as ASC metadata.
  Constraints: ≤4000 chars in ASC; preserve URL https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/ exactly. Keep brand "My Water Premium" untranslated as a proper noun.
  Tone: warm but legally-clear; not aggressive.

Dos planes diferentes: 1 mes/1 $ y 12 meses/12 $ con descuento. Suscripción a My Water Premium: La compra se cobrará en tu cuenta de iTunes. La suscripción se renovará automáticamente 24 horas antes de que termine. Gestiona tu suscripción desde los ajustes de usuario de iTunes tras la compra. Deux forfaits différents : 1 mois/1 $ et 12 mois/12 $ avec réduction. Gérez votre abonnement à partir des paramètres utilisateur dans iTunes après l'achat. Annulez à tout moment l'abonnement à renouvellement automatique à partir de là. Conditions générales et politique de confidentialité : https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.hi: अलग-अलग पेय पदार्थ, विस्तृत आंकड़े, कस्टम मात्रा जैसे फीचर्स पाने के लिए आज ही My Water प्रीमियम लें। 2 प्लान: 1$/1 महीना और 12$ 12 महीनों के लिए डिस्काउंट के साथ। My Water प्रीमियम सब्स्क्रिप्शन: खरीदने पर आपका आईट्यून्स अकाउंट चार्ज किया जाएगा खत्म होने के 24 घंटों के पहले आपका सब्स्क्रिप्शन ऑटो-रेन्यु हो जाएगा खरीदने के बाद आप यूज़र सेटिंग में जा कर अपना सब्स्क्रिप्शन मैनेज कर सकते हैं और यहीं से आप ऑटो-रेन्युवल बंद कर सकते हैं। शर्तें और गोपनीयता पॉलिसी: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.id: Untuk fitur lanjutan seperti berbagai minuman, statistik detail, volume khusus dan fitur-fitur berguna lain, dapatkan My Water Premium. Dua rencana yang berbeda: 1 bulan/1$ dan 12 bulan/12$. My Water Premium: Pembelian akan ditambahkan ke akun iTunes Anda. Langganan otomatis diperbarui 24 jam sebelum kadaluarsa. Kelola langganan Anda pada pengaturan pengguna di iTunes setelah pembelian. Batalkan pembaruan otomatis kapan pun. Ketentuan dan Kebijakan Privasi: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.it: Per funzionalità estese come bevande diverse, statistiche dettagliate, quantità personalizzate ed altre utili funzioni, acquista My Water Premium. Sono disponibili due differenti piani: 1 mese / 1 $ e 12 mesi / 12 $ con prezzo scontato. Abbonamento My Water Premium: L'acquisto verrà addebitato sul tuo account iTunes L'abbonamento si rinnoverà automaticamente 24 ore prima della scadenza Dopo l'acquisto potrai gestire il tuo abbonamento dalle impostazioni utente di iTunes. Da lì potrai annullare in qualsiasi momento il rinnovo automatico dell'abbonamento. Termini e politica sulla privacy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ja: My Water Premium で、さらに幅広い機能を利用しよう。色々な種類の飲料、詳細な記録データ、自由な量設定ほか便利な機能がいっぱい。 2つの異なるプラン:1か月（1ドル）、12か月（12ドルのところを割引価格に） My Water Premium サブスクリプション: 料金はiTunes のアカウントにご請求いたします。 サブスクリプションは期間終了の24時間前に自動更新されます。 サブスクリプションはご購入後、iTunes の「設定」で管理してください。サブスクリプションの自動更新はそちらから、いつでもキャンセルできます。 利用規約およびプライバシーポリシー: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ko: 다양한 음료, 상세 통계, 사용자 지정 볼륨, 기타 유용한 기능 등 확장 기능을 원하시면 My Water Premium을 이용하세요. 두 가지 요금제: 할인된 가격으로 1개월/1$ 및 12개월/12$ My Water Premium 구독권: 결제 금액은 iTunes 계정으로 청구됩니다. 만료일 24시간 전에 자동으로 갱신됩니다. 구매 후 iTunes 사용자 설정에서 구독을 관리하세요. 거기에서 언제든 구독 자동 갱신을 취소할 수 있습니다. 이용 약관 및 개인정보 보호정책: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/

Dua pelan berbeza: 1 bulan/1$ dan 12 bulan/12$ dengan harga diskaun. Batalkan langganan auto-pembaharuan dari sana pada bila-bila masa. Terma dan Dasar Privasi: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.nb: Hvis du vil ha flere funksjoner som forskjellige drikker, detaljert statistikk, tilpassede volumer og andre nyttige funksjoner, får du Mitt Vann Premium. To forskjellige planer: 1 måned/1$ og 12 måneder/12$ med rabattert pris. Twee verschillende abonnementen: 1maand/1$ en 12 maanden/12$ met korting. My Water Premium abonnement: De aankoop zal in rekening worden gebracht van uw iTunes account. Het abonnement wordt 24 uur voor afloop automatisch verlengd. Beheer uw abonnement na aankoop in Gebruikersinstellingen in iTunes. U kunt daar het automatisch verlengen op elk gewenst moment annuleren. Algemene voorwaarden en privacybeleid: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/

Dwa różne plany: 1 miesiąc/1$ i 12 miesięcy/12$ z ceną dyskontową.
