Tam też, w dowolnym momencie, możesz anulować automatyczne odnawianie subskrypcji. Zasady i polityka prywatności: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.pt_BR: Para acessar mais recursos, como bebidas diferentes, estatísticas detalhadas, volumes personalizados e outras funções úteis, adquira o My Water Premium. Dois planos diferentes: 1 mês/US$ 1 e 12 meses/US$ 12 com desconto. Assinatura do My Water Premium: A compra será cobrada em sua conta do iTunes A assinatura será renovada automaticamente 24 horas antes do prazo terminar Gerencie sua assinatura nas Configurações de usuário no iTunes após a compra. Cancele a assinatura com renovação automática nas configurações a qualquer momento. Termos e Política de privacidade: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ru: Для расширенных функций, таких как различные напитки, подробная статистика, нестандартные объёмы и другие полезные функции получите My Water Premium. Два разных плана: 1 месяц/1$ и 12 месяцев/12$. My Water Premium: Покупка будет добавлена в ваш аккаунт iTunes. Подписка будет автоматически продлена за 24 часа до её истечения. Управляйте подпиской в настройках пользователя в iTunes после покупки. Отмените автоматическое продление подписки в любое время. t.sv: För fler funktioner som olika drycker, detaljerad statistik, anpassade volymer och andra användbara funktioner skaffa dig Mitt Vatten Premium. Två olika planer: 1 månad/1$ och 12 månader/12$ med rabatterat pris. Mitt Vatten Premium prenumeration: Köpet debiteras ditt iTunes-konto Prenumerationen förnyas automatiskt 24 timmar innan den tar slut Hantera din prenumeration i Användarinställningar på iTunes efter köpet. Avbryt den automatiskt förnyade prenumerationen där när som helst. Villkor och sekretesspolicy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.tr: Çeşitli içecekler, ayrıntılı istatistikler, özel hacimler ve diğer faydalı özellikler gibi gelişmiş özellikler için My Water Premium edinin. İki farklı plan: 1 ay / 1 dolar ve 12 ay / 12 dolar. My Water Premium: Satın alma, iTunes hesabınıza eklenecektir. Abonelik, sona erme tarihinden 24 saat önce otomatik olarak yenilenecektir. Aboneliğinizi satın aldıktan sonra iTunes'daki kullanıcı tercihlerinden yönetin. Aboneliğinizin otomatik olarak yenilenmesini istediğiniz zaman iptal edin. Şartlar ve Gizlilik Politikası: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.vi: Để sử dụng các tính năng mở rộng như đồ uống khác nhau, thống kê chi tiết, thể tích uống tùy chỉnh và các tính năng hữu ích khác, hãy kích hoạt My Water Premium. Hai phương án khác nhau: 1 tháng/1$ và 12 tháng/12$ với giá chiết khấu. Đăng ký My Water Premium: Giao dịch mua sẽ được tính vào tài khoản iTunes của bạn Việc đăng ký sẽ được tự động gia hạn 24 giờ trước khi hết hạn Quản lý việc đăng ký của bạn từ Cài đặt Người dùng trong iTunes sau khi mua. Hủy đăng ký tự động gia hạn từ đó bất cứ lúc nào. Điều khoản và Chính sách Bảo mật: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.zh_CN: 为了使用扩展功能，如：不同的饮料、详细的统计、自定义饮水量、以及其他实用功能，请购买 My Water Premium 版。 两个不同的套餐: 1 个月折扣价为 1 美元，12 个月折扣价为 12 美元。 My Water Premium 版订阅: 购买将从您的 iTunes 账户收取费用 订阅会在到期前 24 小时自动续订 购买后，可通过 iTunes 中的用户设置管理您的订阅。您可随时在用户设置中取消自动续订功能。 条款和隐私政策：https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/

en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal. Start your active lifestyle today!
context:
Surface: Paywall — promotional value-proposition paragraph (currently no live call-sites in Swift; preserved for legacy / re-introduced paywall layouts).
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Two-sentence promotional claim that premium users achieve their goal more often, framed as "42% more water". Concludes with a CTA inviting the user to step into an active lifestyle. Uses legacy "Full version" wording.
  Tone: Promotional but warm — encouraging, not aggressive.

t.ar: يشرب مستخدمو الإصدار الكامل كمية مياه تزيد عمن سواهم بنسبة 42[%] ويحققون أهدافهم. ابدأ نمط حياة نشط الآن!
t.da: Brugere med fuld version drikker 42[%] mere vand og når deres mål. Kom i gang med en aktiv livsstil nu!
t.de: Nutzer der Vollversion trinken 42[%] mehr Wasser und erreichen so ihr Ziel. Beginnen Sie jetzt mit einer aktiven Lebensweise!
t.en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal. Start your active lifestyle today!
t.es: Los usuarios de la versión completa beben un 42[%] más de agua y alcanzan su objetivo. ¡Da el paso hacia un estilo de vida saludable!
t.fr: Les utilisateurs de la version complète boivent 42[%] d'eau en plus et atteignent leur objectif. Adoptez dès maintenant un mode de vie actif!
t.hi: फुल वर्ज़न का प्रयोग करने वाले लोग 42[%] ज़्यादा पानी पीते हैं और अपना लक्ष्य हासिल करते हैं। अपनी लाइफ़स्टाइल को एक्टिव बनाएँ!
t.id: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai target mereka. Mulailah gaya hidup aktif sekarang!
t.it: Gli utenti della versione completa bevono il 42[%] di acqua in più e raggiungono il loro obiettivo. Adotta subito uno stile di vita attivo!
t.ja: 完全版なら42[%]多くの水を飲んで目標を達成できます。 さあ、生き生きとした生活を始めましょう！
t.ko: 풀버젼 사용자들은 42[%]의 더 많은 물을 섭취하며 목표를 달성했습니다. 적극적 라이프스타일에 좀 더 가까이 도달하세요!
t.ms: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai matlamat mereka. Mulakan gaya hidup aktif sekarang!
t.nb: Brukere av fullversjonen drikker 42[%] mer vann og oppnår målet sitt. Start en aktiv livsstil nå!
t.nl: In de volledige versie drinken gebruikers 42[%] meer water en bereiken hun doel. Begin nu aan een actieve levensstijl!
t.pl: Użytkownicy pełnej wersji piją 42[%] więcej wody i osiągają swój cel. Zacznij teraz żyć aktywnie!
t.pt_BR: Os usuários da versão completa bebem 42[%] mais água e atingem seu objetivo. Entre no estilo de vida ativo agora!
t.ru: Пользователи полной версии пьют на 42[%] больше воды и достигают поставленной цели. Начни активный образ жизни прямо сейчас!
t.sv: Användare av den fullständiga versionen dricker 42[%] mer vatten och uppnår sitt mål. Börja en aktiv livsstil nu!
t.tr: Tam sürümün kullanıcıları [%]42 daha fazla su içer ve hedeflerine ulaşırlar. Hemen şimdi aktif bir yaşam tarzı başlatın!
t.vi: Người dùng phiên bản đầy đủ uống nhiều nước hơn 42[%] và dễ đạt được mục tiêu của họ. Hãy bước vào lối sống năng động ngay bây giờ!
t.zh_CN: 完整版用户多喝 42[%] 的水并达成饮水目标。现在就开始积极的生活方式吧！

en: Our app will help you drink more water and lead a healthy lifestyle every day!
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro screen — top hero paragraph shown above the sign-up / continue buttons (separate from the carousel slides).
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: One-line pitch summarising the app's value proposition before the user enters the carousel / signup flow. Friendly first-person plural voice — "our application" framing the app as a partner.

t.ar: سوف يساعدك تطبيقنا على شرب المزيد من المياه والتمتع بأسلوب حياة صحي كل يوم!
t.da: Vores app hjælper dig med at drikke mere vand og føre en sund livsstil hver dag!
t.de: Unsere App hilft dir, jeden Tag mehr Wasser zu trinken und einen gesunden Lebensstil zu führen!
t.en: Our app will help you drink more water and lead a healthy lifestyle every day!
t.es: Nuestra aplicación te ayudará a beber más agua y a llevar un estilo de vida saludable todos los días
t.fr: Notre application vous aidera à boire plus d'eau et à adopter un mode de vie sain chaque jour!
t.hi: हमारी ऐप तुम्हें ज़्यादा पानी पीने और रोज़ हेल्दी रहने में मदद करेगी!
t.id: Aplikasi kami akan membantu kamu minum lebih banyak air dan menjalani gaya hidup sehat setiap hari!
t.it: La nostra applicazione ti aiuterà a bere più acqua e a seguire uno stile di vita sano tutti i giorni!
t.ja: このアプリが、もっと水を飲んで毎日健康的なライフスタイルを送れるようサポートします！
t.ko: 저희 앱을 이용하면 물도 더 많이 마시고 매일 건강한 생활 습관을 이어갈 수 있어요!
t.ms: Aplikasi kami akan membantu anda minum lebih banyak air dan mengamalkan gaya hidup sihat setiap hari!
t.nb: Appen vår hjelper deg med å drikke mer vann og føre en sunn livsstil hver dag!
t.nl: Onze app helpt je om meer water te drinken en elke dag gezond te leven!
t.pl: Nasza aplikacja pomoże Ci pić więcej wody i prowadzić zdrowy tryb życia każdego dnia!
t.pt_BR: Nosso aplicativo ajudará você a beber mais água e ter um estilo de vida saudável todos os dias!
t.ru: Наше приложение поможет тебе пить больше воды и вести здоровый образ жизни каждый день!
t.sv: Vår app hjälper dig att dricka mer vatten och leda en hälsosam livsstil varje dag!
t.tr: Uygulamamız her gün daha fazla su içmene ve sağlıklı bir yaşam sürmene yardımcı olacak!
t.vi: Ứng dụng của chúng tôi sẽ giúp bạn uống nhiều nước hơn và có lối sống lành mạnh mỗi ngày!
t.zh_CN: 我们的应用程序将帮助你多喝水，让每一天变得更加健康！

en: The full version helps you reach your daily goal faster!
context:
Surface: Main screen — premium upsell banner / cell (FullVersionCell, PurchaseOfferCell) and classic main-screen promotion banner.
  Type: paragraph (marketing banner) / accessibility value.
  Context: In-app promotional banner shown to free users on the main screen — claims the full version helps reach the daily goal faster. Used both as visible label and as the cell's accessibility value. Uses legacy "Full version" wording.
  Tone: Promotional but warm.

t.ar: ستُساعدك النُّسخة الكاملة على الوصول إلى هدفك اليومي بشكل أسرع!
t.da: Den fulde version hjælper dig med at nå dit daglige mål hurtigere!
t.de: Mit der Vollversion werden Sie Ihr Tagesziel viel schneller erreichen!
t.en: The full version helps you reach your daily goal faster!
t.es: ¡La versión completa te ayudará a alcanzar tu objetivo diario más rápido!
t.fr: La version complète vous aidera à plus vite atteindre votre objectif quotidien!
t.hi: फुल वर्ज़न तुम्हें अपना रोज़ का लक्ष्य जल्दी पूरा करने में मदद करता है!
t.id: Versi lengkap akan membantu mencapai target harian lebih cepat!
t.it: La versione completa ti aiuterà a raggiungere più facilmente il tuo obiettivo giornaliero!
t.ja: フルバージョンなら毎日の目標到達が早くなります！
t.ko: 풀버전을 이용하면 일일 목표에 더 빠르게 도달할 수 있습니다!
t.ms: Versi lengkap akan membantu mencapai matlamat harian lebih cepat!
t.nb: Den fulle versjonen hjelper deg å nå ditt daglige mål raskere!
t.nl: Met de volledige versie bereik je je dagelijkse doel sneller!
t.pl: Pełna wersja pomoże Ci osiągnąć swój codzienny cel szybciej!
t.pt_BR: A versão completa ajudará você a alcançar sua meta diária mais rapidamente!
t.ru: Полная версия поможет достичь дневной цели быстрее!
t.sv: Den fullständiga versionen hjälper dig att nå ditt dagliga mål snabbare!
t.tr: Tam sürüm, günlük hedefine daha hızlı ulaşmana yardımcı olacak!
t.vi: Phiên bản đầy đủ sẽ giúp bạn đạt được mục tiêu hàng ngày nhanh hơn!
t.zh_CN: 完整版将帮助你更快地达成每日目标！

context:
Surface: Onboarding welcome / intro primary CTA and Classic main-screen promotion banner fallback CTA.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb phrase inviting the user to start using the app / promotion right away. Use the locale-natural short imperative; not a literal "begin walking / starting up" sense.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤12 chars on narrow screens). No trailing period.

Surface: Subscription / paywall — headline shown for introductory-offer users; also used in horizontal benefits paywall.
  Type: badge / banner headline.
  Context: Short marketing label flagging a limited-time discounted subscription offer. Standard sales / e-commerce phrasing.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤20 chars). No trailing period.
  Tone: promotional.

Surface: Onboarding "choose calculation" screen — pro header label; Subscription compare table header — "Full" column header (premium tier column, paired with "Free").
  Type: column header / section label.
  Context: Short label for the paid / premium tier of the app. Often shown side-by-side with the "Free" tier label in feature comparison tables.
  Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) — must fit a narrow comparison-table column.

Surface: Subscription compare table — "Free" column header (free tier column, paired with "Full").
  Type: column header / section label.
  Context: Short label for the basic / free tier of the app. Shown side-by-side with the "Full" tier label in the feature comparison table.
  Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) — must fit a narrow comparison-table column.

Surface: Paywall / subscription screen — large discount badge label.
  Type: badge.
  Context: Promotional badge displayed near the price to highlight a 50% discount on the subscription offer.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars); fits a prominent badge. Note: the literal `%` character in the key name is unusual but accepted by the .strings file format — do not rename the key.
  Tone: promotional.

Surface: Paywall — social proof label on rating / reviews cell (RatingCell, LongSubscriptionRatingCell).
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim) / social proof.
  Context: Social proof claim about the size of the user base. Note: the English source reads "7 millions" (legacy phrasing, ungrammatical plural) — render the natural plural form for "million" in the target language. The legacy key id mentions "5Million" but the current value is "7 million"; do not rename the key.
  Constraints: Keep short — fits on one line in the reviews cell header.

t.es: Más de 7 millones de usuarios satisfechos.
t.hi: 7 मिलियन से भी अधिक प्रसन्न उपयोगकर्ता
t.it: Più di 7 milioni di utenti felici
t.ja: 700万人以上の幸せなユーザー
t.pt_BR: Mais de 7 milhões de usuários felizes
t.vi: Hơn 7 triệu người dùng hài lòng

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations — row title for the "Export data to CSV" entry (currently disabled / preview row in the integrations list).
  Type: row title.
  Context: Action label that exports the user's logged drink data as a CSV spreadsheet file. "CSV" is a file-format acronym — keep as "CSV" (uppercase) untranslated in all locales.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit a single-line row title.

t.fr: Exporter les données au format CSV
t.ja: データをCSVにエクスポート

context:
Surface: Paywall / Premium features list — premium feature row title.
  Type: row title (premium feature).
  Context: Premium-feature label promoting the home-screen widget that lets users log drinks quickly without opening the app. Refers to the iOS home-screen widget.
  Constraints: Keep short — fits a single-line feature row.

t.ja: ウィジェットから素早く追加する
t.vi: Thêm nhanh nhờ có tiện ích

context:
Surface: Paywall onboarding subscription — feature card title in the horizontal cards carousel (ForgetAddDrinkCardView).
  Type: feature card title.
  Context: Marketing feature card promoting that premium users can log drinks for past dates (back-fill missed days). Short noun phrase describing the feature.
  Constraints: Keep concise — fits a small card title.

t.fr: Ajout de boissons pour les jours passés
t.hi: बीते दिनों के लिए पेय जोड़ना
t.ja: 以前の日々にドリンクを追加する
t.nb: Legg til drikker de siste dagene
t.pt_BR: Adição de bebidas em datas passadas
t.sv: Lägg till drycker för tidigare dagar
t.vi: Thêm đồ uống vào những ngày trước đây
t.zh_CN: 添加过去几天喝的饮料

context:
Surface: Paywall — short free-trial CTA button.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative invitation to start the free trial of the premium subscription. Generic short variant (no day count) — pair with the longer "tryThreeDaysLabel" / "trySevenDaysLabel" when the trial length is known.
  Constraints: Keep very short — fits a narrow CTA button.

Surface: Paywall — subscription terms description under the CTA (currently unreferenced in Swift code, preserved for legacy / re-introduced paywall layouts).
  Type: paragraph (subscription terms).
  Context: Describes the free-trial subscription terms — three free days, then the localized price per period.
  Placeholders:
    %@ — localized formatted price (e.g. "$9.99", "2 000 RUB")
    %@ — billing period name (e.g. "year", "month")
  Tone: neutral / informative.

t.de: Teste es 3 Tage lang kostenlos, danach für [%s]/[%s]
t.pl: Wypróbuj trzy dni za darmo, a potem [%s]/[%s]
t.pt_BR: Experimente três dias grátis e, em seguida, [%s]/[%s]
t.vi: Thử 3 ngày miễn phí, sau đó [%s]/[%s]
t.zh_CN: 免费试用 3 天，然后收费[%s]/[%s]

context:
Surface: Subscription paywall — primary CTA / hero label shown when the user is offered a 3-day introductory trial (paired sibling: "trySevenDaysLabel" for the 7-day variant; selector lives in SubscriptionService.getIntorductionaryOfferDurationTitle).
  Type: button label / paywall hero label.
  Context: Imperative invitation to start the 3-day free trial of My Water Premium. Used on the main CTA or as the highlighted intro-offer label on the paywall.
  Constraints: Keep short (1 line, ≤22 chars on narrow phones); no trailing period.
  Tone: promotional but warm.

Surface: app-wide.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative verb. Generic skip action used in multi-step flows (e.g. onboarding, optional setup steps, paywall close affordance) to bypass the current step without applying it. Sentence-case.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: Apphud billing-error push notification, title — legacy Apphud rule-based variant.
  Type: notification title.
  Context: Title for an Apphud-triggered push sent when subscription auto-renewal fails (expired card, declined charge); paired with appHudSubscriptionBillingErrorText. Preserved for legacy Apphud campaigns; pushBillingIssueTitle is the current canonical equivalent.

t.ar: يُرجى تحديث معلومات الدفع الخاصة بك
t.fr: Veuillez mettre à jour vos informations de paiement
t.hi: कृपया, अपनी भुगतान जानकारी अपडेट करें
t.it: Per favore, aggiorni le Sue informazioni di pagamento
t.ja: お支払いの情報を更新してください
t.pt_BR: Por favor, atualize as suas informações de pagamento
t.vi: Vui lòng cập nhật thông tin thanh toán của bạn

en: Subscription cannot be renewed because the payment failed. Update your card details to keep using all the app's features and drink more water.
context:
Surface: Apphud billing-error push notification, body — legacy Apphud rule-based variant.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Body of the Apphud-triggered push notifying that auto-renewal failed and prompting the user to update card details. Preserved for legacy Apphud campaigns; pushBillingIssueText is the current canonical equivalent.

t.ar: لا يمكن تجديد الاشتراك بسبب خطأ في دفع الاشتراك. قم بتحديث تفاصيل بطاقتك لاستخدام جميع ميزات التطبيق واشرب المزيد من الماء.
t.da: Abonnementet kan ikke fornyes, fordi betalingen mislykkedes. Opdater dine kortoplysninger for at bruge alle appfunktionerne og drikke mere vand.
t.de: Das Abo kann aufgrund eines Fehlers bei der Bezahlung nicht verlängert werden. Aktualisiere deine Karteninformationen, um alle Funktionen der App nutzen zu können, und trink mehr Wasser.
t.en: Subscription cannot be renewed because the payment failed. Update your card details to keep using all the app's features and drink more water.
t.es: No puede renovarse la suscripción debido a un error en el pago. Actualice los detalles de su tarjeta para usar todas las características de la aplicación y beba más agua.
t.fr: L'abonnement ne peut pas être renouvelé car le paiement a échoué. Mettez à jour les informations de votre carte pour utiliser toutes les fonctionnalités de l'application et pour boire plus d'eau.
t.hi: सदस्यता के भुगतान में गलती के कारण सदस्यता का नवीनीकरण नहीं किया जा सकता है। ऐप की सभी सुविधाओं का उपयोग करने और अधिक पानी पीने के लिए अपने कार्ड का विवरण अपडेट करें।
t.id: Langganan tidak dapat diperpanjang karena pembayaran gagal. Perbarui data kartu Anda untuk memakai semua fitur aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air.
t.it: L'abbonamento non può essere rinnovato a causa di un errore di pagamento. Aggiorni i dati della Sua carta per continuare a usare tutte le funzioni dell'app e bere più acqua.
t.ja: お支払いのエラーにより、サブスクリプションを更新できません。カード情報を更新して、アプリのすべての機能を使いながら、もっと水を飲みましょう。
t.ko: 결제에 실패하여 구독을 갱신할 수 없습니다. 앱의 모든 기능을 계속 이용하고 물을 더 많이 마실 수 있도록 카드 정보를 업데이트해 주세요.
t.ms: Langganan tidak dapat diperbaharui kerana pembayaran gagal. Kemas kini butiran kad anda untuk terus menggunakan semua fungsi aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air.
t.nb: Abonnementet kan ikke fornyes på grunn av en feil i betalingen for abonnementet. Oppdater kortinformasjonen din for å bruke alle funksjonene i appen og drikke mer vann.
t.nl: Het abonnement kan niet worden verlengd vanwege een fout bij de betaling van het abonnement. Werk uw kaartgegevens bij om alle functies van de app te kunnen gebruiken en drink meer water.
t.pl: Nie można odnowić subskrypcji z powodu nieudanej płatności. Wprowadź aktualne dane karty, aby korzystać ze wszystkich funkcji aplikacji i pić więcej wody.
t.pt_BR: A assinatura não pode ser renovada porque o pagamento falhou. Atualize os detalhes do seu cartão para usar todos os recursos do app e beber mais água.
t.ru: Подписка не может быть продлена из-за ошибки оплаты. Обновите данные карты, чтобы пользоваться всеми функциями приложения и пить больше воды.
t.sv: Prenumerationen kan inte förnyas eftersom betalningen misslyckades. Uppdatera dina kortuppgifter för att använda alla funktioner i appen och dricka mer vatten.
t.tr: Abonelik ödemesindeki bir hata nedeniyle abonelik yenilenemedi. Uygulamanın tüm özelliklerini kullanmak ve daha fazla su içmek için lütfen kart bilgilerinizi güncelleyin.
t.vi: Không thể gia hạn đăng ký do có lỗi trong việc thanh toán đối với đăng ký. Cập nhật thông tin chi tiết thẻ của bạn để sử dụng tất cả các tính năng của ứng dụng và uống nhiều nước hơn.
t.zh_CN: 由于订阅付款时发生错误，无法续订订阅。请更新您的银行卡详情，以使用应用的全部功能，喝更多的水。

context:
Surface: Paywall — short price line shown after a free-trial CTA (currently unreferenced in Swift code, preserved for legacy / re-introduced paywall layouts).
  Type: paragraph (subscription terms) — shorter price-only variant of "tryThreeDaysDescription".
  Context: Compact price line stating the post-trial price per period — e.g. "Then $9.99/year".
  Placeholders:
    %@ — localized formatted price (e.g. "$9.99", "2 000 RUB")
    %@ — billing period name (e.g. "year", "month")
  Tone: neutral / informative.

Surface: Statistics screens (one-day statistic, beverage detail statistic) — caption showing the water-balance equivalent for a logged drink.
  Type: paragraph (caption).
  Context: Shows how much pure water balance a given drink amount contributes, accounting for the beverage's water-content coefficient. For example, "= 200 ml of water balance" next to a 300 ml of coffee entry.
  Placeholders:
    %@ — equivalent water-balance amount as a formatted number (e.g. "200", "1.2")
    %@ — measurement unit ("ml" / "l" / "fl oz")

Surface: Weight tracker screen — title of the "starting weight" tile (the first measurement the user logged when starting to track weight).
  Type: row title.
  Context: Label for the user's initial / baseline weight entry, shown alongside "Current weight" and "Weight progress" tiles. Also used as VoiceOver accessibility label for the same tile.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit tile header.

Surface: Weight tracker screen — title of the "current weight" tile (the most recent measurement). Tapping the tile lets the user log a new weight entry.
  Type: row title.
  Context: Label for the user's latest weight measurement. Paired with "Initial weight" and "Weight progress" tiles. Also used as VoiceOver accessibility label.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit tile header.

Surface: Weight tracker screen — title of the "weight progress / dynamics" tile (delta between initial and current weight) and the title of the dedicated weight-dynamics screen pushed when the user taps the tile. Also reused as a row title on the Main screen card linking to the weight tracker.
  Type: row title / screen title.
  Context: Label for the user's weight change over time (gain or loss versus the starting weight). Also used as VoiceOver accessibility label.
  Constraints: Keep short to fit tile header.

Surface: Weight tracker screen — primary CTA button at the bottom; opens the weight input flow to log a new measurement. Also used as the button's VoiceOver label.
  Type: button label.
  Context: Imperative phrase prompting the user to enter today's weight. "Add" framing matches the rest of the app (add a drink, add a beverage).
  Constraints: Keep short — fits a primary CTA button.

t.ja: 現在の体重を追加する

en: Track your weight changes and improve your well-being with My Water
context:
Surface: Weight tracking premium-promo placeholder screen — hero paragraph shown above the feature tiles to non-premium users.
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Promotional one-sentence pitch for the weight tracking feature, mentioning the My Water brand name. Sets the tone for the "Full version" upsell that follows.
  Constraints: Brand name "My Water" — preserve as-is across locales.

t.ar: تتبع تغيّرات وزنك وعزز رفاهيتك مع My Water
t.da: Spor din vægtudvikling og forbedre dit velbefindende med My Water
t.de: Verfolge deine Gewichtsveränderungen und verbessere dein Wohlbefinden mit My Water
t.en: Track your weight changes and improve your well-being with My Water
t.es: Controla los cambios de tu peso y mejora tu bienestar con My Water
t.fr: Suis l'évolution de ton poids et améliore ton bien-être avec My Water
t.hi: अपने वजन के बदलाव पर नज़र रखो और My Water के साथ बेहतर महसूस करो
t.id: Pantau perubahan berat badanmu dan tingkatkan kesejahteraanmu dengan My Water
t.it: Monitora l'andamento del tuo peso e migliora il tuo benessere con My Water
t.ja: My Waterで体重の変化を記録し、体調を整えましょう
t.ko: My Water로 체중 변화를 추적하고 건강을 챙겨보세요
t.ms: Pantau dinamik berat badan anda dan tingkatkan kesejahteraan anda dengan My Water
t.nb: Følg vektutviklingen din og forbedre velværet ditt med Mitt Vann
t.nl: Volg je gewichtsveranderingen en verbeter je welzijn met My Water
t.pl: Śledź swoją dynamikę wagi i popraw swoje samopoczucie dzięki My Water
t.pt_BR: Acompanhe a dinâmica do seu peso e melhore seu bem-estar com My Water
t.ru: Отслеживай динамику своего веса и улучшай своё самочувствие с My Water
t.sv: Spåra din viktutveckling och förbättra ditt välbefinnande med My Water
t.tr: Kilo değişimini takip et ve My Water ile sağlığını iyileştir
t.vi: Theo dõi sự thay đổi cân nặng và cải thiện sức khỏe của bạn với My Water
t.zh_CN: 用 My Water 追踪体重变化，改善你的健康状态

context:
Surface: Weight tracking premium-promo placeholder screen — one of the "what you get with the full version" option tiles (paired with weightPromo3 "Well-being" and weightPromo4 "Healthy body").
  Type: section label / promo tile title.
  Context: Short noun phrase naming the headline benefit — the ability to track weight inside My Water. Sits next to an icon on a small promo tile.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) to fit a small promo tile next to an icon.

Surface: Weight tracking premium-promo placeholder screen — one of the "what you get with the full version" option tiles.
  Type: section label / promo tile title.
  Context: Short noun phrase listing a benefit of weight tracking — improved overall well-being / feeling healthy.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) to fit a small promo tile next to an icon.

Surface: Weight tracking premium-promo placeholder screen — one of the "what you get with the full version" option tiles (paired with weightPromo2 "Weight tracking" and weightPromo3 "Well-being").
  Type: section label / promo tile title.
  Context: Short noun phrase listing a benefit of weight tracking — feeling fit and physically healthy. "Healthy body" framing matches the app's self-care lexicon.
  Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) to fit a small promo tile next to an icon.

en: My Water helps you drink more and stay healthier. It’s a great app!
context:
Surface: Generated share image — sublabel / caption baked into the "I reached my daily water goal" share artwork. Legacy / likely orphaned — no Swift call-site found for this dot-key (kept across all locales as historical baseline; do not delete in translation pipeline).
  Type: paragraph (marketing caption).
  Context: First-person promotional one-liner spoken by the user in the share image, framing the app as a friendly helper. Tone is casual and warm. Uses legacy lexicon "My water" referring to the app itself; the value uses curly apostrophe (’) in source — preserve curly apostrophe / locale-standard punctuation in target language. Note: the key segment "fullfiled" is a typo of "fulfilled" — legacy identifier, do not rename.
  Tone: friendly, casual, promotional.

t.ar: يساعدني تطبيق My Water على شُرْب المزيد من الماء وعلى أن أكون أكثر صحةً، إنه تطبيق رائع!
t.da: Mit vand hjælper med at drikke mere og blive sundere, det er en fin app!
t.de: Mein Wasser hilft, mehr zu trinken und gesünder zu sein, es ist eine nette App!
t.en: My Water helps you drink more and stay healthier. It’s a great app!
t.es: Mi agua ayuda a beber más y a estar más saludable, ¡es una buena aplicación!
t.fr: Mon eau aide à boire plus et à être en meilleure santé, c'est une belle application !
t.hi: My Water अधिक पानी पीने और स्वस्थ रहने में मदद करता है, यह एक अच्छा ऐप है!
t.id: My Water membantu kamu minum lebih banyak dan tetap sehat, ini aplikasi yang bagus!
t.it: La mia acqua aiuta a bere di più e ad essere più sani, è una bella app!
t.ja: 「My Water」は、もっと水分を取ってさらに健康になるのをサポートする優れたアプリです！
t.ko: My water는 더 많이 마시고 더 건강해지도록 도와줍니다. 좋은 앱이에요!
t.ms: Air saya membantu untuk minum lebih banyak dan tetap segar bugar, ini adalah aplikasi yang hebat!
t.nb: Mitt Vann hjelper deg å drikke mer og holde deg sunnere, det er en flott app!
t.nl: Mijn Water helpt je meer te drinken en gezonder te blijven. Het is een geweldige app!
t.pl: Moja woda pomaga pić więcej i być zdrowszym, to jest ładna aplikacja!
t.pt_BR: O My Water ajuda você a beber mais e a se manter saudável. É um ótimo aplicativo!
t.ru: Моя вода помогает пить больше и быть в форме, это хорошее приложение!
t.sv: Mitt Vatten-appen hjälper dig att dricka mer och bli friskare. Det är en bra app!
t.tr: My Water daha fazla içmene ve daha sağlıklı kalmana yardımcı olur. Harika bir uygulama!
t.vi: My Water sẽ giúp bạn uống nhiều nước hơn và khỏe mạnh hơn, đó là một ứng dụng hay!
t.zh_CN: My water 有助于我多喝水，改善身体健康，是个很不错的应用！

context:
Surface: App Store screenshot / marketing hero header.
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Marketing claim "7 million happy users". Intentional abbreviation — translate the equivalent short form in target language ("млн" in ru, "Mio." in de, etc.).
  Constraints: Keep abbreviation form (not "million" full word); fits hero header on one line.

Surface: Onboarding promo screen / paywall hero — social proof line.
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Marketing claim showing the app's average star rating on the App Store ("4.7 out of 5"). Numeric format "X.Y/5" should follow locale-standard decimal separator (e.g. "4,7/5" in ru / fr / de). Note: key name has a legacy typo "screnShotNew" instead of "screenShotNew" — do not rename.
  Constraints: Keep numeric format short; fits one line on hero header.

Surface: Onboarding promo screen / paywall hero — social proof line.
  Type: paragraph (marketing claim).
  Context: Marketing claim showing total number of App Store ratings ("31 thousand ratings worldwide"). "31K" is intentional abbreviation — use the equivalent locale-standard short form ("31 тыс." in ru, "31 Tsd." in de, etc.). Note: key name has a legacy typo "screnShotNew" instead of "screenShotNew" — do not rename.
  Constraints: Keep abbreviation form (not "thousand" full word); fits one line on hero header.

t.da: Vælg dit layout for startskærmen, appens udseende og de trackere, du vil se. Du kan ændre alt når som helst

t.tr: Ana ekran düzenini, uygulamanın görünümünü ve görmek istediğin takip alanlarını seç. İstediğin zaman her şeyi değiştirebilirsin

en: There is not enough free memory to complete the action. Please, close other apps and try again.
context:
Surface: System error alert raised by Realm when the device runs out of address space / RAM during a database operation (Realm.Error.addressSpaceExhausted), shown via the top view controller.
  Type: error message.
  Context: User has too many other apps in memory at once and Realm cannot finish a read / write. Asks the user to close other apps and retry. Tone is polite and action-oriented. "Memory" here means device RAM, not storage — distinct from the sibling "noFreeStorage" key which covers the out-of-disk-space case.

t.ar: لا توجد ذاكرة خالية كافية لإكمال الإجراء. من فضلك، أغلق التطبيقات الأخرى وحاول مرة أخرى.
t.da: Der er ikke nok ledig hukommelse til at fuldføre handlingen. Luk venligst andre apps, og prøv igen.
t.de: Es ist nicht genügend freier Speicher vorhanden, um die Aktion abzuschließen. Bitte schließen Sie andere Anwendungen und versuchen Sie es erneut.
t.en: There is not enough free memory to complete the action. Please, close other apps and try again.
t.es: No hay suficiente memoria libre para completar la acción. Por favor, cierre otras aplicaciones y vuelva a intentarlo.
t.fr: Il n'y a pas assez de mémoire libre pour terminer l'action. Veuillez fermer les autres applications et réessayer.
t.hi: कार्रवाई को पूरा करने के लिए पर्याप्त मुक्त मेमोरी नहीं है। कृपया अन्य ऐप बंद करें और दोबारा कोशिश करें।
t.id: Tidak cukup memori untuk melakukan tindakan. Tolong tutup aplikasi lain dan coba lagi.
t.it: Non c'è abbastanza memoria libera per completare l'azione. Per favore, chiuda altre applicazioni e riprovi.
t.ja: アクションを完了するのに十分な空きメモリがありません。他のアプリケーションを閉じて、再試行してください。
t.ko: 작업을 완료하기에 메모리가 부족합니다. 다른 앱을 닫고 다시 시도해 주세요.
t.ms: Memori tidak cukup untuk melakukan tindakan. Sila tutup aplikasi lain dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Det er ikke nok ledig minne til å fullføre operasjonen. Lukk andre apper og prøv igjen.
t.nl: Er is niet genoeg geheugen vrij om de actie te voltooien. Sluit alstublieft andere apps en probeer het opnieuw.
t.pl: Za mało wolnej pamięci, aby zakończyć działanie. Zamknij inne aplikacje i spróbuj ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Não há memória livre suficiente para concluir a ação. Por favor, feche outros aplicativos e tente novamente.
t.ru: Не хватает свободной памяти для выполнения действия. Пожалуйста, закройте другие приложения и попробуйте снова.
t.sv: Det finns inte tillräckligt med ledigt minne för att slutföra åtgärden. Stäng andra appar och försök igen.
t.tr: Eylemi tamamlamak için hafızada yeterli boş yer yok. Lütfen diğer uygulamaları kapatın ve yeniden deneyin.
t.vi: Không đủ khoảng trống bộ nhớ để hoàn thành tác vụ. Vui lòng đóng các ứng dụng khác và thử lại.
t.zh_CN: 没有足够的可用内存来完成操作。请关闭其他应用程序，然后重试。

en: Your phone storage is full and the operation cannot be completed. Please free up storage on your device and try again.
context:
Surface: System error alert raised by Realm when the device runs out of disk space during a database operation (Realm.Error.fail mapped to out-of-storage), shown via the top view controller.
  Type: error message.
  Context: User's device storage is full and the requested action cannot complete. Asks the user to free up storage on their device and retry. Tone is polite and action-oriented. "Phone storage" refers to device disk space, not RAM — distinct from the sibling "noRamError" key which covers the out-of-memory case.

t.ar: انتهى تخزين هاتفك، لا يمكن إجراء العملية. من فضلك، قم بتحرير مساحة التخزين على جهازك وحاول مرة أخرى.
t.da: Din telefons lagerplads er fuld, og handlingen kan ikke udføres. Frigør venligst lagerplads på din enhed, og prøv igen.
t.de: Ihr Telefonspeicher ist beendet, der Vorgang kann nicht ausgeführt werden. Bitte geben Sie Speicherplatz auf Ihrem Gerät frei und versuchen Sie es erneut.
t.en: Your phone storage is full and the operation cannot be completed. Please free up storage on your device and try again.
t.es: El almacenamiento de su teléfono está lleno y la operación no se puede completar. Por favor, libere espacio en su dispositivo y vuelva a intentarlo.
t.fr: La mémoire de votre téléphone est terminée, l'opération ne peut pas être effectuée. Veuillez libérer de l'espace de stockage sur votre appareil et réessayer.
t.hi: आपके फ़ोन का स्टोरेज भर गया है, ऑपरेशन पूरा नहीं हो सकता। कृपया अपने डिवाइस पर स्टोरेज खाली करें और दोबारा कोशिश करें।
t.id: Penyimpanan ponsel Anda penuh, operasi tidak dapat dilakukan. Tolong kosongkan ruang penyimpanan di perangkat Anda dan coba lagi.
t.it: La memoria del telefono è terminata, l'operazione non può essere eseguita. Per favore, liberi spazio di archiviazione sul Suo dispositivo e riprovi.
t.ja: 携帯電話のストレージがいっぱいのため、操作を完了できません。デバイスのストレージを空けてから、もう一度お試しください。
t.ko: 휴대전화 저장 공간이 가득 차 작업을 완료할 수 없습니다. 저장 공간을 확보한 후 다시 시도해 주세요.
t.ms: Storan telefon anda telah penuh, operasi tidak dapat dilakukan. Sila kosongkan storan pada peranti dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Det er ikke mer lagringsplass på telefonen, så operasjonen kan ikke utføres. Frigjør lagringsplass på enheten, og prøv igjen.
t.nl: Uw opslagruimte is vol, de bewerking kan niet worden uitgevoerd. Maak opslagruimte vrij op uw apparaat en probeer het opnieuw.
t.pl: Skończyła się pamięć telefonu, nie można wykonać operacji. Zwolnij miejsce na swoim urządzeniu i spróbuj ponownie.
t.pt_BR: O armazenamento do seu telefone acabou, a operação não pode ser realizada. Libere espaço de armazenamento em seu dispositivo e tente novamente.
t.ru: Память вашего телефона закончилась, операция не может быть выполнена. Пожалуйста, освободите память на устройстве и попробуйте снова.
t.sv: Det finns inte mer lagringsutrymme på din telefon, så åtgärden kan inte utföras. Frigör lagringsutrymme på din enhet och försök igen.
t.tr: Telefonunuzun hafızası doldu, işlem gerçekleştirilemiyor. Lütfen cihazınızda yer açın ve yeniden deneyin.
t.vi: Bộ nhớ điện thoại của bạn đã hết, không thể thực hiện thao tác. Vui lòng giải phóng bộ nhớ trên thiết bị của bạn và thử lại.
t.zh_CN: 您的手机存储空间已用完，无法执行该操作。请释放设备上的存储空间，然后重试。

t.ar: لا يُمكن تجديد الاشتراك بسبب مشاكل في الفواتير. انقر هنا لتحديث بيانات الدفع.
t.da: Abonnementet kan ikke fornyes på grund af et faktureringsproblem. Tryk her for at opdatere betalingsoplysninger.
t.de: Das Abonnement kann wegen Problemen bei der Rechnungsstellung nicht erneuert werden. Tippen Sie hier, um Ihre Zahlungsangaben auf neuesten Stand zu bringen.
t.en: Subscription can’t be renewed because of a billing issue. Tap here to update payment info.
t.es: La suscripción no puede ser renovada por un problema de facturación. Pulse aquí para actualizar la información de pago.
t.fr: Le renouvellement de l'abonnement est impossible en raison d'un problème de facturation. Appuyez ici pour mettre à jour vos informations de paiement.
t.hi: बिलिंग की समस्या के कारण सदस्यता का नवीनीकरण नहीं किया जा सकता है। पेमेंट की जानकारी अपडेट करने के लिए यहाँ टैप करें।
t.id: Langganan tidak dapat diperpanjang karena masalah pembayaran. Ketuk pemberitahuan untuk memperbarui informasi pembayaran.
t.it: L'abbonamento non può essere rinnovato a causa di un problema con l'addebito. Tocchi qui per aggiornare le informazioni di pagamento.
t.ja: 請求の問題により、サブスクリプションを更新できません。支払い情報を更新するには、こちらをタップしてください。
t.ko: 청구 관련 문제 때문에 구독을 갱신할 수 없습니다. 여기를 탭해서 결제 정보를 업데이트하세요.
t.ms: Langganan tidak boleh dipanjangkan kerana masalah dengan pembayaran. Klik pada pemberitahuan untuk mengemas kini butir pembayaran.
t.nb: Abonnementet kan ikke fornyes på grunn av faktureringsproblemer. Klikk her for å oppdatere betalingsinformasjon.
t.nl: Vanwege een factureringsprobleem kan het abonnement niet worden verlengd. Tik hier om de betalingsgegevens bij te werken.
t.pl: Nie można odnowić subskrypcji z powodu problemu z naliczaniem opłaty. Stuknij tutaj, aby uaktualnić dane do płatności.
t.pt_BR: A assinatura não pode ser renovada por causa de um problema na cobrança. Toque aqui para atualizar dados de pagamento.
t.ru: Подписка не может быть продлена из-за проблем с оплатой. Нажмите на уведомление, чтобы обновить данные для оплаты.
t.sv: Prenumerationen kan inte förnyas på grund av faktureringsproblem. Tryck här för att uppdatera betalningsinformation.
t.tr: Fatura sorunları nedeniyle abonelik yenilenemedi. Fatura ayrıntılarını güncellemek için bildirime tıklayın.
t.vi: Không thể gia hạn đăng ký vì có vấn đề thanh toán. Nhấn vào đây để cập nhật thông tin thanh toán.
t.zh_CN: 由于结算问题,订阅无法续期。点击此处以更新付款信息。

t.zh_CN: 足够的水量会让你的身体感觉更好。照顾好自己😊

en: Keep an eye on your water balance to feel better. And we will remind you to drink water 😉
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Positions the app as a partner that will keep reminding the user to drink water for better wellbeing. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: راقب توازن الماء لديك لتشعر بأنك في أفضل حالاتك. سوف نقوم بتذكيرك بشرب الماء 😉
t.da: Hold øje med din vandbalance for at få det bedre. Og vi minder dig om at drikke vand 😉
t.de: Behalte deine Wasserbilanz im Auge, um dich besser zu fühlen. Wir erinnern dich daran, Wasser zu trinken 😉
t.en: Keep an eye on your water balance to feel better. And we will remind you to drink water 😉
t.es: Cuida tu equilibrio hídrico para sentirte mejor. Te recordaremos beber agua 😉
t.fr: Surveille ton équilibre hydrique pour te sentir mieux. Nous te rappellerons de boire de l'eau 😉
t.hi: बेहतर महसूस करने के लिए अपने पानी पर नज़र रखो। हम तुम्हें पानी पीने की याद दिलाएंगे 😉
t.id: Pantau keseimbangan airmu untuk merasa lebih baik. Kami akan mengingatkan kamu untuk minum air 😉
t.it: Tieni d'occhio il tuo bilancio idrico per sentirti meglio. Ti ricorderemo di bere acqua 😉
t.ja: 気分を良くするために水分バランスに気を配りましょう。水を飲むタイミングはお知らせします 😉
t.ko: 컨디션이 좋아지도록 수분 균형를 챙겨요. 물 마시라고 알려드릴게요 😉

t.nb: Hold øye med vannbalansen din for å føle deg bedre. Vi minner deg på å drikke vann 😉
t.nl: Houd je waterbalans in de gaten om je beter te voelen. We herinneren je eraan om water te drinken 😉
t.pl: Obserwuj swój bilans wodny, aby czuć się lepiej. Będziemy Ci przypominać o piciu wody 😉
t.pt_BR: Cuide do seu balanço hídrico para se sentir melhor. Vamos lembrar você de beber água 😉
t.ru: Следи за своим водным балансом, чтобы чувствовать себя лучше. Мы будем напоминать тебе пить воду 😉
t.sv: Håll koll på din vattenbalans för att må bättre. Och vi påminner dig om att dricka vatten 😉
t.tr: Kendini daha iyi hissetmek için su dengene dikkat et. Sana su içmeni hatırlatacağız 😉
t.vi: Hãy theo dõi cân bằng nước của bạn để cảm thấy tốt hơn. Và chúng tôi sẽ nhắc bạn uống nước 😉

en: For glowing, healthy skin, drink water. In our app you can track your water balance ❤️
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Beauty / skin-health hook tying water intake to glowing skin, with a soft reminder that the app helps track water balance. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: شرب الماء ضروري للبشرة المتألقة والصحية. في تطبيقنا يمكنك تتبع توازن الماء الخاص بك ❤️
t.da: Du bør drikke vand for at få en skinnende og sund hud. I vores app kan du spore din vandbalance ❤️
t.de: Für strahlende und gesunde Haut musst du Wasser trinken. In unserer App kannst du deine Wasserbilanz verfolgen ❤️
t.en: For glowing, healthy skin, drink water. In our app you can track your water balance ❤️
t.es: Para tener una piel brillante y sana, hay que beber agua. En nuestra app puedes hacer un seguimiento de tu equilibrio hídrico ❤️
t.fr: Pour avoir une peau éclatante et saine, bois de l'eau. Dans notre appli, tu peux suivre ton équilibre hydrique ❤️
t.hi: चमकदार और स्वस्थ त्वचा के लिए पानी पीना बहुत जरूरी है। हमारे ऐप में तुम अपने पानी को ट्रैक कर सकते हो ❤️
t.id: Untuk kulit bercahaya dan sehat, kamu perlu minum air. Di aplikasi kami kamu bisa pantau keseimbangan airmu ❤️
t.it: Per avere una pelle radiosa e sana, devi bere acqua. Nella nostra app puoi monitorare il tuo bilancio idrico ❤️
t.ja: ツヤのある健康な肌のために、水を飲みましょう。アプリで水分バランスを記録できます ❤️
t.ko: 빛나고 건강한 피부를 위해 물을 마셔요. 우리 앱에서 수분 균형를 관리할 수 있어요❤️
t.ms: Untuk kulit berseri dan sihat, minumlah air. Dalam aplikasi kami awak boleh memantau air dalam badan ❤️
t.nb: Du bør drikke vann for å få en strålende og sunn hud. I appen vår kan du spore vannbalansen din ❤️
t.nl: Voor een stralende en gezonde huid moet je water drinken. In onze app kun je je waterbalans volgen ❤️
t.pl: Aby uzyskać promienną i zdrową skórę, trzeba pić wodę. W naszej aplikacji możesz śledzić swój bilans wodny ❤️

t.ru: Для сияющей и здоровой кожи необходимо пить воду. В нашем приложении ты можешь отслеживать свой водный баланс ❤️
t.sv: Du bör dricka vatten för att få en lysande och frisk hud. I vår app kan du spåra din vattenbalans ❤️
t.tr: Parlak ve sağlıklı bir cilt için su içmen gerekir. Uygulamamızda su dengeni takip edebilirsin ❤️
t.vi: Để có làn da sáng và khỏe mạnh, bạn nên uống nước. Trong ứng dụng của chúng tôi, bạn có thể theo dõi cân bằng nước của mình ❤️
t.zh_CN: 想要皮肤水润健康，就要多喝水。在我们的应用里，你可以记录你的饮水量 ❤️

en: Start the day with a glass of water to kickstart your body💧
context:

  Context: Morning-routine suggestion — start the day with a glass of water to kickstart the body. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.en: Start the day with a glass of water to kickstart your body💧
t.es: Recomendamos empezar el día con un vaso de agua para poner el cuerpo en marcha💧
t.fr: Commence la journée avec un verre d'eau pour réveiller ton corps 💧

t.ru: Мы рекомендуем начинать день со стакана воды, чтобы запустить работу организма💧

t.vi: Chúng tôi khuyến nghị bạn bắt đầu ngày mới với một cốc nước để kích hoạt cơ thể của mình 💧

en: A glass of pure water is like a breath of fresh air. Refresh your body ✨
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Lyrical metaphor comparing a glass of water to a breath of fresh air, prompting the user to refresh their body. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: كوب من الماء النظيف كنسمة من الهواء النقي. لينتعش جسمك ✨
t.da: Et glas rent vand er som et frisk pust. Opfrisk din krop ✨
t.de: Ein Glas sauberes Wasser ist wie ein Schluck frischer Luft. Erfrische deinen Körper ✨
t.en: A glass of pure water is like a breath of fresh air. Refresh your body ✨
t.es: Un vaso de agua limpia es como un soplo de aire fresco. Dale un respiro a tu cuerpo ✨
t.fr: Un verre d'eau pure, c'est comme une bouffée d'air frais. Rafraîchis ton corps ✨
t.hi: एक गिलास साफ पानी ताजी हवा की सांस की तरह है। अपने शरीर को ताज़ा करो ✨
t.id: Segelas air putih bagai napas udara segar. Segarkan tubuhmu ✨
t.it: Un bicchiere di acqua pulita è come una boccata d'aria fresca. Rinfresca il tuo corpo ✨
t.ja: 一杯のきれいな水は、新鮮な空気を吸い込むようなもの。体をリフレッシュしましょう✨
t.ko: 깨끗한 물 한 잔은 신선한 공기 같아요. 몸을 상쾌하게 해요✨
t.ms: Segelas air bersih ibarat menghirup udara segar. Segarkan badan awak ✨
t.nb: Et glass rent vann er som et friskt pust. Oppfrisk kroppen din ✨
t.nl: Een glas schoon water is als een frisse wind. Vernieuw je lichaam ✨
t.pl: Szklanka czystej wody jest jak łyk świeżego powietrza. Odśwież swoje ciało ✨

t.tr: Bir bardak temiz su, taze bir nefes gibidir. Vücudunu tazele ✨
t.vi: Một cốc nước tinh khiết giống như một luồng không khí trong lành. Hãy làm mới cơ thể của bạn ✨

en: Your health is in your hands. Take care of yourself today, drink enough water 💧
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Empowerment message — user owns their health; gentle prompt to take care of themselves and drink enough water today. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: صحتك بين يديك. اعتنِ بنفسك اليوم، اشرب كمية كافية من الماء 💧
t.da: Dit helbred er i dine hænder. Pas på dig selv i dag, drik nok vand 💧
t.de: Deine Gesundheit liegt in deinen Händen. Pass heute auf dich auf, trink genug Wasser 💧
t.en: Your health is in your hands. Take care of yourself today, drink enough water 💧
t.es: Tu salud está en tus manos. Cuídate hoy y bebe suficiente agua 💧
t.fr: Ta santé est entre tes mains. Prends soin de toi aujourd'hui, bois suffisamment d'eau 💧
t.hi: तुम्हारा स्वास्थ्य तुम्हारे हाथ में है। आज अपना ख्याल रखो, खूब पानी पियो 💧
t.id: Kesehatanmu di tanganmu. Jaga dirimu hari ini, minum cukup air 💧
t.it: La tua salute è nelle tue mani. Prenditi cura di te oggi, bevi abbastanza acqua 💧
t.ja: 健康は自分次第です。今日は自分を大切に、十分な水を飲みましょう💧
t.ko: 당신의 건강은 당신 손에 있어요. 오늘 자신을 챙기고 물 충분히 마셔요💧

t.nb: Helsen din er i dine hender. Ta vare på deg selv i dag, drikk nok vann 💧
t.nl: Je gezondheid ligt in je handen. Zorg vandaag voor jezelf, drink genoeg water 💧
t.pl: Twoje zdrowie jest w Twoich rękach. Zadbaj o siebie dzisiaj, pij wystarczającą ilość wody 💧
t.pt_BR: A sua saúde está nas suas mãos. Cuide de você hoje, bebendo água suficiente 💧

t.tr: Sağlığın senin elinde. Bugün kendine iyi bak, yeterince su iç 💧
t.vi: Sức khỏe của bạn nằm trong tay bạn. Hãy chăm sóc bản thân ngay hôm nay, hãy uống đủ nước 💧

en: Even one glass of water supports brain function. Drink some water and help your body ✨
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Cognitive-benefit hook — even one glass of water supports brain function; invites the user to help their body. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: حتى كوب واحد من الماء يساعد الدماغ على العمل. اشرب بعض الماء وساعد جسمك ✨

t.de: Selbst ein Glas Wasser unterstützt die Gehirnfunktion. Trink etwas Wasser und hilf deinem Körper ✨
t.en: Even one glass of water supports brain function. Drink some water and help your body ✨
t.es: Incluso un vaso de agua ayuda al funcionamiento del cerebro. Bebe un poco de agua y ayuda a tu organismo ✨
t.fr: Même un verre d'eau aide le cerveau à mieux fonctionner. Bois de l'eau et aide ton corps ✨
t.hi: एक गिलास पानी भी दिमाग को तेजी से काम करने में मदद करता है। थोड़ा पानी पियो और अपने शरीर की मदद करो ✨
t.id: Bahkan segelas air mendukung fungsi otak. Minum air dan bantu tubuhmu ✨

t.ko: 물 한 잔이라도 뇌 기능을 도와줘요. 물을 조금이라도 마시고 몸을 챙겨요 ✨

t.nb: Selv et glass vann får hjernen til å jobbe raskere. Drikk litt vann og hjelp kroppen din ✨

t.sv: Även ett glas vatten stödjer hjärnans funktion. Drick lite vatten och hjälp din kropp ✨
t.tr: Bir bardak su bile beynin daha hızlı çalışmasına yardımcı olur. Biraz su iç ve vücuduna yardım et ✨
t.vi: Ngay cả một cốc nước cũng thúc đẩy chức năng của não bộ. Uống một chút nước sẽ tốt cho cơ thể ✨

en: Start with small steps towards a healthy lifestyle. Drink a glass of water💧

Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.it: Come ti senti oggi? Prenditi cura di te e ripristina il bilancio idrico✨
t.ja: お元気ですか？ 自分をいたわり、水分を補給しましょう ✨
t.ko: 오늘 몸 상태 어때요? 자신을 챙기고 수분 균형를 채워요✨
t.ms: Bagaimana keadaan awak hari ini? Jaga diri dan isi semula air dalam badan ✨
t.nb: Hvordan har du det i dag? Ta vare på deg selv og fyll på vannbalansen ✨
t.nl: Hoe voel je je vandaag? Zorg voor jezelf en vul je waterbalans aan ✨
t.pl: Jak się dzisiaj czujesz? Dbaj o siebie i zadbaj o bilans wodny ✨
t.pt_BR: Como você se sente hoje? Cuide de você e reponha o seu balanço hídrico ✨
t.ru: Как ты себя чувствуешь сегодня? Позаботься о себе и восполни водный баланс ✨
t.sv: Hur mår du idag? Ta hand om dig själv och fyll på din vattenbalans ✨
t.tr: Bugün kendini nasıl hissediyorsun? Kendine iyi bak ve su dengeni yenile ✨
t.vi: Hôm nay bạn cảm thấy thế nào? Hãy chăm sóc bản thân và bổ sung lượng nước cho cơ thể ✨
t.zh_CN: 今天你感觉怎么样？照顾好自己并补充水分✨

en: Let's reach your daily goal together. Don't forget to drink water 🙌
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Partner / team framing — the app is waiting to pursue the Daily goal together with the user; soft reminder to drink water. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: نحن على ثقة من أنك ستصل إلى هدفك اليومي. لا تنس شرب الماء 🙌
t.da: Lad os nå dit daglige mål sammen. Glem ikke at drikke vand 🙌
t.de: Wir glauben, dass du dein Tagesziel erreichst. Vergiss nicht, Wasser zu trinken 🙌
t.en: Let's reach your daily goal together. Don't forget to drink water 🙌
t.es: Creemos que alcanzarás tu objetivo diario. No te olvides de beber agua 🙌
t.fr: Nous croyons que tu atteindras ton objectif quotidien. N'oublie pas de boire de l'eau 🙌
t.hi: हमें विश्वास है कि तुम अपने रोज़ के लक्ष्य तक पहुँच जाओगे। पानी पीना मत भूलना 🙌
t.id: Kami yakin kamu akan mencapai target harianmu. Jangan lupa minum air 🙌
t.it: Raggiungiamo insieme il tuo obiettivo giornaliero. Non dimenticare di bere acqua 🙌
t.ja: 一緒に毎日の目標を達成しましょう。水を飲むのを忘れないでください🙌
t.ko: 함께 일일 목표를 달성하길 기다리고 있어요. 물 마시는 것을 잊지 마세요🙌
t.ms: Kami percaya awak akan mencapai matlamat harian awak. Jangan lupa minum air 🙌
t.nb: Vi venter på at du skal nå ditt daglige mål. Ikke glem å drikke vann 🙌
t.nl: We willen samen je dagelijkse doel bereiken. Vergeet niet om water te drinken 🙌
t.pl: Razem osiągniemy Twój dzienny cel. Nie zapominaj o piciu wody 🙌
t.pt_BR: Vamos alcançar a sua Meta Diária juntos. Não se esqueça de beber água 🙌
t.ru: Мы верим, что ты достигнешь своей дневной цели. Не забывай пить воду 🙌
t.sv: Tillsammans når vi ditt dagliga mål. Glöm inte att dricka vatten 🙌
t.tr: Günlük Hedefine ulaşacağına inanıyoruz. Su içmeyi unutma 🙌
t.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ bạn để cùng đạt được mục tiêu hàng ngày. Đừng quên uống nước nhé 🙌
t.zh_CN: 我们相信你会达到每日的目标。别忘记喝水🙌

en: Your skin depends on water balance. Rehydrate for glowing skin 🌿
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Skin-health hook — links hydration to glowing skin and asks the user to rehydrate. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: يعتمد إشراق الجلد على الماء. اشرب المزيد من الماء للحصول على بشرة متوهجة 🌿
t.da: Din hud afhænger af vandbalancen. Drik vand for strålende hud 🌿
t.de: Die Ausstrahlung der Haut hängt vom Wasser ab. Trink mehr Wasser für strahlende Haut 🌿
t.en: Your skin depends on water balance. Rehydrate for glowing skin 🌿
t.es: Una piel brillante depende del agua. Bebe más agua para tener una piel brillante 🌿
t.fr: L'éclat de ta peau dépend de l'eau. Bois plus d'eau pour avoir une peau éclatante 🌿
t.hi: त्वचा की चमक पानी पर निर्भर करती है। ग्लोइंग स्किन के लिए ज़्यादा पानी पियो 🌿
t.id: Kulit bercahaya tergantung pada air. Minum air lagi untuk kulit bercahaya 🌿
t.it: La luminosità della pelle dipende dall'acqua. Bevi più acqua per avere una pelle luminosa 🌿
t.ja: 肌のツヤは水分次第です。輝く肌のためにより多くの水を飲みましょう🌿
t.ko: 피부 광채는 수분에 달려 있어요. 빛나는 피부를 위해 물을 많이 마셔요 🌿
t.ms: Kulit berseri bergantung pada air dalam badan. Minum lebih banyak air untuk kulit berseri 🌿
t.nb: Huden din er avhengig av vannbalansen. Drikk vann for bedre hud 🌿
t.nl: Je huid hangt af van je waterbalans. Drink meer water voor een stralende huid 🌿
t.pl: Blask cery zależy od wody. Pij więcej wody, aby uzyskać promienną skórę 🌿
t.pt_BR: A sua pele depende do balanço hídrico. Hidrate-se para uma pele radiante 🌿
t.ru: Сияние кожи зависит от воды. Пей больше воды для сияющей кожи 🌿
t.sv: Din hud beror på vattenbalansen. Drick vatten för strålande hud 🌿
t.tr: Cildin su dengesine bağlıdır. Işıltılı bir cilt için daha fazla su iç 🌿
t.vi: Làn da của bạn phụ thuộc vào cân bằng nước. Việc bù nước sẽ làm cho làn da sáng đẹp 🌿
t.zh_CN: 皮肤的光泽取决于饮水量。多喝水让肌肤焕发光彩🌿

en: If you feel tired, drink a glass of water. Refresh your body 💦
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Fatigue-relief framing — suggests a glass of water as a refresher when the user feels tired. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: إذا شعرت بالتعب، اشرب كوبًا من الماء. لينتعش جسمك 💦
t.da: Hvis du føler dig træt, skal du drikke et glas vand. Opfrisk din krop 💦
t.de: Wenn du müde bist, trink ein Glas Wasser. Erfrische deinen Körper 💦
t.en: If you feel tired, drink a glass of water. Refresh your body 💦
t.es: Si te sientes cansado, bebe un vaso de agua. Dale un respiro a tu cuerpo 💦
t.fr: Si tu te sens fatigué, bois un verre d'eau. Rafraîchis ton corps 💦
t.hi: अगर तुम्हें थकान हो तो एक गिलास पानी पियो। अपने शरीर को ताज़ा करो 💦
t.id: Kalau kamu merasa lelah, minum segelas air. Segarkan tubuhmu 💦
t.it: Se ti senti stanco, bevi un bicchiere d'acqua. Rinfresca il tuo corpo 💦

t.ko: 피곤하면 물 한 잔 마셔요. 몸을 시원하게 해요💦
t.ms: Jika awak rasa letih, minum segelas air. Segarkan badan awak 💦
t.nb: Hvis du føler deg sliten, drikk et glass vann. Oppfrisk kroppen din 💦
t.nl: Als je je moe voelt, drink dan een glas water. Vernieuw je lichaam 💦
t.pl: Jeśli czujesz się zmęczony, wypij szklankę wody. Odśwież swoje ciało 💦

t.ru: Если ты чувствуешь усталость - выпей стакан воды. Освежи своё тело 💦
t.sv: Om du känner dig trött, drick ett glas vatten. Uppfriska din kropp 💦
t.tr: Kendini yorgun hissediyorsan bir bardak su iç. Vücudunu tazele 💦
t.vi: Nếu bạn cảm thấy mệt, hãy uống một cốc nước. Hãy làm mới cơ thể của mình 💦
t.zh_CN: 感到疲倦时，喝杯水，让身体焕然一新💦

en: We haven't seen you for several days. Are you still keeping up your water balance? 😊
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Acknowledges the user has been away for several days and asks if they are still keeping up with their water balance. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: لم نرك في التطبيق منذ عدة أيام. تذكر أن تحافظ على توازن الماء 😀
t.da: Vi har ikke set dig i flere dage. Kan du huske at bevare din vandbalance? 😊
t.de: Wir haben dich einige Tage in der App nicht gesehen. Vergiss nicht, deine Wasserbilanz zu halten 😊
t.en: We haven't seen you for several days. Are you still keeping up your water balance? 😊
t.es: No te hemos visto en la app desde hace unos días. No te olvides de mantener el equilibrio hídrico 😊
t.fr: On ne t'a pas vu dans l'appli depuis plusieurs jours. N'oublie pas ton équilibre hydrique 😊
t.hi: हमने तुम्हें कई दिनों से नहीं देखा। पानी पीते रहना याद रखो 😊
t.id: Kami sudah beberapa hari nggak lihat kamu di aplikasi. Jangan lupa jaga keseimbangan air 😊
t.it: Non ti vedevamo nell'app da diversi giorni. Ti ricordi di rimanere idratato? 😊
t.ja: 数日ぶりですね。水分補給は続いていますか？😊
t.ko: 며칠 동안 앱에서 못 뵀어요. 물 충분히 마시는 것을 잊지 마세요😊
t.ms: Dah lama kami tak nampak awak dalam aplikasi. Jangan lupa jaga air dalam badan 😊
t.nb: Vi har ikke sett deg på flere dager. Husker du å holde vannbalansen? 😊
t.nl: We hebben je al een aantal dagen niet meer in de app gezien. Vergeet niet om de waterbalans te behouden 😊
t.pl: Nie widzieliśmy Cię w aplikacji od kilku dni. Nie zapominaj o utrzymaniu bilansu wodnego 😊
t.pt_BR: Faz alguns dias que não vemos você no app. Não se esqueça de manter o seu balanço hídrico 😊
t.ru: Мы не видели тебя несколько дней в приложении. Не забывай поддерживать водный баланс 😊
t.sv: Vi har inte sett dig på flera dagar. Kommer du ihåg att behålla din vattenbalans? 😊
t.tr: Seni birkaç gündür uygulamada göremiyoruz. Su dengeni korumayı unutma 😊
t.vi: Chúng tôi đã không gặp bạn trong vài ngày. Bạn vẫn nhớ duy trì cân bằng nước của mình chứ? 😊
t.zh_CN: 你好几天没来了。记得补充水分😊

en: Drinking water is important for your skin and brain. Replenish your water balance 😍
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Combined skin and cognitive benefits framing — nudges the user to replenish their water balance. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: شرب الماء مهم لوظيفة الجلد والدماغ. جدد التوازن المائي الخاص بك 😍
t.da: At drikke vand er vigtigt for din hud og hjerne. Genopfyld din vandbalance 😍
t.de: Es ist wichtig, Wasser für Haut und Gehirn zu trinken. Füll deine Wasserbilanz wieder auf 😍
t.en: Drinking water is important for your skin and brain. Replenish your water balance 😍
t.es: Es importante beber agua para la piel y el funcionamiento del cerebro. Repón tu equilibrio hídrico 😍
t.fr: Boire de l'eau est important pour ta peau et ton cerveau. Reconstitue ton équilibre hydrique 😍
t.hi: पीने का पानी त्वचा और मस्तिष्क के कार्य के लिए महत्वपूर्ण है। अपने पानी की भरपाई करो 😍
t.id: Minum air penting untuk kulit dan fungsi otak. Isi lagi keseimbangan airmu 😍
t.it: Bere acqua è importante per la pelle e le funzioni cerebrali. Ripristina il bilancio idrico 😍
t.ja: 水を飲むことは、肌と脳のためにとても大切です。しっかり水分を補給しましょう😍
t.ko: 물은 피부와 뇌 기능에 중요해요. 수분 균형를 채워요😍
t.ms: Minum air penting untuk kulit dan fungsi otak. Isi semula air dalam badan 😍
t.nb: Å drikke vann er viktig for huden og hjernen din. Fyll på vannbalansen 😍
t.nl: Water drinken is belangrijk voor je huid en hersenen. Vul je waterbalans aan 😍
t.pl: Picie wody jest ważne dla funkcjonowania skóry i mózgu. Uzupełnij swój bilans wodny 😍
t.pt_BR: Beber água é importante para a sua pele e o seu cérebro. Reponha o seu balanço hídrico 😍
t.ru: Пить воду важно для кожи и работы мозга. Восполни свой водный баланс 😍
t.sv: Att dricka vatten är viktigt för din hud och hjärna. Fyll på din vattenbalans 😍
t.tr: Su içmek cilt ve beyin için önemlidir. Su dengeni yenile 😍
t.vi: Uống nước rất quan trọng cho làn da và não bộ của bạn. Hãy bổ sung cân bằng nước nhé 😍
t.zh_CN: 饮用水对皮肤和大脑功能很重要。补充你的水分吧😍

en: Start with small steps towards a healthy lifestyle. Drink a glass of water💧
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Small-steps framing — a single glass of water as the first step toward a healthy lifestyle. Duplicate of pushRetention_9 (kept as a separate scheduling slot in the rotation). Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.en: Start with small steps towards a healthy lifestyle. Drink a glass of water💧

t.ja: 健康的なライフスタイルに向けた小さなステップから始めましょう。コップ一杯の水を飲みましょう💧
t.ko: 건강한 생활로 가는 작은 걸음을 시작해요. 물 한 잔 마셔요💧

t.ru: Начни с маленьких шагов к здоровому образу жизни. Выпей стакан воды💧

t.vi: Bắt đầu với những bước nhỏ để hướng tới một lối sống lành mạnh. Hãy uống một ly nước 💧

en: We want you to take care of yourself and stay hydrated. We’re here to support you! ❤️
context:
Surface: Push retention notification — body text, sent to inactive users to re-engage them.
  Type: notification body.
  Context: Warm partnership message — the app wants the user to stay hydrated and offers ongoing support. Emoji intentional per brand voice for retention pushes; translators should preserve the same emoji (or culturally equivalent if one truly does not transfer).

t.ar: نريدك أن تعتني بنفسك وتشرب المزيد من الماء. سوف ندعمك في هذا! ❤️
t.da: Vi vil gerne have, at du passer på dig selv og får nok væske. Og vi vil støtte dig på denne rejse! ❤️
t.de: Wir wollen, dass du auf dich aufpasst und mehr Wasser trinkst. Wir unterstützen dich dabei! ❤️
t.en: We want you to take care of yourself and stay hydrated. We’re here to support you! ❤️
t.es: Queremos que te cuides y bebas más agua. ¡Te apoyaremos en esto! ❤️
t.fr: Nous voulons que tu prennes soin de toi et que tu boives plus d'eau. Nous t'accompagnerons ! ❤️
t.hi: हम चाहते हैं कि तुम अपना ख्याल रखो और ज़्यादा पानी पियो। इसमें हम तुम्हारा साथ देंगे! ❤️
t.id: Kami ingin kamu menjaga diri dan minum lebih banyak air. Kami akan mendukung kamu! ❤️
t.it: Vogliamo che tu ti prenda cura di te e beva più acqua. Ti supporteremo in questo! ❤️
t.ja: 自分を大切に、しっかり水分をとってくださいね。私たちが応援しています！❤️
t.ko: 자신을 돌보고 물을 많이 마시길 바라요. 우리가 언제든 응원할게요! ❤️
t.ms: Kami nak awak jaga diri dan minum lebih banyak air. Kami akan sokong awak! ❤️
t.nb: Vi vil at du skal ta vare på deg selv og få i deg nok væske. Og vi vil støtte deg på denne reisen! ❤️
t.nl: We willen dat je voor jezelf zorgt en meer water drinkt. Wij zullen je hierin steunen! ❤️
t.pl: Chcemy pomóc Ci dbać o siebie i pić więcej wody. Będziemy Cię w tym wspierać! ❤️
t.pt_BR: Queremos que você se cuide e beba mais água. Vamos te apoiar nisso! ❤️
t.ru: Заботься о себе и пей больше воды. Мы поддержим тебя в этом! ❤️
t.sv: Vi vill att du ska ta hand om dig själv och få i dig tillräckligt med vätska. Och vi kommer att stödja dig på denna resa! ❤️
t.tr: Kendine dikkat etmeni ve daha fazla su içmeni istiyoruz. Bu konuda sana destek olacağız! ❤️
t.vi: Chúng tôi muốn bạn chăm sóc bản thân và cơ thể luôn đủ nước. Và đây chính là cách mà chúng tôi hỗ trợ bạn! ❤️
t.zh_CN: 我们希望你照顾好自己，多喝水。我们会在这方面支持你！❤️

en: Your permission allows us and our advertising partners to deliver personalized ads and measure ad performance.
context:
Surface: System ATT (App Tracking Transparency) permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests permission to track the user across apps and websites (Info.plist `NSUserTrackingUsageDescription`).
  Type: permission prompt.
  Context: Explains that tracking permission lets the app and advertising partners deliver personalized ads and measure ad performance. Shown by iOS in the standard ATT system sheet on first request; user can allow or ask the app not to track. Value is intentionally identical to the legacy `IDFARequest` key — keep both copies in sync.
  Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; ATT review is strict, do not over-promise or use language outside the stated purpose.
  Tone: calm, explanatory — single short sentence, no "Please" prefix (ATT copy is purpose-statement style, not request-style).

t.ar: سيتم استخدام هذا المعرف لتقديم إعلانات مخصصة لك.
t.da: Denne identifikator bruges til at levere personlige annoncer til dig.
t.de: Diese Kennung wird verwendet, um Ihnen personalisierte Anzeigen zu liefern.
t.en: Your permission allows us and our advertising partners to deliver personalized ads and measure ad performance.
t.es: Este identificador se utilizará para ofrecerle anuncios personalizados.
t.fr: Cet identifiant sera utilisé pour vous proposer des publicités personnalisées.

t.id: Pengenal ini akan digunakan untuk menayangkan iklan hasil personalisasi kepada Anda.

en: Annual subscription: [%s] / year, auto-renewal yearly, cancellation at any time. Monthly subscription: [%s] / month, auto-renewal monthly, cancellation at any time.
context:
Surface: Subscription paywall — fine-print legal terms block listing both yearly and monthly subscription terms together. Key name retains the historical "subscripte"-typo + "Android" suffix from the cross-platform parity import; preserve as-is.
  Type: legal disclaimer / fine print.
  Context: Two-line subscription summary that lists the yearly tier and then the monthly tier, each with its price, auto-renewal cadence and the user's right to cancel any time. The literal natural wrapping between sentences renders as a natural wrapping — keep both lines on translation and keep the order yearly-then-monthly.
  Placeholders:
    %@ (1st occurrence) — formatted annual price (e.g. "$29.99")
    %@ (2nd occurrence) — formatted monthly price (e.g. "$4.99")
  Constraints: Plain prose, no list markers; ends each line with a period.
  Tone: formal, legal/disclosure.

context:

  Context: Headline of the pre-prompt that introduces the upcoming iOS ATT system sheet. Frames the request positively as "relevant advertising" rather than tracking.
  Constraints: Keep short — fits as a screen title heading.

en: We'll show you only high-quality, relevant ads. Just allow access to your advertising ID.
context:
Surface: ATT (App Tracking Transparency) pre-prompt / ads consent screen — descriptive paragraph below the `relevantAdvertising` title. Key name contains a typo ("releveant") — legacy identifier, do not rename.
  Type: paragraph.
  Context: Explains to the user that allowing data sharing with partners enables higher-quality, more relevant ads. Frames the IDFA / ATT permission softly. Note: the live value in the file ends with "Just allow access to the advertising ID for this." rather than the partner-sharing wording in the source brief — current live value is canonical.
  Tone: calm, explanatory.

t.ar: لن نعرض عليك إلا إعلانات مناسبة لك وعالية الجودة. فقط اسمح بالوصول إلى معرّف الإعلانات.
t.da: Vi viser dig kun relevante annoncer af høj kvalitet. Du skal bare tillade adgang til dit annoncerings-ID.
t.de: Wir zeigen nur hochwertige und relevante Werbung für Sie an. Erlauben Sie dazu einfach den Zugriff auf die Werbe-ID.
t.en: We'll show you only high-quality, relevant ads. Just allow access to your advertising ID.
t.es: Solo te mostraremos anuncios de alta calidad y que sean relevantes para ti. Para ello, solo tienes que permitir el acceso al id. de anuncios.
t.fr: Nous ne vous montrerons que des annonces pertinentes et de qualité. Pour cela, il vous suffit d’autoriser l’accès à l’identifiant publicitaire.
t.hi: हम आपको केवल हाई क्वालिटी और प्रासंगिक विज्ञापन दिखाएंगे. बस इसके लिए विज्ञापन आईडी तक एक्सेस की अनुमति दें.
t.id: Kami hanya akan menampilkan iklan berkualitas tinggi dan relevan untuk Anda. Cukup izinkan akses ke ID iklan untuk ini.
t.it: Mostreremo solo annunci di alta qualità e pertinenti per Lei. Consenta l'accesso all'ID pubblicità per questo.
t.ja: あなたと関連性のある質の高い広告のみを表示するつもりです。そのために広告IDへのアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 고품질의 관련성 높은 광고만 보여드립니다. 이를 위해 광고 ID에 대한 액세스를 허용하시기만 하면 됩니다.
t.ms: Kami hanya akan menunjukkan iklan yang berkualiti tinggi dan berkaitan untuk anda. Hanya benarkan akses kepada ID pengiklanan untuk ini.
t.nb: Vi viser deg bare relevante annonser av høy kvalitet. Gi tilgang til annonse-ID-en din.
t.nl: We tonen je alleen relevante advertenties van goede kwaliteit. Geef daarvoor gewoon toegang tot je advertentie-ID.
t.pl: Będziemy pokazywać Ci tylko odpowiednio dobrane reklamy wysokiej jakości. W tym celu wystarczy udostępnić ID reklamowe.
t.pt_BR: Mostraremos para você apenas anúncios relevantes e de alta qualidade. Para isso, basta permitir o acesso ao ID de publicidade.
t.ru: Мы будем показывать только качественные и релевантные для вас объявления. Для этого просто разрешите доступ к рекламному идентификатору.
t.sv: Vi visar endast högkvalitativa och relevanta annonser för dig. Tillåt bara åtkomst till reklam-ID för detta.
t.tr: Sizin için yalnızca yüksek kaliteli ve alakalı reklamlar göstereceğiz. Bunun için reklam kimliğine erişime izin vermeniz yeterlidir.
t.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ chỉ hiển thị với bạn những quảng cáo có chất lượng cao và phù hợp. Bạn chỉ cần cấp quyền truy cập vào ID quảng cáo để phục vụ mục đích này.
t.zh_CN: 我们只会向您显示高质量且相关的广告。只需允许访问广告 ID 即可实现。

context:
Surface: app-wide — atomic time-unit label. Paywall subscription tier rows ("/ week" suffix on iPhone and watch), watch premium pricing display.
  Type: time unit label.
  Context: Lowercase noun "week" used as a unit suffix after a price ("$X / week", "$X / week"). Reusable atom — translate as the bare time-unit noun in its lowercase form; call sites further apply `.lowercased()` / `.uppercased()` programmatically.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word). Provide lowercase form so callers can re-case.

Surface: Onboarding activity / workout-frequency selector and onboarding sugary-drinks / coffee / fruits frequency screens — low-frequency option title.
  Type: section row label / questionnaire option title.
  Context: Top-line label for the "low / rare" frequency option. Pairs with `trainingLowSubtitle` only on Activity; pairs with `rarelySubtitle` on drinks / coffee / fruits screens.
  Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits the option button label.
